name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Last week was a bad week for freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek, I’ll be blunt: last week was a bad week for freedom in this nation.

Derek, I’ll be blunt: last week was a bad week for freedom in this nation.

The Supreme Court opened up the door to discrimination against LGBTQ+ Americans. And this, of course, comes just one year after they wiped out _Roe v. Wade_ and eliminated federal protection of abortion rights.

But Derek, here in Pennsylvania, we value real freedom. We protect the LGBTQ+ community. We stand up for our children. And we defend our democracy.

**The work we’re doing in our Commonwealth to advance real freedom has never been more important. So Derek, will you chip in to help us win the tough fights ahead?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66091268/415276519/1445489830?refcode=email_070623_scotus&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGU3NzZlMy01ODFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t3dBRTS-d6j66e_k5NqxTESWXVusykKuf90Irs6McDY=)

With the Supreme Court dead set on rolling back our rights, the work being done on the state level has never been more important.

**And I promise you this: as long as I’m Governor, Pennsylvanians’ rights will be protected, no matter who they are, where they come from, who they love or who they do or do not pray to. But it won’t be easy, so I need your help every step of the way.**

**[If you’re committed to real freedom for every person, I hope you’ll chip in to help us keep up the fight here in Pennsylvania.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66091274/415276525/1445489830?refcode=email_070623_scotus&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGU3NzZlMy01ODFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t3dBRTS-d6j66e_k5NqxTESWXVusykKuf90Irs6McDY=)**

[**July 6, 1957:** The encounter occurred when Lennon's band, The Quarrymen, were performing at the St. Peter's Church fete in Liverpool. McCartney was introduced to Lennon through a mutual friend. This brief meeting marked the beginning of an extraordinary partnership that would shape the course of popular music. Little did they know that this chance encounter would lead to the formation of The Beatles, one of the most beloved bands in music history.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fda07c6ad10d4954a4f0aaf2f2109a03&_e=hEparcwgYJsqZFPgDSgxUvz0ZY9JfFEmd6HJ4b2IfaHl0M9Hx1MpcK2Xr8NEMo67VvJeV00q8qIffMRShRcl93Poeyh-KiMMXlw89lQ_hyx7pwlVCl7oaRNA1XZCo_8FmWKzm_WL2TGIQQJdn8Hx-vRA6i_XZ8iNPlAf9xmueUiRktGHTBqFJbrsm9hDhurdg36nD_Uhrz5Ygzb2adBqs2cqJAHtIMRgo4fLJZuML1j6gSGfE_sYFV3n98MCaWRfNs9KzrfkI0elvFUtVCdzlA%3D%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fda07c6ad10d4954a4f0aaf2f2109a03&_e=hEparcwgYJsqZFPgDSgxUvz0ZY9JfFEmd6HJ4b2IfaHl0M9Hx1MpcK2Xr8NEMo67VvJeV00q8qIffMRShRcl93Poeyh-KiMMXlw89lQ_hyx7pwlVCl7oaRNA1XZCo_8FG9YriArn_1s-XrvxjBKNMZXcNIU3R33wqwWlVWGZ_IOUQLr26JSfNjM-vOri4hRWWpptKv2Pzz6UMw1BoxZXprpLAQ3v9nvTV6pHtjBSzbvD3C9tbPPd9WRWnzii6IWJ-KjEFjJRrNnixsz5AIt-Jw%3D%3D)**

name: Rick Scott
subject: I took on the establishment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | It’s been a few months since I challenged Mitch McConnell for Senate leadership.

And even though he retaliated against me by kicking me off the Commerce Committee, I have no regrets.

_I want to bring a new era of conservative leadership to Washington, one that takes action on the promises we made to voters during our campaigns._

We need bold Republican leaders who aren’t afraid to make hard choices and take a firm line.

And even though I lost the leadership election, I haven’t backed down from my fight to RESCUE AMERICA.

For too long, Republican leaders in Washington have caved to Democrats which is leading America toward woke socialism. We need leaders who are tough, speak the truth and aren’t afraid to stand up to Joe Biden.

And whether I’m in leadership or not, that’s EXACTLY the kind of Senator I aim to be every day.

[**Please, join our 2024 re-election team today to help me continue to END business as usual in Washington and DEFEAT the establishment.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=8578548d705a435bb11daa158c835570&_e=lhnuNFtIdtf0QoWFfwsMej3xMyWsgdVTP_KVWkrC1jfbz7lME2s059w6q91JfKRzCyxrfp_sP3gOPAVCcPw3QBAYt7gHuEVk0iupFsh1eD2Xr4BlAF_B4AmCF1pQsRx_rQs-iYiPMxz6nK6PtiZ-8F3_tdNYdQsF4g19QwMj6ijiliqrYsHvEHdtETnVzBmTsYAAOj_quEXEI8tJRz16OU8XgxK7bzr7GEoRYDQCfzwTYOXgz12HCvurVa-S9uoHLR2-NUOkLemICoB8UN3Gd6x0mzy5AXsFG1uauCHdGYpEK9K-zmydyNhmibc4udnST6uCyElXKaHDIpV9Y_gsvkXOfnoPSUcIk3-_5jdaPkdwuES48wu2eAUltFWwLFiR)

name: Biz, NDRC President
subject: I hope you’ll excuse my language –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
I was just really excited when I saw the news
|
---

Team, I sent a couple of . . . _colorful_ tweets last month, so I wanted to take a moment to explain myself. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66092088/415285341/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230706_FR_7F_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxMTRkMDY3LTViMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0zyG3xhxdWYfhfclhq3UXTvdnTgxUnKFLSv-qPlu1V8=)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66092089/415285345/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230706_FR_7F_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxMTRkMDY3LTViMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0zyG3xhxdWYfhfclhq3UXTvdnTgxUnKFLSv-qPlu1V8=)
---
**I hope you’ll excuse my language – I was just REALLY excited when I saw the news that our grassroots movement won huge victories at the Supreme Court in _Allen v. Milligan_ and _Moore v. Harper_.

[_These decisions will have major consequences in the fight for fair maps. But before I go into more detail, I have to ask: Will you help the NDRC take advantage of this momentum by making a quick donation to support our democracy-saving work?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66092090/415285348/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230706_FR_7F_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxMTRkMDY3LTViMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0zyG3xhxdWYfhfclhq3UXTvdnTgxUnKFLSv-qPlu1V8=)**

In _Moore_ , the Court issued a resounding rejection of the fringe “independent state legislature” theory, upholding our system of checks and balances and ensuring state courts will continue to play an important role in protecting free and fair elections.

And in _Milligan_ , the Court struck down Alabama’s congressional maps for illegally diluting the power of Black votes. As a result, Alabama will have to draw new maps with an additional majority-Black district before the next election.

**Attorney General Eric Holder called the decision “a victory for all Americans,” and said it would “have an impact far beyond the borders of Alabama.” He’s absolutely right on both counts.**

Already, another Supreme Court decision has cleared the way for Louisiana to draw new maps adding an additional majority-minority district before 2024. And pending challenges could lead to maps being redrawn in states like Arkansas, Georgia, South Carolina, and Texas.

[**_Team, thanks to supporters like you, our fair maps movement helped secure the fairest congressional maps in a generation ahead of the last election. Now, we have an incredible opportunity to ensure the maps are _even fairer_ in the next election. Will you donate now to support our work?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66092091/415285350/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230706_FR_7F_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxMTRkMDY3LTViMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0zyG3xhxdWYfhfclhq3UXTvdnTgxUnKFLSv-qPlu1V8=)

I know our campaign sent a lot of emails ahead of the FEC deadline, folks, but I have a different ask today. I’m hoping by the time you finish reading this email, you’ll **[commit to a monthly recurring donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66092336/415291342/-90626349?recurring=true&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230706_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTA3YWVjMi01ZDFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5EKZbg2ktEVo2M3-fm2dNwNcYKLlC2IV0atEV-G1p60=)** to help set our campaign up for success in the months ahead. **The truth is that lasting change can only come about when we come together and fight for it.** We saw that when this campaign team helped me win re-election and Democrats win the House majority in 2018. When we helped elect President Biden, flipped the Senate, and elected a state legislature that took an archaic abortion law off the books in New Mexico in 2020. And when we expanded our Democratic Senate Majority and helped Gabe Vasquez flip New Mexico’s 2nd District last year. None of these victories would have been possible without a carefully planned and well-executed campaign budget. Your grassroots donations help make that possible, **especially recurring donations that we can count on month after month.** Next year, everything from reproductive and LGBTQ+ rights, to Medicare and Social Security, to the future of our public lands and waters will be on the ballot. Your contributions are key to making progress — which hinges on helping us keep New Mexico blue, holding our Democratic Senate Majority, taking back the House, and electing strong Democrats at every level of government. **[So, can you commit to a monthly recurring donation of any amount today? Your support will help us budget for the months ahead and put us on track for victory.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66092339/415291344/-90626349?recurring=true&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230706_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTA3YWVjMi01ZDFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5EKZbg2ktEVo2M3-fm2dNwNcYKLlC2IV0atEV-G1p60=)** | [CHIP IN MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66092341/415291347/-90626349?recurring=true&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230706_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTA3YWVjMi01ZDFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5EKZbg2ktEVo2M3-fm2dNwNcYKLlC2IV0atEV-G1p60=)

— Martin

| Folks, Gov. Newsom recently proposed a historic amendment to the Constitution in an effort to combat the gun violence plaguing the nation. [_**The amendment will permanently enshrine the four broadly supported gun safety principles into the U.S. Constitution:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66092492/415301850/-2039093946?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDcwNmFhYy02MTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BmlqK-hOQ0W7duBf2kNacG2jY1MpEgqdKhdx3d5fxEY=&emci=da37afd5-321c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e4706aac-611c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=560478) **→** Raising the federal minimum age to purchase a gun from 18 to 21; **→** Mandating universal background checks to prevent dangerous individuals from purchasing a gun; **→** Creating a mandatory waiting period for all gun purchases; **→** And banning the sale of assault weapons. [**Gun proponents like the NRA have called Gov. Newsom’s plan “unhinged” - but there’s nothing more unhinged than the needless death our country faces every day thanks to the weapons of war on our streets. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66092493/415301851/-2039093946?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDcwNmFhYy02MTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BmlqK-hOQ0W7duBf2kNacG2jY1MpEgqdKhdx3d5fxEY=&emci=da37afd5-321c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e4706aac-611c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=560478) **_We want to know what top Democrats like you think, so we’re launching an urgent poll. body:
|
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66092574/415305811/-1162166188?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTBhOGY1YS02MzFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TrIwopRtZnG6cjQ8_dQvHZgBfC5GEPEF6jn9laavFCw=)
**BREAKING: I’m running for Congress ** [_**Friend, I wanted you to hear this directly from me: I just announced I’m running for Congress. Last year, I came within 5,800 votes of unseating one of the most vulnerable Republicans in the country -- and now, I have an unprecedented chance to finish the job. I’ve set an ambitious goal -- $50,000 raised in my first 24 hours -- to get my grassroots campaign off the ground. I’ll explain why in a second -- but if you don’t have time to read my whole email, can I count on your $25 before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66092575/415305812/-638006782?&refcode=E3267-20230706-VargasSplit-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTBhOGY1YS02MzFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TrIwopRtZnG6cjQ8_dQvHZgBfC5GEPEF6jn9laavFCw=)
* * *
Friend, I’ve dedicated my life to public service. But my run for Congress isn’t about me. **I’m running for my parents.** They worked night and day on factory lines to give my brothers and me a shot at the American Dream. [_**Now I’m running to make sure all Americans -- our families, our workers, our small businesses -- can have the same opportunities I did. That’s why I’m reaching out and asking you personally on the first day of this race: Will you rush in $25 before midnight to help me kick off my campaign strong? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66092576/415305813/-638006782?&refcode=E3267-20230706-VargasSplit-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTBhOGY1YS02MzFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TrIwopRtZnG6cjQ8_dQvHZgBfC5GEPEF6jn9laavFCw=) **I’m running for my kids, Ava and Luca.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66092577/415305814/-638006782?&refcode=E3267-20230706-VargasSplit-Image-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTBhOGY1YS02MzFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TrIwopRtZnG6cjQ8_dQvHZgBfC5GEPEF6jn9laavFCw=)**_My family!_ I want nothing more than for my children -- and every child -- to have the greatest opportunities possible. But Don Bacon is in Congress fighting for cheap political points rather than families like mine and yours. [_**Friend, I’ll be honest: We need a voice in Congress fighting for our families, not corporate CEOs. So can you rush in $25 and help me get this campaign off the ground? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66092578/415305815/-638006782?&refcode=E3267-20230706-VargasSplit-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTBhOGY1YS02MzFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TrIwopRtZnG6cjQ8_dQvHZgBfC5GEPEF6jn9laavFCw=) Look, I never liked asking you for money. But last year, I lost to Don Bacon by less than 6,000 (!!!) votes. And in a presidential year, all eyes will be on our district and its pivotal electoral vote. So believe me when I say -- I’ll need a strong grassroots team behind me every step of the way. [_**Friend**,** I know I can defeat Don Bacon. name: Katie Porter
subject: One quarter of the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KATIE PORTER FOR SENATE]
body:
[ https://act.katieporter.com/go/14559?t=1001&akid=26077%2E3422442%2E1DuJPv ]Katie Porter for Senate

Derek, of 100 U.S.
Senators, just 25 are women. Just 25!

When thinking about why we need the voices of women in government, this
fact paints a pretty clear picture: When I headed to Congressional
orientation in 2018, there was a Beer Caucus and a Bourbon Caucus, but I
was the only single-mom of school aged kids. It’s no coincidence the
issues of women and families have been put on the backburner for decades.

Women, myself included, bring a different lived experience to Congress
than most of our male colleagues: I’ve made affordable childcare one of my
top priorities in Congress, knowing how most families struggle to find
reliable childcare that fits into their budget—because I’ve been there.

It’s not “good enough” that there are 25 women in the U.S. Senate.
California has a long history of sending trailblazing women to the Senate,
and if elected I would be the first single mom of school aged kids to
serve.

Nobody gets elected alone, and I'd be so honored to earn your support.
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230706-2?refcode=EMAJ06_2_SEN_20230706_V1_F&refcode2=26077_3422442_1DuJPv&akid=26077%2E3422442%2E1DuJPv ]Can you make a donation of $5 today to power our
campaign?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230706-2?refcode=EMAJ06_2_SEN_20230706_V1_F&refcode2=26077_3422442_1DuJPv&akid=26077%2E3422442%2E1DuJPv ]Donate ›››

Thanks for reading,

Katie

| | Thank you to everyone that responded to our poll. What we learned is that the commitments Rural Americans United (RAU) has set are shared with all of us. We will revisit this poll and the actions that come with it over the next months. Our approach was designed so that each program could be independent so that work would not stop if resources were restricted. But working together they are much stronger. RAU is using pilot studies of these different programs to demonstrate success so that we can amplify our funding efforts. Whereas it is disappointing to see such great need, it is reassuring to see a path forward. Most respondence picked Building Media Presence. This works well as we are finishing up a round of media buys to confirm cost and messaging. Pushing back on MAGA rhetoric is critical for democratic success and our data shows that democratic messaging received only during election cycles is increasingly viewed negatively and the absence of democratic messaging at all other times greatly benefits the republican agenda. This may sound contradictory to the data collected measuring the impact of messaging during election cycles where it does have a positive GOTV effect but, when reviewed longitudinally, we see the same amount of effort producing diminishing returns over time. This is clearly shown by consistent low voter turnout and by GenX, Latino and Union workers trending right in Central Washington. To educate, persuade and get voters back we must be heard every single day.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/8bOaJemnS/c?w=xUF9IZEaDkJQfHHYyDBzOV3zLRvWMQQ0dt8v_Q1DXsY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiI1M2Y4MTU4NS00YWFhLTQzNmMtMDU2Ni0wOWI1NDZlMTQyYmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | RAU out and about We were invited to meet the board of Washington Conservation Action. We have had a series of conversations around bringing their sizable resources to Central Washington to expand voter engagement especially among Native American voters, yay! March in Sunnyside where the mayor said that LGBT was too "divisive" and therefore the city could not support Pride. When is being human divisive? Yakima Pride in all its glory. A big thank you to their team for helping Tri-Pride 2023 in so many ways. Prosser meeting on affordable housing and how local politics can help shape a better future. All politics is local. We are overjoyed that five persons have been arrested in conjunction with murdered indigenous women. Thank you to all that have never, not for even a moment, let the names of those that have disappeared be forgotten.
---

Bouncy houses and crafts area for | | Can't see this message? | | | | | The Poll Results Are In | | | While others cower to MAGA. We get LOUDER!!! Over 60 vendors! All day entertainment! 135 foot Pride flag! Bouncy houses and crafts area for the kids and PRIDE for the whole family. | | | | | | Thank you for your feedback and comments. We are on the same page! | | | | Thank you to everyone that responded to our poll. What we learned is that the commitments Rural Americans United (RAU) has set are shared with all of us. We will revisit this poll and the actions that come with it over the next months. Our approach was designed so that each program could be independent so that work would not stop if resources were restricted. But working together they are much stronger. RAU is using pilot studies of these different programs to demonstrate success so that we can amplify our funding efforts. Whereas it is disappointing to see such great need, it is reassuring to see a path forward. Most respondence picked Building Media Presence. This works well as we are finishing up a round of media buys to confirm cost and messaging. Pushing back on MAGA rhetoric is critical for democratic success and our data shows that democratic messaging received only during election cycles is increasingly viewed negatively and the absence of democratic messaging at all other times greatly benefits the republican agenda. This may sound contradictory to the data collected measuring the impact of messaging during election cycles where it does have a positive GOTV effect but, when reviewed longitudinally, we see the same amount of effort producing diminishing returns over time. This is clearly shown by consistent low voter turnout and by GenX, Latino and Union workers trending right in Central Washington. To educate, persuade and get voters back we must be heard every single day. | | | | RAU out and about We were invited to meet the board of Washington Conservation Action. We have had a series of conversations around bringing their sizable resources to Central Washington to expand voter engagement especially among Native American voters, yay! March in Sunnyside where the mayor said that LGBT was too "divisive" and therefore the city could not support Pride. When is being human divisive? Yakima Pride in all its glory. A big thank you to their team for helping Tri-Pride 2023 in so many ways. Prosser meeting on affordable housing and how local politics can help shape a better future. All politics is local. We are overjoyed that five persons have been arrested in conjunction with murdered indigenous women. **Signature Gathering Update:** Alaskans would like to update Alaska on where we are at in our signature drive. We have collected nearly 20,000 of the required 26,000 signatures so far with more petition books being returned every day. We have 1,000 Petition Books in circulation if all filled out is 150,000 signatures. We have had such incredible success; we have asked all our Alaskan Volunteers to return their books 6 months early. Join today to help us Repeal Ranked Choice Voting, help us get our signatures finished as soon as possible. **Supreme Court Decision – Al Gross Should have stayed on the US House Ballot** Very concerning development at the Supreme Court regarding Al Gross dropping out of Special Primary in 2022, it appears that the division of elections violated State Law when they removed Al Gross from the ballot. If he was not removed it would have be Begich, Palin, Gross, Peltola on the ballot, which may have had a very different result. We are very troubled by this development and hope all Alaskans take the time to learn more about this Supreme Court ruling.
#### “Al Gross should have stayed on U.S. House ballot, Alaska Supreme Court says Justices concluded that the Alaska Division of Elections mishandled the withdrawal of the independent who sought to replace Don Young”
“The Alaska Division of Elections improperly removed Al Gross, an independent candidate for U.S. House, from last year’s special election ballot, the Alaska Supreme Court said in a ruling published Friday.”BY: [JAMES BROOKS](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64a7a5d996203156af08fd51&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2Fauthor%2Fjames-brooks%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64a7a2f5ac5f3e58e0000406&l=en-US&s=qJozEk0XU2VovoK73wFpKQHw8N4%3D "Posts by James Brooks") \- APRIL 28, 2023 5:48 PM Alaska Beacon [https://alaskabeacon.com/2023/04/28/al-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says/](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64a7a5d996203156af08fd51&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2F2023%2F04%2F28%2Fal-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64a7a2f5ac5f3e58e0000406&l=en-US&s=5-FmjJBy7_8maC1mR7yrRH8WtCQ%3D) **Our work used to ban Ranked Choice Voting** We have been working hard with other States to help them learn about Ranked Choice Voting, why it is not a good system and how it does not achieve the goals it sets out to accomplish. Our work is being credited by multiple State Legislatures. We are proud to be a part of the work throughout the country to ban Ranked Choice Voting. More States have banned Rank Choice Voting, than use it (5-2)**Florida, Tennessee, Idaho, South Dakota, and Montana have banned ranked Choice Voting, more states are looking at banning ranked choice Voting.**
---

Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**

#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
### **Sign In Person Today**
#### **Want To Sign The Petition To Get Repeal Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book

clean_body: Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | | We have almost 20,000 signatures. We only need 26,000. 50 more petition books to meet our goal. That is only 5% of the total petition books in circulation. | | | Important Our Office is Now Open, Soon We will be Open 7 Days a Week. At this time, please call before you head this way to make sure we have someone here to get your signature. Address: 4201 E Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654It is on the same road as Ken’s Garden Supply (4121 Dimond Way, Wasilla, AK 99654). Once you turn on Dimond, drive straight up the hill. Do not turn, go straight up the hill, there are White Yard Signs with our logo on them. We will have bigger signs coming soon. If you are disabled, please let us know when you call and we will come to the car for you to sign.Phone Number:tel:+19078028116 Email:mailto:Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com?subject=Office%20 You Must Sign The Petition In Person, Online Signatures Do Not Count. | Signing Locations | | | | | Kodiak Please Contact To Sign the Petition!!! Dan Powell 907-942-1312 Thank You Dan!!! DC Draino pictured below wearing one of our buttons while doing a presentation here in Alaska. | Signature Gathering Update: Alaskans would like to update Alaska on where we are at in our signature drive. We have collected nearly 20,000 of the required 26,000 signatures so far with more petition books being returned every day. We have 1,000 Petition Books in circulation if all filled out is 150,000 signatures. We have had such incredible success; we have asked all our Alaskan Volunteers to return their books 6 months early. Join today to help us Repeal Ranked Choice Voting, help us get our signatures finished as soon as possible. Supreme Court Decision – Al Gross Should have stayed on the US House Ballot Very concerning development at the Supreme Court regarding Al Gross dropping out of Special Primary in 2022, it appears that the division of elections violated State Law when they removed Al Gross from the ballot. If he was not removed it would have be Begich, Palin, Gross, Peltola on the ballot, which may have had a very different result. We are very troubled by this development and hope all Alaskans take the time to learn more about this Supreme Court ruling. “Al Gross should have stayed on U.S. House ballot, Alaska Supreme Court says Justices concluded that the Alaska Division of Elections mishandled the withdrawal of the independent who sought to replace Don Young” “The Alaska Division of Elections improperly removed Al Gross, an independent candidate for U.S. House, from last year’s special election ballot, the Alaska Supreme Court said in a ruling published Friday.”BY: "Posts by James Brooks" \- APRIL 28, 2023 5:48 PM Alaska Beacon Our work used to ban Ranked Choice Voting We have been working hard with other States to help them learn about Ranked Choice Voting, why it is not a good system and how it does not achieve the goals it sets out to accomplish. Our work is being credited by multiple State Legislatures. We are proud to be a part of the work throughout the country to ban Ranked Choice Voting. More States have banned Rank Choice Voting, than use it (5-2)Florida, Tennessee, Idaho, South Dakota, and Montana have banned ranked Choice Voting, more states are looking at banning ranked choice Voting. We will have more signing opportunities all year, we are hoping to have all of the petition books turned in by August 31st, the signature verification process will take time and we want to make sure to we the correct amount of signatures in every district. | | Help Us Gather Signatures Today, Sign Up On Our Website or Send Us an Email!!! | admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans” An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!! Sign In Person Today Want To Sign The Petition To Get Repeal Rank Choice Voting!!! There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000. Link to sign up for a Petition Book use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives. get involved please emailmailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers! tel:+19078028116 mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter | | This Communication Was Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message. Friend,

name: Navy SEALs for Congress
subject: Breaking News SEAL Team 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Another Navy SEAL steps up to Save America
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z064bap73dlcgugtgr9eqbo51gjm5og7t67dv5ag_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t35muqb6d3668o7asr1m4q32dpmckombcdi6do6aobh6sqb0tjkctj73d1k69g6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3curm0pjheapm4ptnc9j32s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm1o77cpgm1oj7c8iv0)
Another Navy SEAL steps up to Save America

| |
---
| | |
During my time as a U.S. Navy SEAL one of my favorite assignments was Commanding Officer of BUDS. I was in charge of training prospective SEALs, putting the wanna-be frogmen through the toughest training on the planet, weeding them out during Hell Week, and pushing them to their mental and physical limits. **Most of them broke. The ones who Never Quit became SEALs. **

Let me tell you: _**Recruitment is everything. Today we landed a HUGE recruit for Montana. **_

Let me introduce you to U.S. Navy SEAL, Purple Heart recipient, successful businessman, wildland firefighter, husband, father, and a True America First Patriot - **Tim Sheehy. **

In 2015 I had the honor of pinning Tim's Bronze Star and Purple Heart and today I have the honor of endorsing him to be Montana's next US Senator.

---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zukosqsbo30atjlrcusthfud835unfohqbipiq10_rp22sh2s8i66o70stj62o72cth2bs)
---

Montana's left wing Senator Jon Tester is up for re-election. He has millions of dollars, a dark money super PAC, and the liberal machine eager to throw the race in his favor.

Tim is the warrior we need who can put old Jon out to pasture, flip the senate, and get rid of Chuck Schumer once and for all. But he needs the ammo. **[Can you make a donation now?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9pnka7q5d0q73619iseago94u4pvgtg32g3ra78_rp22sh2s8i66o70stj62o72cth2bs "Can you make a donation now? ")**
---
| | [SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdrh1jeij0sjfv6t75ptnba2l21pohcqe51ot0e8_rp22sh2s8i66o70stj62o72cth2bs)
---

**I was the first SEAL elected to Congress, and last year we grew the ranks to five. Today I 'm asking you to make Tim Sheehy number 6. **
I've been in a lot of battles in my life... Bosnia, Fallujah are just two... and the thing you learn is you need warriors you can trust to go in the line of fire with you. Tim is the warrior I want by my side in Congress for this fight. **[Will you help him get there?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8omu52kgqf080ver6dgua2jh4tdd9djnlu8fos8_rp22sh2s8i66o70stj62o72cth2bs "Will you help him get there? ")**

---
| | [SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zoc4vvgvp4mejtnu0i933s5mner50tdihokslp48_rp22sh2s8i66o70stj62o72cth2bs)
---

The Montana Senate race is not just about Montana. This race will decide the fate of the U.S. Senate and the direction of our country for years to come.

Please donate what you can today.

For God and country,
Commander Ryan Zinke
---
|
---

704C EAST 13TH ST

WHITEFISH, MT 59937

name: Shawn Carney
subject: Is your name on the FBI’s list?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
Dear Pro-Life Friend, One year after the U.S. Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , the biggest threat facing pro-lifers who pray outside abortion clinics is...**_The weaponization of federal law enforcement - which is being used to target and harass pro-life Americans._** I'll cut right to the chase.Here at **40 Days for Life** we hold two nationwide campaigns each year where our volunteers pray, fast, and hold peaceful vigils outside of abortion centers. We are there to offer help and support to mothers in, what for them is, an hour of darkness and great need.For this, our pro-life volunteers are taunted, insulted, and even spit upon. Sometimes they're even physically attacked.It comes with the territory - with standing on the abortion industry's front doorstep and getting between them and the "profit" they are counting on from each abortion.**But, today, we're facing hostility from a shocking new source: the Federal Bureau of Investigation (F.B.I.).**
---
[**Stand with 40 Days for Life** ](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-UA)
---
| | The same F.B.I. that ignored the abortion activists who vandalized and even firebombed dozens of pregnancy centers, churches, and pro-life organizations in the aftermath of the Supreme Court overturning of Roe v. Wade...The same F.B.I. that turned a blind eye when an abortion activist leaked Justice Alito's draft decision in the _Dobbs_ case...The same F.B.I. that was nowhere to be found when an 84-year-old woman in Michigan was _shot in the back_ as she handed out pro-life literature...Instead, the F.B.I. is using their vast resources to target and harass pro-lifers...*****Like Mark Houck whose story made national news when the****Biden Administration sent a heavily armed contingent of F.B.I. on a raid to arrest Mark (a pro-life speaker, sidewalk counselor, and participant in our Philadelphia _40 DAYS_ campaign) in front of ****his wife and children.******* Like Henry, a faithful 40 Days for Life participant who was questioned by two FBI****agents outside of a Minnesota Planned Parenthood.** This is nothing short of the weaponization of law enforcement - a calculated act of political retaliation (directed by the Biden Department of Justice) for the end of _Roe v. Wade._[**This is why I'm prayerfully asking you to stand with our 40 Days for Life volunteers who risk their physical safety and their freedom to protect innocent preborn babies in the womb.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.) If you're wondering why Joe Biden, Merrick Garland, the F.B.I. and the Department of Justice would come after a group of peaceful, prayerful pro-life volunteers, look no further than the growth and the impact our movement over the last fifteen years. Since 2007 we've seen:
---
* 21,989 babies saved
* 242 abortion workers converted and 120 abortion facilities shut down
* 1,000,000+ pro-life Americans praying and fasting and standing vigil for an end to abortion and 20,000 churches standing up for life

---
Now you can see why Joe Biden and Merrick Garland are marshaling the full resources of the Department of Justice and F.B.I. against our volunteers.Now you can see why the ACLU called **40 Days for Life** the "_greatest threat to choice"_ because it is so "_highly organized and effective._ " And now you can see why David Daleiden --- whose undercover videos exposed Planned Parenthoodharvesting and selling baby body parts --- calls us the "_spiritual engine that has driven a lot of the success of the pro-life movement_..."You see, the formula for overcoming the weaponization of the F.B.I. is the same formula we've used to save so many lives.Prayer. Fasting. Peaceful vigil.When _Roe_ was overturned, many wondered what would become of our movement. Some even worried that our volunteers would think the fight to end abortion was over. You and I know that's not the case. You and I know that it merely shifted to the states. Then it happened. A _tidal wave_ of applications for our first _post-Roe_ campaign......with 622 vigils, it immediately became **our largest campaign ever**.And thank God for that. Because abortion is still _legal_ in states where 80% of the population resides (or roughly 262.7 million Americans) and still _procurable_ for 100% of the country. No. The battle is not over.**Abortion by mail. Medicaid abortions. Interstate abortion referrals.** You name it. The abortion industry will do it to maintain their multibillion-dollar industry. This includes calling on their allies in the Biden Administration (like Merrick Garland) to do their "dirty work" and target our pro-life volunteers.As you'd expect, this is a real strain on our budget. Already, we spend $3,466 on each vigil site. With 622 campaigns that comes out to $2,155,852.Now, add to that the cost to hire security ($50,000 in Philadelphia alone, at the site where Mark Houck so bravely stood vigil along with his 12-year-old son), the cost of attorneys, which we provided for Mark, as we do with any of our other participants who are targeted or harassed by the abortion industry and their henchmen.Bottom-line? I need your help today. We can't do this alone. [**That's why I'm asking you to make a one-time contribution of $40 today.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.) Think of it as $1 for each day of our vigil.[**Of course, if you can afford a larger donation of $50, $75, $125, $500, or even $1,000, it'd be a huge boost.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-ZrGY_qDo4v4-6YPOZg) 40 Days for Life is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization and, unlike Planned Parenthood, we don't receive a single penny of taxpayer funding.If you'll stand with us today, I know we can save more babies, spare more mothers and fathers a lifetime of agony and regret, rescue more workers from the clutches of the abortion industry, and persevere against the weaponization of the F.B.I. and the targeting, and harassment of our pro-life volunteers by federal law enforcement.[**So please hurry, stand with 40 Days for Life today.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.) Many thanks!For Life,
---
Shawn Carney
---
President & CEO, 40 Days for Life
---
P.S. Make no mistake, abortion is still legal in most places and Joe Biden's F.B.I. is targeting pro-life warriors to intimidate, bully, and scare them into not showing up on Planned Parenthood's doorstep. By joining me today, you'll send an unmistakable message that pro-life Americans will never back down when it comes to defending the preborn! So please don't delay. [**Please use this link to make your most generous donation of $40 or more to 40 Days for Life today.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._H_NLgkVPI1Q3Obvpg)
---
[**DONATE** ](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
|
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._IHoOou_ABmxzMg4sGgXQ)
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Cocaine Mystery Deepens, Pitcher Can't Throw, and the Deepest Hotel in the World
body:
Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg’s Threads, a new rival to Twitter, launched Wednesday and passed 30 million signups overnight, mainly because Threads is tied to sister platform Instagram. Everyone who signs up brings their Instagram followers with them.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

| | |
# FRIDAY, JULY 7, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today marks the 95th anniversary of the first pre-sliced loaf of bread in history--it was sold in [Chillicothe, Missouri,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFv8yAQgOFfgzes8xEbPDB8i7d8a0eLwGFfi0MEJFb-fdXO3V_p1fNxXa-OE9-3_-4g22JenW_8ohW01BLVil2wkQhJdWSHyRiNRmvT7TYMEdwIUd1gnEIkjLfBzLMjhGAmFTq2CKhAg4Z5VKB7P4agvUEYR1KDn8UFKHDLpf_MfG87xfTOLyq9z0eX7N7aowr1T-AicDnPs__yz9Lnsglcdq4tl7fABQFRgpYwCVz8zimxz20neXCt-VlY1sSegrwVcqErNjzOn6hOWlxgOxyn32H7k_8dAAD__5VeW6Y) on July 7, 1928. Celebrate with a hot slice of buttered toast along with your morning Flyover! In today's edition, we're talking about the ongoing mystery of cocaine found in the West Wing, why pitchers can throw 100 mph strikes but can't make an easy toss to first base, and how to rent rooms deep in an abandoned slate mine.

Have any suggestions? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8Gtljnw_hgYKhUeUvXjhaGI6bCIXJprP591cye39OT3ud1vvpc8v324Td2LdXZh5afPANd6IJqRhldYkZWkl0_GkNoiIxc3aiMt0Of0oKJma02fQhBa-vHxeJCMjsEVEBAYLUC6oKOkYJB0JpVH6wYgGNude--ar63lVP5rU_eu1A3Wdza2kOoN4GTwOk4jhPrn6npp21CvQ8gdxcfRy4lf48kBrhtPpdXrJ2u_QUAAP__qetPRQ) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? [Click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71uwyAUQOGngS3W9eXHMDB0YUu6VOpogbnUtE6oHGSUt6-6ez860vd5na-hbOXxdQt3ci3XOSytHDSDuqC9oJiRJ5eJkAQnN2qjhEajRr46kzXKkAhj0piUjTGbOOUIi5VkreLFIaAAhXYEOYIeIE5GqCAkqQlkEEwCpdLqPnzX8mgr5e1VD9qHpd755tbWfp9MvDH0DH3vfchhoVjrz3_A0H-s5LfX-0H7jfqToee7S-EoiUk4ObZz4F8AAAD__8ycUlk). Enjoying _the Flyover_? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, [American Alternative Assets.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskU2P1DAMhn-Ne5sqtTcfPfSA1C0c2EVCCMSpyiZuJ5CPUZsZxL9HheE259f240fvt5f5xYYY8vpqEw91KbN1Ndx4FvqkT0gzNn5YmJGp4aFTxmg0WpvmPOil77Rx_NZTJ6Tyomevuo7IaH4jlE0YUCAJLbToJQndOum9dgaFlEyd6-FJsA-1bO2PEnI98xJ_lxtvrSupicO51ssO9A5wApxCXkprE2_B2Wxj5S3b41O771z3YwVwWjbm01qiP_0MFWgCVNeaZmfTxYY1A413xD3Yy3VzDDR--fA8ffz-6evz53uS2IdrAhr_UQCVt_WYPHyQ_h8uuXKuQOPr-5voAFXagwcapURlAFVk6x9Rmm3wl18hxrArDU9iTTbEv971YQt_AgAA___DP4ds)

|

## Twitter Rival Launches With 30 Million Signups
Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg's Threads, a new rival to Twitter, launched Wednesday and passed [30 million signups overnight](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFurDAQRb_GdEbe8cJA4eI1dPvalGjWHtaODEZ4sih_H5E6zW2udI50Ph7zg1JO2-s_rexkKTN5SW-eDWrUYGdogluYgW3D7tYPA8KAODTRLQtgAB_ILk87jhZMR5YN9TSEew_cJAcGrEGDZuyswdZ3IaAfwHQd25sf1d1wSFKO9rOkTSIv-bu8-Wh9WZvsoshelf2nYFIwnefZ-u3pr1PBdKEVTAav6RVMsZxaiv6qrFcWqlriwRSqpn3XtAV9RpKq11Rr2l5tlDU3hwv7mXJOtUd1N6-VUv6Vy58pfgIAAP__keNfFg), mainly because Threads is tied to sister platform Instagram. Everyone who signs up brings their Instagram followers with them. Twitter responded by [threatening to sue Meta](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FugzAQQL_G3oiOM8Zm8NCFLV07osM-wJWByJwS9e-rdO78nvT0vu7TnXLJx_pJOwdZzomi5CdP4BrXoJlQp7AwIxvNoe29d-id83oLaM08m9lS5K73lFKK5Ic2JgOu68nrHBDQgAMHgzXgbtGm5KJHsJZNGwfVAacsZ719n_mQjZfycz653uK56xI2kcelzIfCUeFIc2zNmygcZatM6WrklUW4NjsLNfm4hNZKb6E1XT8ADApHXUN6vHIp-eqd6mDdKZe_gvz7-xsAAP__XaBVpA) for poaching former Twitter employees to create a "copycat" application. Threads is already the biggest competitor Twitter has seen. Analysts have pointed out one downside: To delete your Threads account, you also have to delete your entire Instagram account.
## No Answers on White House Cocaine
The mystery of who left [cocaine at the White House](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L9uwyAQgPGnsTes8_kPZmDo4i1dO1oEjvgqAhaQWHn7Kp06dP4tn76vy3YxHDjePs2ddPVpM7bykzaQQgocNmyd9kRIQ0u6n5dF4iLl0u7aoQfTOzWC8-M8I5Acr2qegAYvlepb1gg4gAQJahpAdnZyTtoFYZpo6K1qRiDHNeXuO3GsO_nwSk_KnU33Nui91qM0w0eDa4PreZ5dvNpIZ3l7g-uRAle25Y07VxJ7ehRqcLXJGo4kfHpEJ_6YOE0Rjr2nTLGKkKypnKI4Mj05PUp4iUxHypWcKCLbaBQqmNus3XFyCFxm2YxwuxsOv5H132U_AQAA__8LGXA7) deepened Thursday, with the Secret Service saying the baggie was discovered at a West Wing entrance, not in a lobby area as previously reported. Biden administration officials fended off all questions, with one staffer [drawing derision](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyhCAUAL8GOxwOFbSgSGN3aVM6HDzkJRwYeaeXv89c6rS7zc5-XJerxYR5fbd3MBTKYh3hAYvQXHPZLbLxJgBI6BowFzWOWo5aj000QYXbZRj74P0UlNKh99D7fnqRoJRv0EghO6GFFtPQCd26wXvtRimGAbqLm1gvwCOVvf0smClCSD_lgL115d4kE4m2yro3Jmcm5_M821CeGc768kzOW0lI6CqTMzw32Knymw0hgednRAIey6MCx3yUL8wrj5Zc5NYR98WvwOMjE-zcFWcxA_9-QCUsudmN305MCavSrBfr3WL6S6J_B_0GAAD__35Ba30) for claiming discussion was banned by the Hatch Act, which prohibits government officials from conducting certain kinds of political business. The Secret Service is still awaiting results from forensic tests and reviewing visitor logs and security camera records. They expect to [conclude the investigation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu7CAQRb8Gd1jsYDx2QfEaun1tSovAeD0RhpUhdvL30aZOc5srHR2dt_ty95w4P_77nWxby-JD45MWhRIl6AW6aFciIN2RvY3ThDAhTt1m5yGE1Q_xfUA0CKOOM0Q965s262A0dGxBgVaoUM1GK-yDiRHDBMoY0rcwi0FR5FaO_qNwbhut6bucdPSh7F2yW2vPKvQ_AU6Au66rDzm_PgHuRRbgFL5mFOCeJXHjUAW4UILnTPLauJHcymclWSkc1GSl4-RAkvNJtfHDNy5ZgOMc6avf2p66w8bnxSlxHVEM6rF7Tr9C7c88PwEAAP__wFNmDA) by next week.
## Conservatives Push Little Film to Big Success
"Sound of Freedom," an independent film produced for $14 million, [shocked Hollywood](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFy6yAQAL9G6tAchxGooHiNO782pQbBYZ-DwCNhK_n7jFOn3JktdvbjMl88Zy7X_34l11KdfWj8ohmMMALVjH10iQhJ9eTkaK1Ba4ztb24CjXKclNVmSZGIAJckYzpJb0Gj6tkhoAIDBiatwAxBx2iCRdCalAxTdwKK3Oo23CuXdqOUv-uLtiHUtc_u1tpj79S_Ds8dno_jGAod-0H0-RY6PO_1WaJIG1Gsq1jIt11wieyLF_da6E1ho8hLJrHUL1FT4kAi1OdDSCslwthvLj4Ozpn30XQnuK6e829A-3PHTwAAAP__2eBiEQ) by beating the $290 million "Indiana Jones" sequel at the box office on July 4, partly due to a push by conservative groups. The independent movie is a [faith-based action thriller](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszz2OhCAUAODTQIfhR31YUGxjN9tuaZT3GJmgGEXNzOk32XpP8OX7eQyPMaa4Pr_HhVwJeRh9iRcNEgQIbQbN0QUiTYaTU621oC2A5bNTk2qxRSOlQjC-HqcmINgOqfbKQ8uj01IbCRJk1xgJlW8QwVstm4aM8h2rJWEsea9eOa5lppDe-aK98nnhyc2lbAczX0z3TPf3fVeF_Dydn0-10n0w3R_5XFHkIMJOhHkRJW9iyVckkVfxOtNb1Hx3uN0xpXi0wGr5XMaY_oTy7_c3AAD__78mV9M) about a federal agent who breaks up a child-trafficking ring. Both it and "Indiana Jones" earned close to $12 million at the box office, but "Freedom" also made at least another $2 million from a crowd-sourced ticketing platform. Disney, which produced "Indiana Jones," had rights to "Sound of Freedom" but refused to release it. Eventually, they let it go to Angel Studios, the current distributor.

clean_body: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg’s Threads, a new rival to Twitter, launched Wednesday and passed 30 million signups overnight, mainly because Threads is tied to sister platform Instagram. Everyone who signs up brings their Instagram followers with them. | | | | | | FRIDAY, JULY 7, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today marks the 95th anniversary of the first pre-sliced loaf of bread in history--it was sold in on July 7, 1928. Celebrate with a hot slice of buttered toast along with your morning Flyover! In today's edition, we're talking about the ongoing mystery of cocaine found in the West Wing, why pitchers can throw 100 mph strikes but can't make an easy toss to first base, and how to rent rooms deep in an abandoned slate mine. Have any suggestions? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Twitter Rival Launches With 30 Million Signups Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg's Threads, a new rival to Twitter, launched Wednesday and passed , mainly because Threads is tied to sister platform Instagram. Everyone who signs up brings their Instagram followers with them. Twitter responded by for poaching former Twitter employees to create a "copycat" application. Threads is already the biggest competitor Twitter has seen. Analysts have pointed out one downside: To delete your Threads account, you also have to delete your entire Instagram account. No Answers on White House Cocaine The mystery of who left deepened Thursday, with the Secret Service saying the baggie was discovered at a West Wing entrance, not in a lobby area as previously reported. Biden administration officials fended off all questions, with one staffer for claiming discussion was banned by the Hatch Act, which prohibits government officials from conducting certain kinds of political business. The Secret Service is still awaiting results from forensic tests and reviewing visitor logs and security camera records. They expect to by next week. Conservatives Push Little Film to Big Success "Sound of Freedom," an independent film produced for $14 million, by beating the $290 million "Indiana Jones" sequel at the box office on July 4, partly due to a push by conservative groups. The independent movie is a about a federal agent who breaks up a child-trafficking ring. Both it and "Indiana Jones" earned close to $12 million at the box office, but "Freedom" also made at least another $2 million from a crowd-sourced ticketing platform. Disney, which produced "Indiana Jones," had rights to "Sound of Freedom" but refused to release it. Eventually, they let it go to Angel Studios, the current distributor. I've spent my entire life as a proud American. America has been a great place to live, work, and raise a family. But right now, I'm deeply troubled at what I see happening to our nation--and what the future may hold for our children and grandchildren. | | Just take a look around ... | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1520f159-7e60-409d-8d82-cfa82516fae6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

|
---
Chuck Norris here... I've spent my entire life as a proud American. America has been a great place to live, work, and raise a family. But right now, I'm deeply troubled at what I see happening to our nation--and what the future may hold for our children and grandchildren.
---
| | **Just take a look around ...**
---
* We're **$31 Trillion** in debt
* Inflation is running **over 8%**
* A recession is on our doorstep
* And the people in charge keep spending our money.

---

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: The cold, hard truth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
>> MY STORY >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
The truth is; political campaign fundraising often disheartens me. I strongly support campaign finance reform because politics should be independent of the influence of large sums of money.
I want to spend my time addressing issues—fighting for healthcare, education, childcare, housing, jobs, livable wages and the environment—not hobnobbing with ultra-wealthy donors to solicit donations.
Too many people are struggling.
So, I'm in a predicament. I have trouble even letting someone else pick up the tab at dinner, but if I want to make a difference and help people, I need significant funds to fuel a successful campaign to create that change. So, I have to ask...
If you're able, will you please pitch in? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
With 40 years of public service experience, I'm running for Congress again because I know I can positively impact our beloved rural communities. Unfortunately, it takes a colossal amount of resources to make it happen.
, I came from very humble roots, a low-income, rural household on the other side of the tracks. I worked hard. I received support from government social mobility programs and pursued my dream as a social worker, family doctor, public health official, and diplomat.
I spent my whole life giving back and it's my life's mission to continue doing more in service to others. As a representative, I will facilitate effective and efficient government solutions to help everyone achieve their dreams.
But, I can't do it alone. I understand that it may seem early to ask for support, but the urgency of our situation cannot be overstated. Our second quarterly fundraising report will soon be made public, revealing a truth I am unashamed to share:
I couldn't be more grateful for the 1,100 contributors so far —it's truly an incredible achievement—but to stay competitive, and pay our bills, we do need to put up a more substantial number soon.
I need you.
if you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will process immediately.
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Despite an incredible number of donors so far—over 1,000 individuals—our average donation amount is significantly smaller than my opponent's, averaging around $35. It tells me the working middle class is behind this cause, but we have inevitably been outraised against dark money, ultrawealthy donors, and corporate PACs.
My campaign has the best chance of bringing Democratic representation to Northern Michigan and the UP. We have numerous advantages, such as strong name recognition on the ballot, grassroots support, and momentum from the previous election cycle.
>>> My opponent, MAGA GOP extremist Jack Bergman, had to spend an enormous sum of $1 million on falsehoods and attack ads to defeat me. If we remain united, preserve our resources, and never give up, we can compete even better in this cycle.
>>> In 2022, we needed more than redistricting. Had we run in the previously-drawn district, we would've moved the needle 5 - 7 more points! That signals momentum and repeated attempts at running for office will yield great results, but we must stick to the course.
>>> Our district's last viable second-time candidate jumped 14 points by running twice , so as long as I have enough supporters like you in my corner, I will not give up.
I want children from low-income households—like mine growing up—to have the opportunity to pursue the American dream, just as I did. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Whether you can contribute our average of $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] or anything from $3 to $300, every penny will significantly impact our effort.
Can I count on you, , to help me reach our shared goals?
With heartfelt gratitude,
v/r Dr. Bob
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Dr. Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

**I wanted you to see a few examples of how All On The Line and its affiliates make a difference.**
Last year, the Supreme Court heard arguments in _Allen v. Milligan_ , a case in which Alabama voters challenged the state’s congressional map for diluting the voting power of Black communities. Pundits predicted the Court’s ruling would dismantle key provisions of the Voting Rights Act. Instead, the Court reaffirmed the Voting Rights Act’s role as an important tool for making our democracy fairer.
Then, last week, the Supreme Court firmly rejected the fringe independent state legislature theory, a decision that protected the very foundations of our democracy. This momentous ruling strikes down the far-right attempt to undermine our cherished system of checks and balances, sending a resounding message that legislators are not shielded from accountability when they violate voters’ rights.
**On these two decisions, the Court got it right. These victories represent a powerful affirmation that our democracy is too important to be dismantled for one party’s political gain. Victories like these couldn’t happen without the work of Attorney General Eric Holder, All On The Line, its affiliates, and[** _most importantly_ , people like you.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66094283/415314498/1606310495?refcode=20230707_AOTL_P_POTUSJuly_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5OWYwODdmLWI1MWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gvlCo2BSlUIYgDQzuYh-xUbwIHG91fFZpFMu4p7Jp0M=)**
Even when the cynics said the cause was hopeless, we never wavered in our commitment to fight for fair maps, fair representation, and a strong democracy. That tenacity has fueled our grassroots efforts to help secure the fairest congressional map in a generation. And we’ve got to keep it going for the battles ahead.
[**All On The Line’s efforts have always been powered by grassroots activists like you. If you’re ready to do your part to strengthen democracy, then please, donate today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66094284/415314499/1606310495?refcode=20230707_AOTL_P_POTUSJuly_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5OWYwODdmLWI1MWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gvlCo2BSlUIYgDQzuYh-xUbwIHG91fFZpFMu4p7Jp0M=)

clean_body: | Team, I couldn’t be prouder to be a part of this grassroots movement. Our democracy is stronger because of the work Attorney General Eric Holder and our fair maps movement have done -- and we’re not slowing down. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = I wanted you to see a few examples of how All On The Line and its affiliates make a difference. Last year, the Supreme Court heard arguments in Allen v. Milligan , a case in which Alabama voters challenged the state’s congressional map for diluting the voting power of Black communities. Pundits predicted the Court’s ruling would dismantle key provisions of the Voting Rights Act. Instead, the Court reaffirmed the Voting Rights Act’s role as an important tool for making our democracy fairer. Then, last week, the Supreme Court firmly rejected the fringe independent state legislature theory, a decision that protected the very foundations of our democracy. This momentous ruling strikes down the far-right attempt to undermine our cherished system of checks and balances, sending a resounding message that legislators are not shielded from accountability when they violate voters’ rights. On these two decisions, the Court got it right. These victories represent a powerful affirmation that our democracy is too important to be dismantled for one party’s political gain. Victories like these couldn’t happen without the work of Attorney General Eric Holder, All On The Line, its affiliates, and= Even when the cynics said the cause was hopeless, we never wavered in our commitment to fight for fair maps, fair representation, and a strong democracy. That tenacity has fueled our grassroots efforts to help secure the fairest congressional map in a generation. And we’ve got to keep it going for the battles ahead. = = Team, preserving our democracy demands that we keep showing up to fight for it. We’ve seen what happens when we do. We say it’s All On The Line for a reason -- and I hope I can count on you to support our vital work. \-- President Barack Obama **All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. | | I am so thankful to all who volunteer their time and money to support our campaign. We are just getting started and our listening sessions are paying off. We also have several speaking events we will let you know about in the coming weeks.
Please connect with us on social and ask your colleagues and friends to do the same. We are not asking for your vote right now; rather, we would like to know 'What is keeping you up at night?' so that we can answer "How we can help you sleep better."
Some of my colleagues use to say "Well..let the Republicans in office so that the grown-ups can govern." I can now look at them and say I am the grown-up and a Blue Dog Democrat, a pragmatist, and measured.
We are also super excited my advisory team has grown, check us out: [Committee To Elect Stephen McDow](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011Kknavq3TWfwq2uMjgv8-hJ7uWA3T0dqtHVfnWZtctjpvv29GeggUPpAT2NkSjNOUrzuGRIc63R0aYdCdMUV5SBSSY39x0fX3Nh8ehCKk6jN-k8ydYj9mZCxBWgQZgS4NOQXgEe-mheBL7mgPf044ZhlX7Xk2wHGsDw5kPVR484=&c=idQZGl4nK7VlAmLhBHa_9_SxGUY2NoSF1X1Ag_IXdfFG9HGeEytcCg==&ch=Og3_g9nJJAMeG7QNhfcWmvD00TXsYTtBbclix4Dil7Fk-dQCVdIOuA==).
Best,
Stephen

name: American Update
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661724%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JhAapSTflnkxHsh%2bVaPfwA&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661735%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=36un6776lr1ef0pCpvgdqA&sysid=1).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661736%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NZbyT7Z%2b1TZFidvtPrUbfQ&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661737%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bQ5jYU2umOn1QSstptSAxQ&sysid=1) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can’t just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION --to DO SOMETHING about it, while there’s still time to save our country. **

That is why I’m writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of “We the People”--before it’s too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661738%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FWEsxuH9siD2OFSKxsjneA&sysid=1)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

clean_body: The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. | | | | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its . Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans? Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can’t just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION --to DO SOMETHING about it, while there’s still time to save our country. That is why I’m writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of “We the People”--before it’s too late. To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty? Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty! Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Kash Patel
subject: This should piss you off
body:
This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot.

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27388%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O9imzzxCCFEtAbP550aAAQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most dangerous time to be an America First patriot.

Why?

Because we are living under a two-tiered system of justice. Throw out all the stuff your civics teachers taught you in school. Currently, there are no fair trials when it comes to the government and its selective prosecution.

**_In a bombshell testimony from an IRS whistleblower, Hunter Biden sent WhatsApp messages demanding millions from a Chinese businessman_.** Hunter even went so far as to threaten the Chinese man that his father is sitting next to him and implied he would be angry unless paid.

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27388%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O9imzzxCCFEtAbP550aAAQ&sysid=1)
You may be shocked. But this is a two-tiered system of justice that allows Hunter to get away with a slap on the wrist.

None of this would be known unless it was for the brave whistleblowers who are coming forward to share this information.

Friend, **I founded the Kash Foundation to provide legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they bring forth credible information about waste, fraud, and abuse.** My goal is to reclaim our government from the gangsters who weaponize our system of justice against America First patriots.

**_Our mission is ramping up quickly as more and more whistleblowers are coming forward. I have an urgent goal to raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours to defend their brave actions_.**

[Can you donate $10, $35, $100, or any amount you can afford to help Kash Foundation serve government whistleblowers? Click here to donate >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27389%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wu11WIXsvSkev2JLtZXQQw&sysid=1)

[Donate](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27380%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mVobWCtPRk98I1rUdbsxiw&sysid=1)

Whistleblowers risk their lives to expose the government gangster corrupting the Department of Justice and so any other agencies and departments.

If you’re a whistleblower, you are giving up your career. You are risking the financial livelihood of your family to expose the corruption.

If you’re a whistleblower, you can be hit with charges from the Department of Justice. And even if you’re innocent, the process is the punishment! You will find yourselves paying thousands in legal fees.

Without whistleblowers:
* We wouldn’t know about Hunter’s WhatsApp message.

* We wouldn’t know about the corruption at the FBI.

* We wouldn’t know about the collusion happening between the FBI and IRS and the media to selectively suppress and leak information for political purposes.

Our nation is going through a crisis. We can give up and allow our justice system to be used against us. Or we can fight back. I’m not one for giving up. And I hope you can join me.

[Please donate $10 or more today to the Kash Foundation to help me raise $53,000 in the next 48 hours. Your support will help a whistleblower come forward to expose the corruption. Please select an amount below to donate today.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27381%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UiJmA7dxi%2fY%2fTAPkEWpgMA&sysid=1)

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee under Rep. Nunes and uncovered that the FBI illegally sabotaged a presidential race. The Deep State spied on me while I was conducting this investigation because I exposed their unlawful conduct.

I know what it’s like to be targeted by government gangsters.

I know how to fight back because I’ve successfully done this for the last several years exposing the Russiagate hoax.

Kash Patel

subject: George Santos + Donald Trump = birds of a feather
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan, Democratic candidate for Congress running against
George Santos.

Like Donald Trump, my opponent calls himself an “America-first
Republican.”

Both Santos and Trump claim the 2020 election was stolen -- despite not
having any evidence. 🤔

They’re both anti-choice, pro-gun, radical right-wing lunatics.

And now, they’re both under criminal indictment and are running for office
to avoid jail time.

We can’t let them win.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18989?t=1001&akid=3375%2E346206%2EaI7dUN ]Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Charles Booker -- to help
me DEFEAT George Santos and restore honesty and integrity to the U.S.
Congress?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18989?t=1002&akid=3375%2E346206%2EaI7dUN ][IMG]

Trump and Santos are birds of a feather. Let’s defeat them together.

Thanks for your support,

Anna Kaplan
