**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62926983:J3oHkoINj:m:1:3299561967:750954ADA66964752D84BB91E4074961:r)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: What we can do to undo the damage done by the right-wing takeover of our federal courts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66121043/415392801/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ15F_ENG_E_20230707_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDczMjJjYi1lNTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iFydJTEbN4i16k2MFiFsqfFqE9PRUfRT_Ky05zbJj64=&emci=914683c4-e51c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=207322cb-e51c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
We didn’t end up with a far-right, corporation-coddling Supreme Court by chance. Out-of-touch ideologues have been spending decades stacking all levels of the federal judiciary with allies. Billionaires have been treating Supreme Court justices to secret gifts and lavish trips. And the Republican Party as a whole has been focusing on capturing the courts to enact agenda items that wouldn’t stand a chance at the ballot box. That’s how they’ve ripped away the Constitutional right to an abortion, blocked student debt cancelation, shredded workers’ rights and voting rights, and made it easier to discriminate against LGBTQ+ people. They didn’t get it done overnight, and we can’t unwind it overnight either. They had a plan. They put it into place. But I’ve got a plan, too — a plan for us to fight back and correct course: **In the shorter-term:** President Biden has nominated (and our Democratic Senate has been confirming) a historically diverse slate of judicial nominees — including civil rights attorneys, legal aid lawyers, and public defenders. Getting more professional diversity on our courts is powerfully important, and something I’ve called for for a long time. I’ve also reintroduced my Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act, which would block off the special lanes of influence that powerful interests and billionaires have paved for themselves, ban federal judges from owning or trading individual stocks, and make Supreme Court Justices finally follow a basic code of ethics. **For the longer-term:** To rebalance a Supreme Court that’s been hijacked by extremists, we must expand it. I didn’t come to this conclusion lightly. But far-right justices keep substituting politics for the rule of law, and we must add more seats to rebalance this institution and restore its integrity. Additionally, we must fix the Electoral College so popular-vote losers like Donald Trump can’t stack the courts again. Remember: Five justices who ended the right to abortion were appointed by presidents who lost the popular vote. [_**Add your name if you agree with this plan: To undo the damage done by the right-wing takeover of our federal courts, we must continue to confirm more judges who respect the rule of law, root corruption out of the judiciary, and rebalance the Supreme Court by expanding it.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66121044/415392802/-1882585632?refcode=EMZ15F_ENG_E_20230707_V1S3&ms=EMZ15F_ENG_E_20230707_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDczMjJjYi1lNTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iFydJTEbN4i16k2MFiFsqfFqE9PRUfRT_Ky05zbJj64=&emci=914683c4-e51c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=207322cb-e51c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth P.S. clean_body: | | | We didn’t end up with a far-right, corporation-coddling Supreme Court by chance. Out-of-touch ideologues have been spending decades stacking all levels of the federal judiciary with allies. Billionaires have been treating Supreme Court justices to secret gifts and lavish trips. And the Republican Party as a whole has been focusing on capturing the courts to enact agenda items that wouldn’t stand a chance at the ballot box. That’s how they’ve ripped away the Constitutional right to an abortion, blocked student debt cancelation, shredded workers’ rights and voting rights, and made it easier to discriminate against LGBTQ+ people. They didn’t get it done overnight, and we can’t unwind it overnight either. They had a plan. They put it into place. But I’ve got a plan, too — a plan for us to fight back and correct course: In the shorter-term: President Biden has nominated (and our Democratic Senate has been confirming) a historically diverse slate of judicial nominees — including civil rights attorneys, legal aid lawyers, and public defenders. Getting more professional diversity on our courts is powerfully important, and something I’ve called for for a long time. I’ve also reintroduced my Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act, which would block off the special lanes of influence that powerful interests and billionaires have paved for themselves, ban federal judges from owning or trading individual stocks, and make Supreme Court Justices finally follow a basic code of ethics. For the longer-term: To rebalance a Supreme Court that’s been hijacked by extremists, we must expand it. I didn’t come to this conclusion lightly. But far-right justices keep substituting politics for the rule of law, and we must add more seats to rebalance this institution and restore its integrity. Additionally, we must fix the Electoral College so popular-vote losers like Donald Trump can’t stack the courts again. Remember: Five justices who ended the right to abortion were appointed by presidents who lost the popular vote. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth P.S. At the same time as we’re working to reform the judiciary, we can also keep fighting to undo the damage that extremists have done through our courts. President Biden is moving forward on another route to student debt cancelation, using crystal-clear legal authority under the Higher Education Act. And we can continue fighting back at the local level, by supporting statewide ballot initiative campaigns to protect abortion rights. I’m staying in the fight. | = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: Fighting for the Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWdbkRZDN8

Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas
everywhere are joining him.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWdbkRZDN8

Hi,
Friend,

Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America.
His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our
streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are
respected and protected; and where the American people are
sovereign in their own nation once again.

Our
Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden.

Parents have a special stake in this fight. We're not just
fighting to secure our future - we're fighting to secure a future
for our children.

That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three
young children at home - ages six, five, and three. We're the
first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's
Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting
for them - for all American children -- and fighting to make sure
that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given
potential in the greatest country in the world.

In
2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies
emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a
direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families.

During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1
million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the
Governor.

It
was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of
Florida...and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!

The
parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every
community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to
be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the
rights of parents.

As
the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when
parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and
win.

We
beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into
gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage,
too.

Friend, will you join our historic movement of mamas today or
send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would
be interested in joining?

Together, we will fight for our children.

We
will defeat Joe Biden.

We
will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback.

And
we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In
Freedom,

Casey DeSantis

First Lady of Florida

Join Mamas for DeSantis Today!

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: GOP Presidential
subject: How should we elect the President?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs4nlh5r19b72ip9jrmfrtqol41k97r3n3174ve0_rp22sh2s8i66o70stgm9oj4cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8dpll0i8tq61a542iq7l6qvj3frl9vvalqs0jr0_rp22sh2s8i66o70stgm9oj4cth2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5t3822sdk02pp4gpsq4mj6v00o9iv8dodb6r80g_rp22sh2s8i66o70stgm9oj4cth2bs) [NO](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrqg8b6utvpo289ai306lpen2rdf22uotkhja860_rp22sh2s8i66o70stgm9oj4cth2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqtanfdtkhulvn88ret9u5h7ha2qtol91pf0ebfg_rp22sh2s8i66o70stgm9oj4cth2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

GOP Presidential
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoo22t8dfrgrdjjkask0d7s2v12t3pnbn36srup8_rp22sh2s8i66o70stgm9oj4cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshi6coj7chim49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh0g0tmjvjdt1efrctagliptqdmo48jbs5u5frfo_rp22sh2s8i66o70stgm9oj4cth2bs)_

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh85bio2c1sne7smb6pr1qqnt1u7g2rukd6075d8_rp22sh2s8i66o70stgm9oj4cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: =?UTF-8?B?SmFtZXMgT+KAmUtlZWZl?=
subject: This new lawsuit could crush me
body:
Hi, I'm James O'Keefe. You may not know me, but you've seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Internet. | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62927197:6D3F6oIgN:m:1:3299561967:139FCCB8F3409A7C47F3D8DF1B7DCEA2:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62927197:6D3F6oIgN:m:1:3299561967:139FCCB8F3409A7C47F3D8DF1B7DCEA2:r) Dear Patriot,

[**A new lawsuit could crush my investigative reporting at this crucial time for our country. Please help me beat this in court with your critical gift now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62927197:6D3F6oIgN:m:1:3299561967:139FCCB8F3409A7C47F3D8DF1B7DCEA2:r)

Hi, I'm James O'Keefe. You may not know me, but you've seen my breaking stories many times on cable TV and on the Internet.

If you tuned in to the late, great Rush Limbaugh's show five years ago, you heard him say I was "an intrepid 'guerrila journalist' "whose undercover reporting has shown the light of truth on leftist organizations' slimy secrets."

I can't tell you how exciting and encouraging it was hear my hero say that to me!

**Rush and I talked about how important it was to expose the bad guys ... to bypass the lies and spin of the liberal media ... and get the truth to the American people.**

And we talked about the steep price I paid to do that - the attacks, smears, and lawsuits.

Well, the lawsuits haven't stopped.

In fact, a new lawsuit has been filed against me by people I used to work with - people I wish only the best for.

**Let me tell you, this new lawsuit is dangerous, and it could crush my investigative reporting.**

The people who filed it don't just want to beat me by a touchdown ... they aim to smash me flat, and send me off the field on a stretcher.

**I don 't know why they're doing it ... but they're playing for keeps.**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62927197:6D3F6oIgN:m:1:3299561967:139FCCB8F3409A7C47F3D8DF1B7DCEA2:r)** that will quickly pile up.

Fighting this lawsuit will be time consuming and extremely expensive. It may cost $500,000 or more.

But I remember what Rush told me in that interview:

**" You're being attacked precisely because it's important enough to them to silence you. You're being attacked because you're effective, and I hope you continue it."**

[**Will you help me defend myself in court and keep getting the truth to our fellow Americans with your critically important gift right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62927197:6D3F6oIgN:m:1:3299561967:139FCCB8F3409A7C47F3D8DF1B7DCEA2:r)

I hope your answer is an enthusiastic YES!

I can't do it without you.

Thank you so much!

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

**P.S. this new lawsuit could not only silence me, it could smash me flat.[Please help me defend myself in court with your crucial gift right away.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62927197:6D3F6oIgN:m:1:3299561967:139FCCB8F3409A7C47F3D8DF1B7DCEA2:r) **Thank you!
---

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: [WATCH] We just launched our ads! 📺🎶
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230707_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230707_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Hi Peter, it’s Sen. Heidi Campbell here with big news:
We just launched our TV ads! 🥳
We’re working hard to make sure that neighbors in every corner of this city can learn about how I plan to get Nashville back in tune! Check out this clip we pulled from one of our ads:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230707_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230707_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
I’m running in the most competitive race in Nashville, and it’s going to be a close one. That’s why it’s so critical we get our message in front of as many people as possible.
Peter, we want to run our TV ads as long as possible so that Music City voters can learn about my campaign before the election next month. We need your help to keep them on the air – can you chip in $15, $35, or any amount today to keep them up? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230707_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
KEEP OUR ADS UP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230707_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
It’s crucial that we keep our hopeful message on the air so Nashville knows there's a candidate who has a positive path forward for our city.
With your grassroots support, our ads will continue to reach folks across Nashville and have our city running like a band in perfect sync.
Peter, even just $20 goes a long way toward spreading our message across Music City. Will you contribute $20 or whatever you’re able today to keep running our TV ads and give us the best shot at winning next month? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230707_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
CONTRIBUTE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230707_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230707_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230707_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230707_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
www.voteheidicampbell.com [http://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

name: American Energy Security
subject: Democrats are coming for your gas stoves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doug Burgum for America
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsWmbgZDNO

Make your voice heard today

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osWmbgZDNO

Friend, the Washington media and Biden have consistently
misled Americans about their plan to ban gas stoves for months.

Democrats in California and New York are passing policies
which could lead to a ban on gas stoves in new construction
sites. These policies would add more red tape and further raise
the cost of American energy.

PROTECT GAS STOVES »

As you read this email, politicians are moving to impose
costly regulations to ban you from buying a gas stove and worsen
the American Energy Crisis.

To get our economy really rolling we've got to make sure
we've got an energy policy that's 180 degrees different from the
one we have under the Biden administration and in Democrat-run
states.

We need your voice to help push back on this anti-energy
policy.

Please stand with us by signing our petition to protect
Gas Stoves today, and demand an end to red tape on American
energy. >>

Paid for by Doug Burgum for America
Doug Burgum for America

Fargo, North Dakota 58103

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661877%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8QfYGghAxe0LUrWGs%2bsrog&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661878%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fDMc6MqND2l73QyS75JN9w&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to \- is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661879%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dT0WZ4719771SB6as0uheQ&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661870%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JsOBqPsfd4xqIGUp345UTw&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661871%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kBzlDryiKhq3WmF%2f8Q4bCg&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661872%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bwWaTNQ%2bADpEuvvaB3AmWA&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661873%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7SoGTT1IyWfZKOhLqy4h0w&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661874%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fLEsTmJz%2b3nQ7r32aHuL4Q&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661885%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CNMK3GHDqVfc1jxetmMp9g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661886%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B8PJS5VRsxu4gf%2fNZAtPsA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661887%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1hADyDV1BuSrQHt8eHYx2Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661888%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0OjJZL8RCllBzYzvNr6wfw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661889%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4geH%2fqHUq7La2pwuB3NlCg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661880%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q4CE3wpi1vZDiguivqm6bA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661881%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R5%2bmUsoLzGu3Gtu2EBiqIA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661882%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Jb2a0IkzxJ7AAWds8R6uyw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661883%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bGGZKkQRRteGFW31E0PeSA&sysid=1)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661884%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eSPZUM3Ql50pkW%2fJjuH0EA&sysid=1)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Letitia James
subject: I'm asking for $7
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66107841/415351773/-1997846888?refcode=jtk1112-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjJkYTI1NC1jZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRndYCgqBpMeeCOEafgINS52t5mPJhUty-yEGIKjkQ0=)
---
$7.

I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my _entire_ fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. [**That's why I'm going to ask you to donate $7 to my campaign today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66107842/415351781/-2022127741?&amounts=7,15,25,50,100,500&amount=7&refcode=jtk1112-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjJkYTI1NC1jZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRndYCgqBpMeeCOEafgINS52t5mPJhUty-yEGIKjkQ0=) – but first I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important.
Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless.

**But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work.**
And throughout my time in office, I have been able to secure _real_ wins for everyday, working families. From holding Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic to going toe-to-toe with far-right attorneys general around the nation, I have made it clear that New York is _not_ up for sale.
As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. But, thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – but as we head into the next half of 2023, I _must_ keep that momentum going.
**[That's why I'm asking you to invest just $7 for the first seven days of the seventh month of the year to help me continue my fight for progress. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66107844/415351789/-2022127741?&amounts=7,15,25,50,100,500&amount=7&refcode=jtk1112-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjJkYTI1NC1jZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRndYCgqBpMeeCOEafgINS52t5mPJhUty-yEGIKjkQ0=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66107849/415351805/-2022127741?amounts=7,15,25,50,100,500&amount=7&refcode=jtk1112-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjJkYTI1NC1jZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRndYCgqBpMeeCOEafgINS52t5mPJhUty-yEGIKjkQ0=)

name: Pat Fallon
subject: 🚨CONSERVATIVE ALERT: Democrats' New 2024 Rallying Cry
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FALLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

The Supreme Court just put an end to Joe Biden's illegal and
unconstitutional student loan forgiveness scheme.

Unfortunately, the Court's decision to uphold the Constitution
and separation of powers, and keep the president's power in
check, has awoken the woke, radical left!

The Democrats are already raising millions of dollars off of
this news and they think the promise of a handout to millions of
Americans will propel them to a House majority in 2024.

WE MUST STOP THEM!

My fellow House conservatives and I are going to fight to stop
Biden's unconstitutional power grabs and defend Congress' power
to legislate without the Biden administration's interference.

This is a FIGHT FOR OUR CONSTITUTION AND OUR REPUBLIC!

The radical, woke Democrats are going to throw everything
they've got at us to win in 2024, and I need you to stand up in
this fight with me to save the soul of America!

Please make a contribution today to help me FIGHT against the
Radical Left's fundraising machine. We can't let them succeed!

Thank you and God bless!

Pat Fallon

Conservative Congressman TX-04

PAID FOR BY FALLON FOR CONGRESS

WE MUST STOP THEM! My fellow House conservatives and I are going to fight to stop Biden's unconstitutional power grabs and defend Congress' power to legislate without the Biden administration's interference. This is a FIGHT FOR OUR CONSTITUTION AND OUR REPUBLIC! The radical, woke Democrats are going to throw everything they've got at us to win in 2024, and I need you to stand up in this fight with me to save the soul of America! Please make a contribution today to help me FIGHT against the Radical Left's fundraising machine. We can't let them succeed! Thank you and God bless! Pat Fallon Conservative Congressman TX-04 PAID FOR BY FALLON FOR CONGRESS This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 20, 2022. name: Ruben and Sydney Gallego
subject: Please welcome Baby Isla Gallego
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Picture enclosed
#

Peter -
Please join us in welcoming baby Isla Gallego to the world! She was born late at night on July 3rd. Mom and baby are happy and healthy, and we all thank you for your love and support.
Isla has already taken on an important role on the Gallego for Arizona campaign as the founder of “Babies for Gallego,” and she welcomes new friends to join today!
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230707-1-15&t=1&akid=795%2E734936%2E_dT_zy)
Thank you,
Ruben and Sydney Gallego

👶🏻 Before you go... 🍼

Ruben is going to be taking a little bit of time away from the campaign trail to experience this moment with his growing family.

That means no time for fundraising. So he is hoping you'll help him make up the difference by making a contribution of $3, or whatever you can afford, to help us keep up with our fundraising goals and WIN this campaign.

[**Please make a contribution today. It all adds up when we're all chipping in and will give Ruben some peace of mind his campaign is in good hands.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230707-1-15&t=2&akid=795%2E734936%2E_dT_zy)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Laura=20Jones=20for=20Congress?=
subject: flipping Texas blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Jones for Congress
body:
electing me to Congress could mean beating Ted Cruz and winning the Electoral College. | | | | | [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=ed11349d89&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
# The Battle to Flip Texas Blue.

My name is Laura Jones and I am officially running for Congress in Texas’s 8th District.

As a mom, a business owner, and a born-and-raised Texan, I know that real representation starts with having a voice from one of us, not a career politician.

My campaign and winning a seat in the United States Congress will be instrumental in achieving better representation for our communities and flipping Texas BLUE.

[**In a moment, I’m going to explain why running is so important to me, but if you’re ready to flip Texas blue and win for the 8th district, chip in today!** ](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=4dcb1f8014&e=a2a46ff12c)
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=408a8d76b5&e=a2a46ff12c)
**Some things you may not know about me:**

I served as the Chair for the San Jacinto County Democrats and Field Director for Texas Senate District 3 under the Texas Democratic Party's Non-Urban Rural Caucus.

I was born and raised in Houston, Texas, where my Husband and I raised our 6 children and operated a successful business.

I fell in love with the peace and tranquility of rural Texas. So a few years ago, my husband and I built a home with our two youngest children here.

However, I immediately noticed the lack of proper representation. As Field Director, I traveled around East Texas talking to residents, and I heard many times that they felt as if their voices were not heard. Many issues have gone unresolved for decades, and we now face real challenges with our healthcare, public education, the climate crisis, and job security in many rural Texas communities.

As a tax-paying resident and mother of children attending a rural community's local schools, I could not just sit back and allow things to decline. And so I am running to be a part of the change that we desperately need in our community.

I am ready to be one of us for all of us.

[**If you’re ready to be a part of our campaign and see that we have the momentum needed to flip Texas, please chip in today. It would mean the world to me.**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=004f6506c8&e=a2a46ff12c)
*If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
| [Chip in $25](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=814b578c09&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
| [Chip in $50](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=724be31ac2&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
| [Chip in $150](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=a8a9851c0a&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
| [Chip in $500](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=0c5693dfd4&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
| [Choose Amount](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=4454581fc9&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
Thank you so much. I am looking forward to updating you in the coming days and to get going with you by my side.

\- Laura
|
---
| | | _Paid for by Laura Jones for Congress
P.O. Box 742
Coldspring, TX 77331_

You can [update your preferences](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=869a96a314&e=a2a46ff12c&c=348e32f5ce) or [unsubscribe](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=869a96a314&e=a2a46ff12c&c=348e32f5ce)

Many issues have gone unresolved for decades, and we now face real challenges with our healthcare, public education, the climate crisis, and job security in many rural Texas communities. As a tax-paying resident and mother of children attending a rural community's local schools, I could not just sit back and allow things to decline. And so I am running to be a part of the change that we desperately need in our community. I am ready to be one of us for all of us. *If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | Thank you so much. I am looking forward to updating you in the coming days and to get going with you by my side. \- Laura | | | | Paid for by Laura Jones for Congress P.O. Box 742 Coldspring, TX 77331 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or |

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Fellow Conservative,

Tim Sheehy is a true patriot Montana needs serving them in Washington, and I am glad he's running to flip this Senate seat.

As a decorated combat Veteran, Navy SEAL, and business leader, Tim has the moral courage and experience we need to take the Democrats head-on and end their Senate Majority.

Tim's a good friend, and when he sets out to accomplish a mission nothing will stand in his way.

But the Democrats won't make this an easy fight. Every Democrat megadonor and activist is laser-focused on Montana because they know this race could determine who controls the Senate.

| | Hey Peter, it’s Angela. I need some advice. I’m meeting with my ENTIRE staff to go over our overall campaign strategy, some important financial decisions, and a few other odds and ends. **And with you being one of our earliest online, grassroots supporters, I don’t want to walk into that meeting without hearing from you first, Peter.** **[So please, will you take part in our exclusive, supporters-only Campaign Focus Group by clicking here and answering a few important questions? I promise it won’t take more than a minute, but your answers will be invaluable to our campaign’s strategy moving forward.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230707_EN_FocusGroup_A0_na_U2_X2_M1?t=7&akid=238%2E52803%2EGOQ0QB)** | | | [Campaign Focus Group →](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230707_EN_FocusGroup_A0_na_U2_X2_M1?t=8&akid=238%2E52803%2EGOQ0QB)
---
I’m running for U.S. Senate to represent you, your family, and your loved ones in Washington, Peter. I want to ensure your voices are heard at the highest level of public office.
**That’s why I won’t make any decision that could impact the future of this campaign without hearing from you first.** _Which issues are most important to you? How could I best serve your interests in Washington? And what motivates you to actually get out and vote?_
These questions—and your answers—will shape the future of this campaign moving forward. **But only if you’re willing to help me out by taking part in our exclusive, supporters-only Campaign Focus Group before I walk into my staff meeting.**
**[So, will you click here to answer a few short (_yet important!_) questions? It’s time Marylanders had their voices heard—and I want to hear from you today, Peter.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_230707_EN_FocusGroup_A0_na_U2_X2_M1?t=9&akid=238%2E52803%2EGOQ0QB)**

Thanks for the help,
Angela Alsobrooks

subject: George Santos is an embarrassment to our district, country, and the entire U.S. Congress. We need to defeat him once and for all.
body:
this is wild...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a9041d4-848d-4860-b9a0-e657058c27c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65514f55-7ce1-4198-9544-5aa1064ca132/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
Kevin McCarthy says George Santos ‘shouldn’t run for re-election’ Peter, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy went on tv yesterday morning for an interview with Fox & Friends. When asked if he was supporting George Santos’ re-election campaign, McCarthy laughed and said Santos “should not” run for re-election. In the same breath, McCarthy proudly announced that the GOP would hold onto New York’s 3rd Congressional District with another Republican candidate. But despite McCarthy’s calls for him not to run for re-election, George Santos has defiantly tweeted that he is still pressing ahead: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T409bce2c-9788-41f5-bfbf-830d809169a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Santos’ stubborn refusal to resign means we need to fight harder to defeat him. That’s why we’re supporting Anna Kaplan, a Democratic NY Senator with a track record of flipping seats from red to blue. [Will you pitch in $25 or more – spit with Blue Amp Action – to help Anna Kaplan send George Santos into political retirement?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teb348d0a-46e2-4169-8f4f-de5b11adfdcb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T23b67be9-2a05-44a2-a350-a4706a08bb10/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) George Santos is an embarrassment to our district, country, and the entire U.S. Congress. We need to defeat him once and for all. Thanks for your help, Team Anna Kaplan for New York P.S. You can learn more about Anna Kaplan’s story by watching her campaign launch ad by [clicking here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd7ea7dd-69bb-41e1-b64e-0ec0f4d28b25/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40b6d6d6-5fe0-4d43-a4e2-fd247a82a3e3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)or on the thumbnail below: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf31f85f7-c6c8-44e4-aff0-4212fa2acf1d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c19bfac-e963-4d1d-99f9-4a19e685dd34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: We have a primary challenger

subject: Can You Send Me Your Address, Urgent
body:
This is NOT a drill, America. This is Christopher Coyne from Lear Capital, and we're in a crucial phase.
This is NOT a drill, America. This is Christopher Coyne from Lear Capital, and we're in a crucial phase.

Dear Friend,
This is NOT a drill, America. This is **Christopher Coyne** from Lear Capital, and we're in a **crucial phase**.
You've heard our warnings, our urgent calls to action.
The financial hurricane we feared? It's not looming on the horizon any longer - **it 's HERE, ripping through the fabric of our economy.**
We're talking about a **significant challenge** threatening **our hard-earned wealth!**
We saw this coming, and so we prepared our [**2023 Wealth Survival Guide**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdqkec0id9g2nssrf8lfgb5dh7tcden1ai6t3tkg_rp22sh2s8i66o70stim2or2c5h2bs). This wasn't a contingency - it was a **grim necessity**. This guide isn't available for sale anywhere - Amazon, eBay, you name it, they don't have it. Why? Because this isn't about profit - it's about **RESPONSIBILITY**.
We're on a mission, folks. A **mission** to arm every true American with this guide - for **FREE**. Every single American deserves to know how to **defend their financial stability.**

**Here 's where YOU come in:** We've got a **FREE copy** of our 2023 Wealth Survival Guide reserved under your name. It's **locked, loaded,** and waiting for your go-signal.
[**CLICK HERE TO SECURE YOUR FREE GUIDE**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqsh8creqlhji1npc0u26pu6c2reds38lvvg1ct8_rp22sh2s8i66o70stim2or2c5h2bs)
Share your contact info, and this critical survival manual will be **rushing to your doorstep** within a week or two.
Stay strong, stay vigilant,
Christopher Coyne

**P.S.** If you're thinking of ignoring this, I urge you to reconsider. We'll clear your reserved copy and pass this one-shot opportunity to another American. But let me warn you - once you see the **essential** info inside this guide, you'll realize why we're sounding the alarm.
[**ACT NOW -** YOUR FINANCIAL FUTURE DEPENDS ON IT >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmr4adqk3h5hln23t5r4khru33jrqcsr4h0sv26o_rp22sh2s8i66o70stim2or2c5h2bs)

name: Colin Allred for U.S. Senate
subject: the fight of Ted Cruz’s life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend: This race is bigger than defeating Ted Cruz. Our Democratic Senate majority and the White House are on the line in 2024.
The future of our democracy and so many of our fundamental rights, from voting to reproductive freedom, depend on Democrats winning. Unfortunately, the 2024 Senate map strongly favors Republicans.
But here's the thing: Experts at CNN and FiveThirtyEight are calling Texas our BEST pickup opportunity – and if we can flip this seat, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend the Senate!
Please, split a donation of $15 or more between my campaign and Serve America before our midnight deadline to help Colin Allred beat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority! → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Our chances have never looked better to flip Texas: This team raised more in our first 24 hours than Ted Cruz raised in the first three months of the year, causing Inside Elections to update their official Texas ranking from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground." People are calling this the political fight of Ted Cruz's life.
That’s why Mitch McConnell, GOP mega donors and shady special interests are going to spend whatever it takes to save Ted Cruz and defeat Colin.
But we've got to keep up our momentum, friend, and that's where you come in. We have an ambitious $150,000 daily fundraising goal because in a battleground race, money could be the difference between winning and losing. Right now, we're falling short, and we're counting on you to help close the gap.
Please, will you split a donation of $15 or more between our campaign and Serve America to help us defeat Ted Cruz? Every dollar matters in our fight to flip Texas blue and protect the Senate – and the future of our democracy – from Cruz and his allies → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you for being a critical part of this grassroots team.
Team Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]

Peter, I thought I should take a moment to address some of the most frequently asked questions I get about HER Time:
1. **Why do you send so many emails?**
These emails are the primary way HER Time raises money to support all the work we do. Whether that’s advocating for our issues (like passing the _SHIELD Act_)_,_ protecting abortion, or boosting women candidates, like Lauren Underwood or Angie Craig. They’re also the most direct way for our team to send critical updates to our supporters — like you!
2. **Does my $3 really make a difference?**
Yes! $3 may seem insignificant, but it speaks to the power of a grassroots team. When you multiply $3 or $5 or $10 over and over by everyone reading these emails, the impact can be _huge_. But grassroots power only works if everyone plays their part.
3. **Do you expect me to donate every time we reach out?**
_Of course not!_ But we do hope you open our emails and give them a read, because they have the most up-to-date information about our work, and your engagement helps us out.

While we don’t expect you to donate to every email, I hope you’ll consider donating to this one. [_**What do you say, Peter? Have I answered your questions? disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I wanted to reach out quickly because Tuesday is a very special day – it's my wife Britainy's birthday Hey Peter,

I wanted to reach out quickly because Tuesday is a very special day – it's my wife Britainy's birthday!

Britainy is the most amazing mother, partner, and my best friend. She always puts our family first – from being front row at every baseball game and horse show for our children to supporting me on the campaign trail. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66114328/415367485/1994120235?ms=em23_230707_britbd_ecrd_gq_act___AB_ettx&refcode=em23_230707_britbd_ecrd_gq_act___AB_ettx&source=em23_230707_britbd_ecrd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230707_britbd_ecrd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=yGlsPBQKuzfZnsjn0SNWjylzP5BIXHg5+tD/gVQOFCOgyvXeKdZTqkRv0eRD2xFJ6AarTyS6L5STg8W+yN4Rf7WomNunfQR4T6xMzrpFl76GyND7OEk/Cav0ON06+5zvUYfVDIFMXZF8g9sypK8yI2uoZEXMojRQQF+o6g/x6runzpC23Kn6FvaFAlYsOWTC&refcode2=f3427c03-d71c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzQyN2MwMy1kNzFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2UM_Azp3mfb9a5m4zdUzofZe3N4tTYTwsPJB8GRJ1EA=&emci=d44e44ec-741b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=f3427c03-d71c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1437603)

"SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY"** | Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS 704C EAST 13TH ST SUITE 260 WHITEFISH, MT 59937 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66115154/415370014/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1249-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjNTM1OWI4LWQ3MWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yqvOdSs7J6za25AjkzDhJ2vfTvxHIUjHaY4JPanPAW8=)

Here’s the situation, Peter.
**The ONLY way to ensure the future of our democracy – and ALL of our rights – is to power real transformation in EVERY state.** That’s why Emerge is doubling down on our work in the South to empower bold Democratic women to run for office and win!
Emerge is launching our**2023 Southern Regional Boot Camp** next month to equip community-driven champions with the tools and training they need to get on the ballot, build people-powered campaigns, and defeat GOP extremists at every level. **But right now, we’re falling short of what we need to raise by midnight, and we need your help to keep our programs going and power real change that will last! **
**[Please: Will you donate $5 or more to Emerge now to empower Democratic women to run for office and flip seats from red to blue in EVERY state?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66115155/415370016/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1249-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjNTM1OWI4LWQ3MWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yqvOdSs7J6za25AjkzDhJ2vfTvxHIUjHaY4JPanPAW8=)**

Our communities in the South are on the front lines of the fight for abortion access, voting rights, and fair representation at every level of our government. They’re fighting back against wave after wave of regressive laws, discriminatory policies, and gerrymandered maps that stack political power on the side of GOP extremists.
**But despite the odds, Southern communities keep speaking out and continue to fight for policies that uphold our rights and put people first. We MUST be part of this fight. **
With hundreds of Emerge alums in office across the South right now, we know our recruitment and training programs are working. But even more than flipping seats, we’re building new majorities in local and state governments to transform politics for the long haul. **That means we need your help now to grow our ranks of bold Democratic women in 2023 and beyond! **
**[Will you donate $5 or more to Emerge right now – before our next big deadline at midnight – to help recruit, train, and empower Democratic women to run for office and flip states blue?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66115157/415370018/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1249-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjNTM1OWI4LWQ3MWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yqvOdSs7J6za25AjkzDhJ2vfTvxHIUjHaY4JPanPAW8=)**

We're exactly four months away from Election Day in Virginia.

Glenn Youngkin is hoping that day allows his party to take both chambers of the Virginia legislature and enact a far-right agenda to fuel his national ambitions. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66116203/415374000/713551767?refcode=EM_FR_230707VA_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_B_P1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzZlOWNjZi1kOTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwgOKX6F6sD2964AX0Gi_4ycOS-vWnygORGLrC_wCI8=) But it’s also a day that could see Democrats take back the House of Delegates and send a powerful message that abortion bans, attacks on teachers, and pro-gun lobby policies have no place in the Commonwealth.

**It’s all going to come down to which side has the resources to turn out its voters.**

**[I’m going to spend these next four months fighting hard for Democrats in competitive State Senate and State Delegate races — and I could use your help. Can you pitch in $4 (more right!) so that I can continue to reach folks where they are and talk to them about the stakes of this November’s elections?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66116213/415374006/713551767?refcode=EM_FR_230707VA_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_B_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzZlOWNjZi1kOTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwgOKX6F6sD2964AX0Gi_4ycOS-vWnygORGLrC_wCI8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$4 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66116216/415374015/713551767?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_230707VA_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_B_EB4&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzZlOWNjZi1kOTFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwgOKX6F6sD2964AX0Gi_4ycOS-vWnygORGLrC_wCI8=)**

body:

My book, _Superpower in Peril: A Battle Plan to Renew America_ , is about what we should do next to begin renewing our country. My book outlines the steps to make this plan a reality, including educating our people, confronting China, and securing America.

name: Dave
subject: Biden's focused. Are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Rising PAC
body:
I know this is going to sound crazy, but please just hear me out.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I know this is going to sound crazy, but please just hear me out.
Biden is _**FOCUSED**_.
That's right. Biden's eyes are on the prize. He's deadset on winning **Pennsylvania, the biggest swing state in the country** in 2024! Just last month, he held his FIRST campaign event in Pennsylvania. **The truth is, if Biden wins Pennsylvania, he will almost certainly win a second term as president! **
---
| | | [FLIP PENNSYLVANIA RED!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo0bes2dcv68ctqn81hs43fehd1p1ml3n38lqdpo_rp22sh2s8i66o70stim1oj2clh2bs "FLIP PENNSYLVANIA RED!")
---
**I can 't stress this enough, Friend; we _CANNOT_ let Democrats continue to outspend, outwork, and outraise us in Pennsylvania! The consequences will be irreversible for our whole country.**
Biden's leading the charge to ensure Pennsylvania turns **BLUE** __for good!__ But I'm fighting to stop him and the whole Democrat agenda, Friend.

Look, **Pennsylvania is my home.** Democrats in charge have only followed President Biden's lead, and it's taking us down a dangerous path. I want to do my part to renew Pennsylvania and elect conservative leaders. If you agree, I'm hoping you'll chip in a dollar or more to help me fight back against Biden's push to hold Pennsylvania!

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Last Friday’s decisions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends -
I wanted to take a moment to address last Friday’s Supreme Court decisions.
If you are unaware, last week the Supreme Court chose to strike down President Biden’s Student Loan Forgiveness Plan and rolled back long standing protections against discrimination for Americans, particularly the LGBTQ+ community.
Friends, like many other people around this country, I am outraged.
We knew that this extremist Supreme Court wouldn't stop at abortion. That they would keep attacking our freedoms and this past week has shown us just that.
The right-wing majority on the Supreme Court has made it clear that they will put their political agenda first.
But our fight is not over. We have to persist to ensure equality and opportunity for all — and it starts with electing leaders that will fight for the people and justice.
Together, we can do just that. We can elect changemaking candidates that are in the fight to protect Americans, not special interests, up and down the ballot across the country. Because every single race and seat will put us one step closer to protecting and restoring our democratic freedoms.
[**So if you can, please make a contribution to The Long Run today and help us support and fund candidates that will fight for change.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jul23.p2zS7g&refcode=em230707-1-t1&t=1&akid=4624%2E196590%2Eqc9mb_)
Onwards,
Mandela
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jul23.p2zS7g&refcode=em230707-1-t1&t=2&akid=4624%2E196590%2Eqc9mb_)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4624%2E196590%2Eqc9mb_). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=4624%2E196590%2Eqc9mb_)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=4624_196590_qc9mb_&akid=4624%2E196590%2Eqc9mb_)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=4624%2E196590%2Eqc9mb_)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: Millions of moms mobilize
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27336%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yZjVb51SLsMG%2fz9wAdCD6w&sysid=1)
---
Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We’re not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we’re fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That’s why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We’re the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor’s Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida’s families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas’ army kicks into gear across the country, we’ll beat them on the national stage, too. **Friend****,[will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27337%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oECp2eW%2fMdwL4zW61wT25w&sysid=1 "will you join our historic
movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,

clean_body: Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him. | | | | | | | | | | Hi, Friend, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. We’re not just fighting to secure our future -- we’re fighting to secure a future for our children. That’s why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We’re the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor’s Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida’s families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...and now, we're taking our mamas movement national! body:
This campaign is around the principle that our donors are a part of this team.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=240d00e11759411fada5cf70d575e080&_e=bGmKMoB85Bxsns_JGOpoNwth8Iq1fUdnl_HYNCow_NK02fQssGRODehBRDZdrlAP0U41mSbnVCEh-Uq7frcH2OcbHTussmqrg_oGuGqMk0lFU_xRBGAytOSg4TRag949Dm9tuQbvNEQz0un8N3Z_fpU3eRJgcGFvmeVcgcbZxjdjs1cmp3rG5PzUvpqMttRj6-eCZzU85bBcSAANsQSoJNTAJMReTW8f8ZbmkNqbZv2G4ptAl1iJMjTcCpHupprXVyYWWrb5GCDaV_LucdfcYcf1D5PyvxSQSg-Qfb-BKmZeKn7bo06OgqAwdfntK2DrRPRABriajhp_HM6uEf3a5mb37pl9OnEbzBWrXIqGJisSvKzlnnQOibYXoCTnV5zLSltqoHlzskSUt6_M_E9Gn0ttJm9Z0zjtvS0U3k7u8bluo6aXmldWUnrif5tV4IQlqiJhlPxqFsSGajvgfrfwwg%3D%3D)

Hello Friend,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they?

At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then **_[please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=240d00e11759411fada5cf70d575e080&_e=bGmKMoB85Bxsns_JGOpoNwth8Iq1fUdnl_HYNCow_NK02fQssGRODehBRDZdrlAP0U41mSbnVCEh-Uq7frcH2OcbHTussmqrg_oGuGqMk0lFU_xRBGAytOSg4TRag949Dm9tuQbvNEQz0un8N3Z_fpU3eRJgcGFvmeVcgcbZxjdjs1cmp3rG5PzUvpqMttRj6-eCZzU85bBcSAANsQSoJNTAJMReTW8f8ZbmkNqbZv2G4ptAl1iJMjTcCpHupprXVyYWWrb5GCDaV_LucdfcYcf1D5PyvxSQSg-Qfb-BKmZeKn7bo06OgqAwdfntK2DrQySVaHJYPT-kO_PgIDQJN1davPWsd5oSpiPOl8gbMQzWYxHkDAkzfpMJVOPaUfsU8jMRS1zIhzGT340iiH_miKZZzKlD5y08jBJRvg86prIU--l8SkYfZUydTE_PFB9lMd34nUcNA0LofxF8lRY2OA%3D%3D "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.
