| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

clean_body: This campaign is around the principle that our donors are a part of this team. | | | | | | | | | | Hello Friend, A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they? At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach. Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank. Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it. You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating. No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies. That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House. If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford. " | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Let's show the country we love that we're willing to fight for it. Chip in today to join Team DeSantis. Yours in freedom, | Ron DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Fellow Conservative, Merrick Garland is in real trouble and the heat is on. Two brave IRS whistleblowers have flat out accused him of obstruction of justice and lying under oath to Congress. _ _
_If what they’re saying is true, Merrick Garland should be impeached._ _I**f what they’re saying is true, a special counsel should be appointed in the Department of Justice to consider _CHARGES AGAINST MERRICK GARLAND_.**_ Something is very wrong here. **I am 100% committed to finding the TRUTH about what Merrick Garland has done to protect the Biden family by covering up evidence of their influence peddling schemes.** [_**Step up now and stand with me in this fight >>>**_](http://trk.tedcruz.) The evidence is staggering once you start piecing it all together, and it’s time to get to the bottom of this mess once and for all. In a single day, the Supreme Court turned back the clock on decades of progress.

❌ They ruled against non-discrimination protections for LGBTQ+ Americans.
❌ They ruled against middle class families and students shackled by student debt.
❌ They ruled against a program to encourage equity and diversity in our classrooms.

After overturning decades of legal precedent last year by striking down Roe , the MAGA-stacked Supreme Court has once again proven that it does not care about creating an equitable, just, or livable future for the next generation.
Future Forum PAC is by electing Democrats to Congress who will stand for policies that prioritize the rights, well-being, and future of the next generation of Americans. name: Dick Durbin
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I know I can count on you.
#
Peter,
First, I want to thank this incredible team for rallying together for the big June FEC deadline. I hope you and your family had a restful and safe holiday celebrating our nation’s independence.
On the Fourth of July, we celebrate our nation’s founding ideals of freedom and equality. Yet last week, we saw three major Supreme Court decisions that are wildly out of touch with our country’s values.
First, the Supreme Court dismantled affirmative action, a decision that undermines our nation’s progress toward racial equality and dismisses the lived experiences of students of color. As Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson wrote in her dissent, “deeming race irrelevant in law does not make it so in life.”
Then, the Court blocked student loan forgiveness, a decision that will especially hurt low- and middle-income borrowers and communities of color, and that squashed an opportunity to ease their path toward economic mobility.
Finally, the Court ended Pride Month by opening the door for businesses to discriminate against LGBTQ+ individuals. At a time when LGBTQ+ Americans, especially transgender youth, are the target of hateful attacks and state legislation, the Court just issued a license to discriminate.
These decisions erode the freedoms we celebrated this week. But our fight to guarantee freedom and equality for every American is far from over.
As Chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I’m working to confirm federal judges who reflect the diversity of this country and will uphold our values. With your support, I’m also committed to doing everything I can to re-elect a Democratic Senate majority in 2024 that will defend individual freedom.
Once again, I want to send my sincere gratitude to each of you on this grassroots team. I know I can count on you when it matters most — and for that, I can’t thank you enough.
My best,
Dick Durbin
_ _
_ _

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Do you have a minute?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Will you fill out our July Priorities Survey?
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=485%2E35263%2E5jEY1-)
Hi Peter, Yet again, this incredible grassroots team came through for our campaign to help us close out the quarter strong. Don’t get me wrong — we still have quite the uphill battle ahead of us to defend Wisconsin and the Senate for Democrats and keep our country moving forward. But as this race continues to ramp up, I’m so grateful to know I have folks like you in my corner. You’re an integral part of this team, so today, I want to hear from you about what issues matter most to you and your family. I wish I could sit down with each and every one of you personally, but the next best way for us to catch up and talk about your concerns is through our July Priorities Survey. **[As we dot all the i’s and cross all the t’s on our agenda for the rest of the year, I want to be sure I’m making progress on the issues most important to you. If you have just a few moments to spare, will you fill out our July Priorities Survey today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/July_Priorities_Survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230702_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=485%2E35263%2E5jEY1-)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/July_Priorities_Survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230707_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=485%2E35263%2E5jEY1-)

— Tammy

Donald J. Trump July 6th, 2023
Vital caselaw, of which there is much, further confirms that the Presidential Records Act (PRA) is the only statute which applies to Presidents and their records. These cases build on the Clinton Socks case in making it clear that Presidents have complete latitude and authority when it comes to documents, as well as that the PRA has no criminal enforcement mechanism. Deranged Jack Smith knows this, but refuses to even mention the words “Presidential Records Act” in his Scam Indictment of Biden’s Political Opponent (who is leading by a lot) in the middle of a Campaign—a No, No!
The same Department of Justice that is now going after “President Trump,” just a few years ago argued on behalf of the President for a wide and complete application of the PRA in many cases, and won in front of Democrat appointed judges such as Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, who ruled totally in favor of the President.
These facts decisively and without question explain why the current weaponized DOJ corruptly failed to mention the PRA in their contrived indictment against me and are also just some of the key reasons why that “case” should be summarily dropped, with a strong rebuke of the extensive prosecutorial misconduct that has been committed by Merrick Garland, Deranged Jack Smith, Lisa Monaco, and many other Trump haters within the DOJ and FBI.
Thank you!

Donald J. Trump July 6th, 2023
**Bedminster, NJ —** Last week, the U.S. Supreme Court handed down massive wins for the American people— halting Joe Biden’s unconstitutional student loan gimmick , restoring fairness to the college admissions process, and applying the strongest safeguards to First Amendment rights in a generation.
One thing is clear: these wins were only made possible through President Trump’s strong nomination of three distinguished and courageous jurists to the Supreme Court.
Since the historic confirmation of President Trump’s three nominees, the Supreme Court has delivered huge wins for the American people and the rule of law, including:
** Protecting the Unborn **
In Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization, the Court overruled Roe v. Wade and held that the power to regulate abortions should be rightfully returned to the states.
This historic decision was lauded by pro-life, pro-family, and faith organizations as [ “a crowning achievement” ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kL1uhDAQhJ_GdIvM4h8ailxONBelTVpjL-DEYMvmgu7tI05R2t1vRp_GrCn46dEzfWGIi3eFIbL2hSHexOXzXd0-bld4M4ngqqQ4zi--MsT9kegf_WupaTU-nFd9rVwvcWp4RX2juk4LqVVbLb0Yx6kxXFiDelKNlLqziguSQkmjlK58jxxbrrluFMdW1coJaakVljouFZdMcEflO04ubia4rz3f11TbuFahX_Y9lafTwHA4jqPebKbZl53yiTAcNjoKw8GAzfHY_DaDsYunH1pp2yHlCMFPBIFmE6DYJQaTC6RsfCHIZEp8huIE5Z4yrQQ23vMOBVwcxwKOrC8-blXuXTp8CL4ozQSfz21Oh98AAAD__9NfdXE) and a refreshing return to the federalism our founders envisioned.
As Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America President [ Marjorie Dannenfelser said ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8jz1vwyAQQH8N3myRMx_2wNA08pKqa7sSOMe0YBBQWfn3FVHV9d3TvTsdknfrQxF5JgCbs4UAkPGFAFzZ-fNdXD-ul_5NJ-wvgrOjTeGVANRHwn_1b8uAQTvfqLx0VnFYT7RDdRLTJBmXYuw2NfORzRMYbq2ZJ-TIGUhjAMHe6G3GzimgMFJJ5UlQGMUgLOMGR2ZwolxQThi1WL7jauOuvf2q-SekwcTQebXVmsrzpoXAUm465ejdikPMdwLLjkfJMQYCS8pYSp_Roy5Ymlx1xYB77QNidfu9P1zd-uY52_Cz02Vl0-G8d0VIwui9fdzivwEAAP__PIBmgQ) , President Trump’s “presidency was the most consequential in American history for the pro-life cause.”
_ All three Trump-nominated justices voted with the majority. _
** Ending Affirmative Action **
In Students for Fair Admissions v. Harvard, the Court outlawed the practice of race-based admissions to American colleges and universities.
President Trump [ praised the decision ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kLGu3CAQRb8Gd1h4wNgpXORl5WajtEk7hmFNgg0CNtb-fcQqet1o5uqeo8EjBe9eC5s-GMDubWEATH5lAHf18euHvv-83_h3TMRvelRXu8I3BlBfiT6j_1t6OtCHtp1unV1GcIPoaBn0PE9qnLTs9mUTOLhNjvMATg9ObSA3JKUGJElq1p1fQIAUk5gGLUDqXls1GpLK0CxGLUamhKXyJzobTwz2d83PI_UmHl1Y9lpTeTutDNbruvotk68b5toSDNYUg6_eFAZr4zBYhW7zFwbru4nv6EPhj0xYucUXdzFzPCh7gxwLL8-U6SBu4jNXTqctHJ3z-cDq_xJHU308uT-5iSHQgxqpy4tNlw_BFz0xJR7tT03oXwAAAP__Y2R20g) , calling it “a great day for America.”
“People with extraordinary ability and everything else necessary for success, including future greatness for our country, are finally being rewarded. This is the ruling everyone was waiting and hoping for and the result was amazing,” President Trump said.
“It will also keep us competitive with the rest of the world. Our greatest minds must be cherished and that’s what this wonderful day has brought. We’re going back to all merit-based—and that’s the way it should be!”
_ All three Trump-nominated justices voted with the majority. _
** Halting Biden’s Student Loan Gimmick **
Today, the Court struck down Biden’s attempt to unilaterally forgive $430 billion in student loan debt—“ [ a midterm election gimmick Biden knew was unconstitutional.” ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kLGu3CAQRb8Gd1jjAYNTuMjLimajtEmLzXiXLAYEONb-feQoeu3M0b1H1-45-O09M_3BEJ_eVYbIxFeGeJcfv36o-8_7jX-3mfhNjfK8vviNIbZ3pk_0f0pPu_Xhuupb5-YRtwE6mgc1TVqOWonuOS_CAU0EQgokRV9WuUrYBrBi2nDT2PkZAQVo0IMCFKpXTo4rCbnSBKOCkUlwVF9pcyna4H63cuy5X9PehfnZWq7_nAxDc55nvxTybbGlXQRDk1Pwza-Vobl6GBpQDI0AhqYeudBOfE1Haby24l9UuUtn5It3FCuXAvjiQ_Ap8toOR7HxkGzkWyoP_4ci1cpzsJGh6crs8nnBVWkm4XGNc1n8DQAA__8tqHJ0)
Even Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi had admitted that this move violated the Constitution.
“I don’t think I have the authority to do it by signing with a pen,” [ Biden said ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j8FuwyAQRL9mfUu0LLA4Bw5NLS6pqt7SKzE4psUJCkRR_r5yVfU6b_Q045eS0_S0YPZANKdQgQjkCxAd1P7znQ_Hw7B58yVuBtbqsVJ6BaL2LPG_-mfZxsWnvKZm6ILVNAnsohXc90Zpw7Kb7XTCIALyCaXAwEbrUSpNJ97pnTex75IlJIkGjWAkyVsOSo9RqjH2qBk1KAyxfl-ncL34HL7a7b6U7Xhdumzn1kr93eSAXHuk1uJtZUDuY045lWM8L_5yAXK1-XavQE6wUT0pgWYnyTAJEiBdBTkQdjcbyiPlnCobUHheH67CnwAAAP__qIBaIg) in a 2021 CNN town hall.
“The president can’t do it, so that’s not even a discussion,” [ Pelosi said ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j8Fu6yAURL8G7xJdxnDhLVi8NPImVbftlgBuaO0aGSIrf1-5qrqdMzqa8XOZ8vhwwpwEcMuxCkD0_wVwUae3F768Xs6HZ1_S4cxabTvFkwDao6S_6q_lmGafpz015y46jVFSl5xka43Shvvu5sj_kzqQ99ogwEi6Wh_YamvVNfSsuuxA6MmQkUzo-chR6ZB6FZIlzaSFopjq5zLG5ctP8aOt97kcwzJ3k7u1VurPpkFgaFtuLa07Exjm2lbfxmWNAkNtvt2rwCAVSElDgLEMlkToVhfLlqcpVzZC0fv-apd8BwAA__-PSVcO) in 2021.
_ All three Trump-nominated justices voted with the majority. _
** Protecting Free Speech **
In 303 Creative LLC V. Elenis , the Court held that the State of Colorado cannot force a website designer to create messages against her religious beliefs, citing her First Amendment rights.
_ All three Trump-nominated justices voted with the majority. _
** Safeguarding Second Amendment Rights **
The Court took bold action to protect Americans’ constitutional right to bear arms. In New York State Rifle & Pistol Association v. Bruen, the Court held that states could not require Americans to prove a “need” to concealed carry.
"The constitutional right to bear arms in public for self-defense is not 'a second-class right, subject to an entirely different body of rules than the other Bill of Rights guarantees,” [ Justice Clarence Thomas wrote in the majority opinion. ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJxckEGPpCAQhX8N3jBYINgHD9vb8dKbve5eaSiVGUACGOO_nziZzGGOVd_Ly5enQ_JuPkei7gRgdbYQAMJ_EYCnuP__K5__ng_6RyekD9mL46LwmwDUM-F39KulxaCdv77q0dixh7ljDY6dHAYleiV5s47DzfJeCGX4jIMZmFB2UDfNEAVH3onGjcCAM8VUJxlw2UoreoNcGBxYL1lPBLNY3rfZblF7-1bzHlJrttD4ca01lU-nicB0HEcbXybiUS5OYEqbd9WZQmAqe8oYkJptz_XnTYs-Cy1otmipDhhtwFjpsuusY0UsNLtlrdTonE-67LHQtL-8MzSbqDuloGvyaNPhvHdFKiLYcm1zaXwEAAD__95CdOM) "We know of no other constitutional right that an individual may exercise only after demonstrating to government officers some special need."
_ All three Trump-nominated justices voted with the majority. _

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: New Laws Go Into Effect
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _New Laws Go Into Effect_
---
During the 2023 legislative session, legislators tackled a myriad of important issues — taxes, education, public safety, mental health, healthcare costs, and more — sending 252 bills to Governor Eric Holcomb's desk for his signature. The vast majority of them are now in effect, and our Republican statehouse caucuses have released updates on some of the most important laws that Hoosiers should know about. [House Republicans](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/ccb8f64394bc41abc3d6b838967d376c/40313) are highlighting legislation like HEA 1002, which will boost high school relevancy for students, and HEA 1499, which will provide Hoosier homeowners over $100 million in property tax relief beginning next year. Meanwhile, [Senate Republicans](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/752140155945db52c3d6b838967d376c/40313) are highlighting legislation like SEA 1, which will expand access to mental health care across the state, and SEA 35, which will require students to successfully complete a personal financial literacy course before graduation. And legislation like HEA 1001, the state budget, that will save taxpayers an additional $430 million over the next two years. These are just a few of the reasons why Governor Holcomb noted that the 2023 legislative session will have a "generational impact" on Hoosiers. I encourage you to check out their updates to see just what all Republicans are delivering for Hoosiers. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
**Forwarded this newsletter from a friend?[Sign up for The Party Line here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/76c37fb2838517c0c3d6b838967d376c/40313)**
---
|
---
| |
# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _A New Appellate Judge_
---
| |
---
_**Governor Eric Holcomb** stands with newly-appointed **Judge Paul Felix** (center) and **Danny Lopez** of the Indiana Commission on Judicial Qualifications (right)._**
---
Late last week, **Governor Eric Holcomb** announced the he had selected Hamilton County **Judge Paul Felix** as the newest member of the Indiana Court of Appeals. **Judge Felix** will fill the vacancy left by the retiring **Judge Margret G. Robb**. **What he's saying:** "**Judge Felix** is passionate about ensuring all Hoosiers have access to the justice system."
* "Through his work he has become an expert in administration of justice, a team player with his judiciary counterparts, and a community leader in juvenile justice reform."

**Details:** Since 2014, **Judge Felix** has chaired the Hamilton County Juvenile Detention Alternatives Initiative, helped develop the Hamilton County Youth Assistance Program, both of which prevent at-risk youth from entering the justice system.
* In a release from **Gov. Holcomb's** office, **Judge Felix** reacted to his appointment stating, “I am immensely honored to have received the governor's appointment to the Indiana Court of Appeals. It is quite humbling to follow **Judge Robb's** tradition of judicial leadership and compassion for the community."

You can watch a livestream of the announcement and hear more remarks, [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/b5d5a983dd04229fc3d6b838967d376c/40313).
---
|
---
| | **More: Gov. Holcomb** released a video message on Independence Day. Watch it [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/5d027e317430fe16c3d6b838967d376c/40313).
---
|
---
# _Meet the Mayoral Candidate: Jon Costas for Valparaiso_
---
---
**The candidate:** Meet **Jon Costas** — a proven leader with proven results who helped make Valparaiso the "jewel of northwest Indiana."
* Learn more and get involved with the campaign by visiting [www.joncostas.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/e4d2b1b58bda4d1fc3d6b838967d376c/40313).

On November 7, elect **Jon Costas** mayor of Valparaiso!
---
[FOLLOW JON ON FACEBOOK](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/f589d172e17199bac3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
|
---
# _National Review: Bidenomics Spin vs. Economic Reality_
---
From _[National Review](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/d993e4348411ddbcc3d6b838967d376c/40313):_ "President Biden is on a 'Bidenomics' tour, trumpeting what he claims are his administration’s economic gains. His effort comes as no surprise. In the _RealClearPolitics_ average of the polls, only about [38](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/787207d11dc79f90c3d6b838967d376c/40313) percent of Americans approve of Biden’s job on the economy. To date, the Biden administration’s efforts to convince Americans otherwise have fallen way short of the mark. The problems lie not with Biden’s rhetoric but rather with his policies — and economic reality. "Case in point: In an effort to avoid responsibility for a still-surging inflation rate while claiming credit for slowing it, Biden’s economic team recently posted a [video](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/8a4b51210159bc9ec3d6b838967d376c/40313) boldly stating, 'Here Are the Facts.' The first of these purported facts is, 'Under the Biden Harris Administration Inflation Has Fallen.' Unfortunately, that’s just not true." _[Story continues.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/5b99eaf5c0f5575fc3d6b838967d376c/40313)_
---
|
---
# _Honoring Fallen Heroes_
---
Every day, thousands of our bravest pin on their badge and head out the door, not knowing whether they will return or not, but willing to put it all on the line to protect their fellow Hoosiers. Sadly, over the past two weeks, Indiana has lost two of our bravest: Indiana State Trooper **Aaron Smith** and Tell City Police Sergeant **Heather Glenn**. Please keep their families, friends, colleagues, and communities in your thoughts and prayers.
---
|
---
# _Op-ed: Sen. Todd Young: Free American Workers from Non-compete Clauses_
---
In _[The Hill](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/a7afe29e0742f7fac3d6b838967d376c/40313)_ : "A recently released report by the U.S. Government Accountability Office (GAO) found the use of non-compete agreements is widespread throughout the U.S. labor market and restricts job mobility, lowers wages for workers, and discourages innovation.

"GAO found that workers’ job mobility is reduced in states that are more likely to enforce non-compete agreements, and states that limit these clauses see increased wages, on average. The studies reviewed by GAO also showed that enforcement of non-compete agreements may restrain the creation of new businesses — especially in the tech and science industries — due to increased probability of litigation and greater costs of recruiting and hiring staff. "... We need to free the vast majority of American workers from the burden of non-compete clauses. The freedom to leave, after all, is central to the right to rise. And there are few things more American than that." _[Op-ed continues](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/3bbf572bcc6d2a3dc3d6b838967d376c/40313)_.
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/14f328ed1268000ec3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
|
---
# _Session Spotlight: HEA 1006_
---
**The bill:** HB 1006 (mental health programs), signed May 4, 2023. **The details:** HB 1006 aims to divert Hoosiers suffering from mental health issues away from jail and into a treatment center.
* Those people must then be assessed by a mental health professional within 48 hours before being placed in front of a judge to determine if they should be detained any longer.

---
|
---
# _The Latest from FactCheckBiden.com_
---
**Biden’s** claim that “Bidenomics is working” couldn’t be further from the truth. In Biden’s America, savings are down, real wages are down, and economic confidence is down. **The facts:** Americans have [lost over $10,000](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/ac4266d1fe1c234bc3d6b838967d376c/40313) on average paying for the increased cost of living since Biden took office.
* 74 percent of Americans say their financial situation is not improving, with almost half saying their financial situation is actively “getting worse”, according to a recent [Harvard CAPS / Harris poll](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/2973e4cf93a1d19fc3d6b838967d376c/40313).
* America's outlook on retirement is now at an [11-year low](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/3ae2f6bdee594418c3d6b838967d376c/40313), with [one in four](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/0fa28967d5c6b925c3d6b838967d376c/40313) Americans cutting back on retirement savings.
* Real weekly [wages have fallen every month](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/86361ac613e13bb3/766a2afba7fa7546c3d6b838967d376c/40313) since Biden and Democrats passed their wasteful $1.9 trillion "stimulus" package.

**What is true?** Americans are not happy with Biden's economy.

clean_body: The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter | | | | New Laws Go Into Effect During the 2023 legislative session, legislators tackled a myriad of important issues — taxes, education, public safety, mental health, healthcare costs, and more — sending 252 bills to Governor Eric Holcomb's desk for his signature. The vast majority of them are now in effect, and our Republican statehouse caucuses have released updates on some of the most important laws that Hoosiers should know about. are highlighting legislation like HEA 1002, which will boost high school relevancy for students, and HEA 1499, which will provide Hoosier homeowners over $100 million in property tax relief beginning next year. Meanwhile, are highlighting legislation like SEA 1, which will expand access to mental health care across the state, and SEA 35, which will require students to successfully complete a personal financial literacy course before graduation. And legislation like HEA 1001, the state budget, that will save taxpayers an additional $430 million over the next two years. These are just a few of the reasons why Governor Holcomb noted that the 2023 legislative session will have a "generational impact" on Hoosiers. I encourage you to check out their updates to see just what all Republicans are delivering for Hoosiers. Sincerely, Chairman Kyle Hupfer | Forwarded this newsletter from a friend? | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | A New Appellate Judge | | Governor Eric Holcomb stands with newly-appointed Judge Paul Felix (center) and Danny Lopez of the Indiana Commission on Judicial Qualifications (right). Late last week, Governor Eric Holcomb announced the he had selected Hamilton County Judge Paul Felix as the newest member of the Indiana Court of Appeals. Judge Felix will fill the vacancy left by the retiring Judge Margret G. Robb. What he's saying: "Judge Felix is passionate about ensuring all Hoosiers have access to the justice system." "Through his work he has become an expert in administration of justice, a team player with his judiciary counterparts, and a community leader in juvenile justice reform." Details: Since 2014, Judge Felix has chaired the Hamilton County Juvenile Detention Alternatives Initiative, helped develop the Hamilton County Youth Assistance Program, both of which prevent at-risk youth from entering the justice system. In a release from Gov. Holcomb's office, Judge Felix reacted to his appointment stating, “I am immensely honored to have received the governor's appointment to the Indiana Court of Appeals. It is quite humbling to follow Judge Robb's tradition of judicial leadership and compassion for the community." You can watch a livestream of the announcement and hear more remarks, . | | | More: Gov. Holcomb released a video message on Independence Day. Watch it . | Meet the Mayoral Candidate: Jon Costas for Valparaiso The candidate: Meet Jon Costas — a proven leader with proven results who helped make Valparaiso the "jewel of northwest Indiana." Learn more and get involved with the campaign by visiting . On November 7, elect Jon Costas mayor of Valparaiso! | National Review: Bidenomics Spin vs. Economic Reality From : "President Biden is on a 'Bidenomics' tour, trumpeting what he claims are his administration’s economic gains. His effort comes as no surprise. In the RealClearPolitics average of the polls, only about percent of Americans approve of Biden’s job on the economy. To date, the Biden administration’s efforts to convince Americans otherwise have fallen way short of the mark. The problems lie not with Biden’s rhetoric but rather with his policies — and economic reality. "Case in point: In an effort to avoid responsibility for a still-surging inflation rate while claiming credit for slowing it, Biden’s economic team recently posted a boldly stating, 'Here Are the Facts.' The first of these purported facts is, 'Under the Biden Harris Administration Inflation Has Fallen.' Unfortunately, that’s just not true." | Honoring Fallen Heroes Every day, thousands of our bravest pin on their badge and head out the door, not knowing whether they will return or not, but willing to put it all on the line to protect their fellow Hoosiers. Sadly, over the past two weeks, Indiana has lost two of our bravest: Indiana State Trooper Aaron Smith and Tell City Police Sergeant Heather Glenn. Please keep their families, friends, colleagues, and communities in your thoughts and prayers. | Op-ed: Sen. Todd Young: Free American Workers from Non-compete Clauses In : "A recently released report by the U.S. Government Accountability Office (GAO) found the use of non-compete agreements is widespread throughout the U.S. labor market and restricts job mobility, lowers wages for workers, and discourages innovation. "GAO found that workers’ job mobility is reduced in states that are more likely to enforce non-compete agreements, and states that limit these clauses see increased wages, on average. The studies reviewed by GAO also showed that enforcement of non-compete agreements may restrain the creation of new businesses — especially in the tech and science industries — due to increased probability of litigation and greater costs of recruiting and hiring staff. "... We need to free the vast majority of American workers from the burden of non-compete clauses. The freedom to leave, after all, is central to the right to rise. And there are few things more American than that." . | | Session Spotlight: HEA 1006 The bill: HB 1006 (mental health programs), signed May 4, 2023. The president’s month-after-month job growth has also led to the creation of more than twelve million jobs since he took office, making his first two years the two strongest years for job growth on record.
And Joe is only getting started, Peter.

clean_body: We promise. | = | We’re gathering data from our most dedicated President Biden supporters, butYOUR ANSWER is missing! Do YOU approve of President Biden? | | ---|--- Peter, despite the relentless onslaught of attacks from the GOP, President Biden is delivering win after win for the American people. His accomplishments range from safeguarding marriage equality to implementing a cap on insulin costs to taking historic action addressing gun violence and climate change. The president’s month-after-month job growth has also led to the creation of more than twelve million jobs since he took office, making his first two years the two strongest years for job growth on record. And Joe is only getting started, Peter. Now, with President Biden's re-election campaign in full-swing, we must continue to uplift his bold agenda and vision for America. We want to ensure that his supporters, including those in your area and across the nation, stand with him in this crucial fight. Tell us ASAP: Do YOU approve of President Biden? We appreciate your input, Team Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, we’ve been working around the clock to uplift President Biden’s message to the American electorate and elect Democrats who will continue to fight for his ambitious agenda. President Biden and the Democrats are fighting tooth-and-nail to move our country forward, but Republicans are threatening to derail everything. = | = = Follow along: | ---|--- | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Team AOC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
$3.
It may not seem like a lot of money compared to Republican corporate mega-donors and super PACs, but **when we put all of our grassroots donations together, it amounts to a really powerful movement.**
[Please, will you make a donation today to power our campaign to make Alexandria the representative for NY-14 in the next Congress? $3 goes a long way when everyone is chipping in.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230707.-ZL4io&refcode=em20230707-4592-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4592%2E2526796%2EFkS5-V)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230707.-ZL4io&refcode=em20230707-4592-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4592%2E2526796%2EFkS5-V)**
For years, we’ve been the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress. And those small dollars add up to a lot of influence.
$3 donations let us beat a Republican who raised $10 million against us.
$3 donations allowed us to deliver 80,000 meals to our neighbors in the depths of the pandemic, and provide 100,000 masks to teachers, small businesses, and essential workers.
$3 donations have helped us bring 6,000 hours of free, virtual tutoring to under-resourced families with our Homework Helpers program.
[What do you say? Your donation today will go directly toward re-electing Alexandria and defeating right-wing fascists in NY-14 once and for all.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230707.-ZL4io&refcode=em20230707-4592-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4592%2E2526796%2EFkS5-V)

Thank you in advance,
Team AOC

name: Will Hurd
subject: What do you drive?
body:
| | | Hey y'all, It's during the quiet moments of the campaign trail that I really get a second to step back and think about WHY I decided to run for President of the United States. Our country needs help. Our party needs help. And the loudest voices are typically in the driver’s seat focusing on everything but common sense solutions to our problems. It's time we got in the driver's seat. Despite our differences, I believe there is more that unites us than divides us. I want to restore trust and integrity in our institutions and rebuild America as a beacon of Democracy. Not a place where we can't even talk to our family members because we disagree so vehemently on politics. I love our country. Even more, I love our potential and all we can and will accomplish together. But, here's the catch... The RNC is requiring that we have 40,000 individual donors in order to get onto the debate stage. I think options are always better. We need a diversity of thought. If you feel the same, please join my movement by giving just $1. That's all it takes. **Please this secure link:**
[https://secure.HurdforAmerica.com/donate](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=2bcd38f5cb944e11a95631f822eff404&_e=Whbd-puVDu4AGgFDAX_7ESvKWAIuaXQozJ90RlAqyttt005Yaz2jBN-W5W79iYX98017BHR3Zuwp3vR7IwHMMX7bgwRpZCG8jJZ6DpeDIBvj6uVnFhhTfKZske-paOSKiF65DMvZ250lcXoCphfoKTbNuf9Z-7ck9Z3EW0O0AYj9ZnIMtsu7O0qVq2Ri5LSvixbCjZGAYU2weXd92lnSfWZ67dw-Dvduzm28B32NL80xQ-qW1I52Z5moKaxOXXv3I0hfU-d-UYDSvR2FK3jS3hC7KxaJazuGuZCwFgo_ZKCOSurfGjBe5DzRtIx4EydaekVvNwtlGAjaTnZcpwnHeST9Zz5IqDNTmntHmUrEOp8%3D)
Thank you, **Will Hurd** _Candidate for President_ _Former Texas Congressman_

name: Casey DeSantis
subject: The largest movement of parents in political history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore America, and mamas everywhere are joining him.
---
| | | | | | | | | | Please see a message from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, click [**here**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=2b5490ac84854810833ee42382e1450e&_t=OWOAMXn8LHvMn2wX01uDPjiG1sDru46Ve6EnlrWDv2_6RjWPLBnAIQZSJdPpoQmu7e1HgJFfoJZCXz7evyZKfmy3nB3UewICWOMPXDhZEII%3D)
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2b5490ac84854810833ee42382e1450e&_e=RlT62uSP7cSto2iCO9OnEcoFcI-af0molwlcgx0B7zr3LTiPjuuFjD68Ofs97mEjaAVawHg7VnRUTKYw4hQrbdK0JbJSfGH6MWq7ZVAMLZ5-l0p8KtMwXYjlU6BcksuX8wVP7FE01kNVXzvuMGee54jiApc1HrzKZ2QTBhZcPq-dv2WAOOuzXzJUmPpKXmUQf6PlYEkw5V9YnWTuhMT-QrA7VzQVY0NE0FIhKf9oHSvhe1FeteLctgoGx5L5kuTVn8kj1_t7OhT4bBLY-L3J1nhjTZtCBvNGloGoL0RDbz_eyP7-fZcB_QjyX5o3v9Pbj1JVXstOVSzFoRZAh5hvWFplxZTbZpxsfFG9KdHjAALfM0h9wXnRl8juLwO4JMyktexqGkgZ1TGZuGoKmRO6pw%3D%3D)
Hi, Peter, Governor Ron DeSantis is running to restore sanity in America. His vision is of an America where our border is secure; our streets are safe; our economy is prosperous; our rights are respected and protected; and where the American people are sovereign in their own nation once again. Our Great American Comeback starts by defeating Joe Biden. Parents have a special stake in this fight. **We 're not just fighting to secure our future _ -- we're fighting to secure a future for our children._ ** That's why Ron DeSantis is running for president. We have three young children at home -- ages six, five, and three. We're the first family to raise young children in the Florida Governor's Residence in more than 50 years. This campaign is about fighting for them -- for all American children -- and fighting to make sure that they have the opportunity to live up to their God-given potential in the greatest country in the world. In 2022, we launched Mamas for DeSantis because the poor policies emanating from the left, particularly in Washington, presented a direct threat to the well-being of Florida's families. During the Governor's campaign, we mobilized more than 1.1 million mamas and grandmothers in Florida to reelect the Governor. It was the single largest parent-led movement in the history of Florida...**and now, we're taking our mamas movement national!** The parental empowerment we started in Florida is coming to every community across our great nation. Ron DeSantis will continue to be the fighter who protects the innocence of our children and the rights of parents. As the mom and dad of young children, Ron and I know that when parents are engaged, America prospers. We must unite, fight, and win. We beat the left in Florida. And when our mamas' army kicks into gear across the country, we'll beat them on the national stage, too. Peter**, [will you join our historic movement of mamas today or send this message to your favorite mamas in your life who would be interested in joining?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2b5490ac84854810833ee42382e1450e&_e=RlT62uSP7cSto2iCO9OnEcoFcI-af0molwlcgx0B7zr3LTiPjuuFjD68Ofs97mEjaAVawHg7VnRUTKYw4hQrbdK0JbJSfGH6MWq7ZVAMLZ5-l0p8KtMwXYjlU6BcksuX8wVP7FE01kNVXzvuMGee54jiApc1HrzKZ2QTBhZcPq-dv2WAOOuzXzJUmPpKXmUQf6PlYEkw5V9YnWTuhMT-QrA7VzQVY0NE0FIhKf9oHSv0r0GWmvNJtP0TJVF2uMS3-AoeUm54tvm8ZDxZQ64td8nOM-NbqGaHrnNH8l94jcfXXoSkfZPGQ-P8nNMd2VIDv-nXP_N1OVRMLYKET7H8-JdcnQrwGyxTPhov_U1Mp8eMN5E3gP095QjRTv_uckDpamZK0foa1VJEYuHsrX1J-Q%3D%3D "will you join our historic movement of mamas today?") ** Together, we will fight for our children. We will defeat Joe Biden. We will be prosperous in our Great American Comeback. And we will restore sanity, decency, and truth in America.

In Freedom,
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2b5490ac84854810833ee42382e1450e&_e=RlT62uSP7cSto2iCO9OnEcoFcI-af0molwlcgx0B7zr3LTiPjuuFjD68Ofs97mEjaAVawHg7VnRUTKYw4hQrbdK0JbJSfGH6MWq7ZVAMLZ5-l0p8KtMwXYjlU6BcksuX8wVP7FE01kNVXzvuMGee54jiApc1HrzKZ2QTBhZcPq-dv2WAOOuzXzJUmPpKXmUQf6PlYEkw5V9YnWTuhMT-QrA7VzQVY0NE0FIhKf9oHSvJVnpRAHzDc3U59dSyiKdGh6ivYrDYV6n0HElpa2BhYucaPjtE7jFMuvcWz_qMEH2LeTbK8NIwO1hCnfLd4T0bXWt_5HHErs6fGZWGbymIt-gp4i8O4sOisiq-zup1r0_wSI9vbeyzxWlANact78rANoP5Pr3i1-yoPmvV2aAaGA%3D%3D)
---
Casey DeSantis
First Lady of Florida

---

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: The NRSC is all-in on Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
These insiders aren’t just working hard to tear down Lucas — they’re determined to prop up Hawley and his flailing campaign.
#
Peter — **the National Republican Senatorial Committee is all-in on Missouri this cycle, and for more than just the reason you’d expect.**
Before we ask you to **[chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce next year,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34806?refcode=em20230707-3370&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3370%2E614464%2EGphYTN)** please let us explain:
**[FIGHT BACK: DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34806?refcode=em20230707-3370&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3370%2E614464%2EGphYTN)**
The National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) is the big group of political insiders responsible for electing GOP candidates to the U.S. Senate.
They don’t always take a big interest in Missouri. **But this year, they’re not just working hard to tear down Lucas — they’re determined to prop up Josh Hawley and his flailing campaign.**
**JANUARY 6, 2023:** Just hours after Lucas Kunce made waves by launching his campaign on the two-year anniversary of Josh Hawley’s infamous incident outside the U.S. Capitol, a spokesperson for the NRSC called Lucas _“unhinged”_ for wanting to take on a coward like Hawley.
**FEBRUARY 2, 2023:** Less than a month later, the NRSC released one of its very first digital attack ads of the 2024 election cycle — aimed directly at Lucas.
**MARCH 22, 2023:** A new report showed Josh Hawley facing “intensely negative sentiment” among Missouri voters, with a _net-negative approval rating._
**MARCH 31, 2023:** On the _very last day_ of our first fundraising quarter of the cycle, the NRSC used its joint fundraising committee with Hawley to funnel **$250,000** into his campaign. **This is one of the most significant investments the GOP has made into ANY U.S. Senate candidate so far this cycle.**
**[FIGHT BACK: DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34806?refcode=em20230707-3370&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3370%2E614464%2EGphYTN)**
**APRIL 3, 2023:** The NRSC worked with their DC oppo shop to put out _another_ weird hit piece on Lucas — attacking him for playing the card game Magic: The Gathering and being a cheerleader in college.
**MAY 26, 2023:** Josh Hawley sent a panicked message to his top donors:
**_“Let me be clear: control of the Senate could come down to this seat.”_**
**AND NOW:** We’re just over a week away from when we’ll see Hawley’s Q2 fundraising report, and there’s no telling what else these insiders will do to keep tearing Lucas down and making Josh Hawley look strong.
It’s absolutely critical that we stay prepared to fight back at any moment — and the only way we’ll be able to do that is with help from real people just like you.
**[So Peter, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce, defeat Josh Hawley, and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat? These GOP insiders might have corporate elites and shady mega-donors on their side — but they have nothing on our people power.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34806?refcode=em20230707-3370&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3370%2E614464%2EGphYTN)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34807?refcode=em20230707-3370&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=3370%2E614464%2EGphYTN) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34807?refcode=em20230707-3370&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=3370%2E614464%2EGphYTN) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34807?refcode=em20230707-3370&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=3370%2E614464%2EGphYTN) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34807?refcode=em20230707-3370&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=3370%2E614464%2EGphYTN) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34807?refcode=em20230707-3370&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=3370%2E614464%2EGphYTN) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34807?refcode=em20230707-3370&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=3370%2E614464%2EGphYTN) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34806?refcode=em20230707-3370&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=3370%2E614464%2EGphYTN)

— Team Lucas Kunce

subject: Biden's focused. Are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Rising PAC
body:
I know this is going to sound crazy, but please just hear me out.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I know this is going to sound crazy, but please just hear me out.
Biden is _**FOCUSED**_.
That's right. Biden's eyes are on the prize. He's deadset on winning **Pennsylvania, the biggest swing state in the country** in 2024! Just last month, he held his FIRST campaign event in Pennsylvania. **The truth is, if Biden wins Pennsylvania, he will almost certainly win a second term as president! **
---
| | | [FLIP PENNSYLVANIA RED!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhb7ot8u9r54nlv4ni7las7up74vg5kifh4csqco_rp22sh2s8i66o70sthm4p30cph2bs "FLIP PENNSYLVANIA RED!")
---
**I can 't stress this enough, Friend; we _CANNOT_ let Democrats continue to outspend, outwork, and outraise us in Pennsylvania! The consequences will be irreversible for our whole country.**
Biden's leading the charge to ensure Pennsylvania turns **BLUE** __for good!__ But I'm fighting to stop him and the whole Democrat agenda, Friend.

Look, **Pennsylvania is my home.** Democrats in charge have only followed President Biden's lead, and it's taking us down a dangerous path. I want to do my part to renew Pennsylvania and elect conservative leaders. If you agree, I'm hoping you'll chip in a dollar or more to help me fight back against Biden's push to hold Pennsylvania!
---
| | | [HELP RENEW AMERICA!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zec98cabhapt1klko3bb5tb3093pheg1pu4et0j0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sthm4p30cph2bs "HELP RENEW AMERICA!")
---
_**[Chip in a dollar or more to help get the grassroots movement started, Friend!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmtifg80lv68v4u9vnfehee6i8htrjv796kbsso0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sthm4p30cph2bs "Chip in a dollar or more to help get the grassroots movement started, Friend!")**_ **Remember** , _it 's entirely up to you and me to decide how far we'll go to renew Pennsylvania and save our country!_

My book, _Superpower in Peril: A Battle Plan to Renew America_ , is about what we should do next to begin renewing our country. My book outlines the steps to make this plan a reality, including educating our people, confronting China, and securing America.

**[If you'd like to read more about what a former paratrooper and business leader thinks about what we need to get our country back, I hope you'll claim a signed copy today!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztm4ads3li53b4bcbtl7b8n69hla1ok7ucm4jcho_rp22sh2s8i66o70sthm4p30cph2bs "If you’d like to read more about what a former paratrooper and business leader thinks about what we need to get our country back, I hope you’ll claim a signed copy today!")** | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z70bfer8jirrdrl4ptbmeek2eahvvp8rpqhqh5gg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sthm4p30cph2bs "CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY")

Pennsylvania is the most important battleground state in our country, which is why Democrats are keen to flip Pennsylvania permanently BLUE.

**The only way to save Pennsylvania is at the grassroots level.** We have to start electing quality Republican leaders at the state level if we want to get the state - and our country - back on track.

Next month, Rep. Pearson and Rep. Jones of the Tennessee Three are running again after Republicans expelled them from the Tennessee House. And, in the New Hampshire House, we have two special elections on deck, which could make or break our chances to flip the chamber this year. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Referendum on the Administrative State."

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=35261e091f374649ba9adffa309147ca&_e=UzvFgFM1Z6SuhXBlAclHAlMdIfUDdk00DclnThw6hpI8lp4WOOBmU4JHogMNbDiAKhHLCbbIrRupq6ozEUS2Dl3gUzzp70O0YwBZ-i-ZN-_swtcYXoJ6mLKSQAYL51qaOJ4Lo7qhxVKqE3CzQwI5QnrAbO4yzTh2aTsx7u2C70OvZqGepIT2dSbaO-3pkdkZgWvMpPcSqq_AMJoGQmZ9pD-4qIA8iLeSk6Pj1peg5M9QvbkeuSarXT5vL47gFgeBQ7s7o8JMj3Xtd3K8jzzjY2Z7dj1gjzUS943pMTi5ZDveAROIq1w5qLY_uBZy4ICGuyiGmr6i7JCFdtNV2UacF6A7Hmeny4E-TxNv0p-dWqmBeP2-yPq4lkHXXVxQyZpRxafT8EydOEEbga9RCd338e-jbxZ7WuBYidvOLWjwN4w%3D)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=35261e091f374649ba9adffa309147ca&_e=UzvFgFM1Z6SuhXBlAclHAlMdIfUDdk00DclnThw6hpI8lp4WOOBmU4JHogMNbDiAKhHLCbbIrRupq6ozEUS2Dl3gUzzp70O0YwBZ-i-ZN-_swtcYXoJ6mLKSQAYL51qaOJ4Lo7qhxVKqE3CzQwI5QnrAbO4yzTh2aTsx7u2C70OvZqGepIT2dSbaO-3pkdkZgWvMpPcSqq_AMJoGQmZ9pD-4qIA8iLeSk6Pj1peg5M9QvbkeuSarXT5vL47gFgeBQ7s7o8JMj3Xtd3K8jzzjYwUU3JjJ64P_JmO_Mwkez9E0e0GVpITb0PF7AaBkCmEvp6zDc8aZvdV8g9kHxtbZISS6AwcgA3PE--Ek922BOOt93SWK1K7Ju8xnTQ0muA6o9ZCK_d9CxMFiKDDEh_325PpP9kL_v8g6Tf-ha2vNldg%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=35261e091f374649ba9adffa309147ca&_e=UzvFgFM1Z6SuhXBlAclHAlMdIfUDdk00DclnThw6hpI8lp4WOOBmU4JHogMNbDiAKhHLCbbIrRupq6ozEUS2Dl3gUzzp70O0YwBZ-i-ZN-_swtcYXoJ6mLKSQAYL51qaOJ4Lo7qhxVKqE3CzQwI5QnrAbO4yzTh2aTsx7u2C70OvZqGepIT2dSbaO-3pkdkZgWvMpPcSqq_AMJoGQmZ9pD-4qIA8iLeSk6Pj1peg5M9QvbkeuSarXT5vL47gFgeBQ7s7o8JMj3Xtd3K8jzzjY8yzxgo1dHSecWRdg9RZprz9C1iwf_toyNKc7DyCTFuC1roiFpfxE3Yb9TvduJ4vBHHk5_kLMTCddc8Zqp8odaS8H8ioBjlmAxyantxP_7vA68BTEOO0oFgn5saSE54dNDdW4nZ6HPL_EbtZoG9oVJw%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=35261e091f374649ba9adffa309147ca&_e=UzvFgFM1Z6SuhXBlAclHAlMdIfUDdk00DclnThw6hpI8lp4WOOBmU4JHogMNbDiAKhHLCbbIrRupq6ozEUS2Dl3gUzzp70O0YwBZ-i-ZN-_swtcYXoJ6mLKSQAYL51qaOJ4Lo7qhxVKqE3CzQwI5QnrAbO4yzTh2aTsx7u2C70OvZqGepIT2dSbaO-3pkdkZgWvMpPcSqq_AMJoGQmZ9pD-4qIA8iLeSk6Pj1peg5M9QvbkeuSarXT5vL47gFgeBQ7s7o8JMj3Xtd3K8jzzjY1j8yaXeVADw-lvkllNfMwDB59rrLIMRFnqC-uwAAFieDzvw5Ypm6v0izV7R1mxI6jJ8FKpPpebJPHhp6LcJHoxiXhP5kyv5OHONzAnefw3YUdC1DDmmyLJ8iQ-AeMVTmbxalKOit4FpO7aHvhJz6EU%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: Biden's focused. Are you?

body:

Biden is _**FOCUSED**_.
That's right. Biden's eyes are on the prize. He's deadset on winning **Pennsylvania, the biggest swing state in the country** in 2024! Just last month, he held his FIRST campaign event in Pennsylvania. **The truth is, if Biden wins Pennsylvania, he will almost certainly win a second term as president! **

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Who knew?
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
Many of us assume the personal care products and cosmetics we find at the store are safe to use, but in reality, more than half of cosmetics sold in the U.S. contain toxic chemicals associated with serious health conditions.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230707?refcode=folf230707 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230707?refcode=folf230707]

Everything from nail polish and body wash to makeup and hair-straightening products can contain chemicals that have been linked to cancer, birth defects, respiratory issues, and brain and nervous system damage. Women of color and salon workers are particularly vulnerable as they are at higher risk for exposure because of where they work and the types of products that are marketed to them.
The FDA has only banned or restricted 11 chemicals from beauty and personal care products. By comparison, the EU has banned nearly 1,700 chemicals, and more than 40 countries have stricter cosmetic safety regulations than ours.
Recently, I reintroduced a bill to ban 11 of the most hazardous chemicals and to require more transparency in beauty and personal care products sold in the U.S. with my colleague Jan Schakowsky.
This is another reason why it’s so important that we elect women, so that we can raise issues from our experiences and to prioritize addressing them. Many of them are issues that have been overlooked for too long. I’ll do everything I can to protect women across this country—whether it’s addressing toxic ingredients in beauty products or fighting for the freedom to make our own reproductive health care decisions.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie_signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]
P.S. I’m up for re-election, and as always, I need your help to keep up the fight. Any amount you can contribute will help our campaign prepare for our primary election, which is less than a year away. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230707?refcode=folf230707]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230707?refcode=folf230707]
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF LIZZIE FLETCHER, A JOINT FUNDRAISING COMMITTEE AUTHORIZED BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS AND LEADING PEOPLE FORWARD PAC.

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: The Rare Phenomenon of Citizenship
body:
I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. It is called "American Citizenship and Its Decline,"

| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a81fef135b8f47bd8408b1b2041a8b59&_e=dPZmgWAtoIMMCU5igYcaCSqxkjcl-SokXbI_jMDTlMphBYQpFAYT4IWXL2Mn1i3xL_X39IH8tjuxYTDm3FQImuAyp9JZtarIvrMyc764aciEePdEiKgdPxgqmM1Kv-f6TzD-SsMdsjqoLUzytx5hjowWCY38RPz_BOURJ9xKtBhInzwfJdP9pAZRGIRQyLyuzvZ4Vpb2GYl_Rkpbs1ORg9ilr3-gTt7U1ow33LVJmL66TuStX1qdjyrOqrqkZEpGZOakdATDNFyKajsfZE7cCXYalOR1so4Rk-itb1EmBt4Qjh6n5herMOk-atMz4jkBw9CEmmFJHl5mArxHjt87IcJFN5vhgwvgjHifuxM6SKxHlp2m-cLE3qsmX03Rhmldw1SXbCB2RoKXJgFNiAVp8w%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear friend, I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. It is called "**[American Citizenship and Its Decline](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a81fef135b8f47bd8408b1b2041a8b59&_e=dPZmgWAtoIMMCU5igYcaCSqxkjcl-SokXbI_jMDTlMphBYQpFAYT4IWXL2Mn1i3xL_X39IH8tjuxYTDm3FQImuAyp9JZtarIvrMyc764aciEePdEiKgdPxgqmM1Kv-f6TzD-SsMdsjqoLUzytx5hjowWCY38RPz_BOURJ9xKtBhInzwfJdP9pAZRGIRQyLyuzvZ4Vpb2GYl_Rkpbs1ORg9ilr3-gTt7U1ow33LVJmL66TuStX1qdjyrOqrqkZEpGl8PCiPTMrIAtl3SYeOuDA07p0YVHvjS_GUEgmXY3X_KWvAo4g0ml48caW7iaeoFQvnGpNQJ8lkBu6xTRx86z-uRMwAkFj69IGO3iT_zXNnzUguTRHy7xTlGZcy2jBYD-xr72XmhG20CRfX_QwJjtww%3D%3D)** ," and the online course is based on Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen_.

Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a81fef135b8f47bd8408b1b2041a8b59&_e=dPZmgWAtoIMMCU5igYcaCSqxkjcl-SokXbI_jMDTlMphBYQpFAYT4IWXL2Mn1i3xL_X39IH8tjuxYTDm3FQImuAyp9JZtarIvrMyc764aciEePdEiKgdPxgqmM1Kv-f6TzD-SsMdsjqoLUzytx5hjowWCY38RPz_BOURJ9xKtBhInzwfJdP9pAZRGIRQyLyuzvZ4Vpb2GYl_Rkpbs1ORg9ilr3-gTt7U1ow33LVJmL66TuStX1qdjyrOqrqkZEpG2SklwKwIqYtLtwMnMEXH3sWFi3DE7NdGxBOpQYjnjDIq5sIAaEnhIhrGguLZt0lniis9kKGeD54ZKc7c_ZyDblvl1azB96d8-Bwb-PuusCUxFRTMG0So3y84ET6DjyN378Hlh1aj8UzNCbmeoeU1Gw%3D%3D)
---
| | The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present--given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.

Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens.

You can receive a DVD box set of "**American Citizenship and Its Decline** " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link:

clean_body: I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. It is called "American Citizenship and Its Decline," | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear friend, I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. It is called " ," and the online course is based on Victor Davis Hanson's book, The Dying Citizen. Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen. | | | The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present--given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government. Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past. Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot. These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen. In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature. Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed. The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens. You can receive a DVD box set of "American Citizenship and Its Decline " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link: Best wishes, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: 7 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
Peter,

7 years ago, today, my life was changed forever.

Initially, I wasn’t scheduled to work, but a late change in the schedule meant I had to cover for one of my partners. At the time I was also processing what had dominated the news the past few days — the shooting deaths of Philando Castile and Alton Sterling.

**But fate stepped in**. Instead of spending the night at home with my wife and daughter, I headed back up to the hospital as the trauma surgeon on duty.

On July 7, 2016, a Black sniper ambushed fourteen police officers providing security for a peaceful demonstration in downtown Dallas, Texas. And Peter, seven of the officers were sent to my trauma center.

Our team at Parkland Hospital treated those seven gunshot victims — three of whom were critically-wounded. We were unable to save those critically-wounded officers so I had to do something I’ve done countless times before. I changed out of my bloody scrubs, put on my white coat, and gave the devastating news no grieving family member should have to hear.

As the leader of the trauma team at a Dallas hospital that evening, I became the only surgeon in history to operate on multiple on-duty police officers victimized in a mass shooting. The shooting became the worst loss of life for US law enforcement since 9/11 and shattered all my attempts to keep my head down and focus only on the bodies in front of me. **Soon, my comfortable life of anonymity disintegrated, forcing me to navigate a new reality as a public figure — a life I did not seek, did not want, and for which I was ill-prepared.**

7 years on, I think about that night every day. About the chain of events it set into motion. How it took me into public service and activism. How it landed me in the viewing gallery of the United States Senate when the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act was passed. How it guided me to where I am today, running for Congress.

[I am proud of the strides we have made as a country over the past 7 years, but I tell you now we have more work to do. If you agree with me, will you join me in honoring the memory of all those who lost their lives to gun violence by adding your name to my petition? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66121918/415396104/925570158?source=EM_NBI_BW_20230707_PT_DallasShooting_0_WL_DrBrianWilliams_na_na_Anniversary&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDFiNzRjMWUtZTgxYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7916fHTuLsBKJou20ZLkAoMgdkLa-WxY8cs_MBTkF4=&emci=d0b74c1e-e81c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d1b74c1e-e81c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)
| [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66121919/415396105/925570158?source=EM_NBI_BW_20230707_PT_DallasShooting_0_WL_DrBrianWilliams_na_na_Anniversary&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDFiNzRjMWUtZTgxYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7916fHTuLsBKJou20ZLkAoMgdkLa-WxY8cs_MBTkF4=&emci=d0b74c1e-e81c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d1b74c1e-e81c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)

Brian

subject: wait, wut?
body:
re... ID primary |
---
| | Maybe you saw this...

A bill that **GOT RID OF** our Presidential primary (the election where Idahoans decide on who we want to be the Presidential candidate) was passed by a bunch of politicians in the Idaho legislature, including Idaho's own Governor.

For some reason, most in the legislature voted for it.

Then Brad Little signed it _KNOWING IT WOULD GET RID OF THE PRIMARY_.

And now, it's just... gone.

**_We have no more presidential primary. _**

But...

The Idaho Republican Party found a way to remedy this situation and put us front and center on the national stage.

Now, I could explain the whole thing to you here...

But my esteemed colleague from the frigid north, Senator Scott Herndon, already did.

[**Click here to get the real story**](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=0a44b68353&e=dea908e0fe "give it to me straight doc!")

Cheers,

Brian

clean_body: re... ID primary | | | Maybe you saw this... A bill that GOT RID OF our Presidential primary (the election where Idahoans decide on who we want to be the Presidential candidate) was passed by a bunch of politicians in the Idaho legislature, including Idaho's own Governor. For some reason, most in the legislature voted for it. Then Brad Little signed it KNOWING IT WOULD GET RID OF THE PRIMARY. And now, it's just... gone. We have no more presidential primary. But... The Idaho Republican Party found a way to remedy this situation and put us front and center on the national stage. Now, I could explain the whole thing to you here... But my esteemed colleague from the frigid north, Senator Scott Herndon, already did. "give it to me straight doc!" Cheers, Brian \--- 1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com to your address book or whitelist me. 2) Want to get off this list? . 3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753 4) Want to support the fight against the establishment hacks, phony conservatives, and progressive shills who want to turn Idaho into a progressive dumpster fire? >>> "get in the fight" | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | Copyright © 2023 Brian Lenney for Idaho, All rights reserved.

Last week marked the end of the second Supreme Court term with a 6-3 conservative majority, and boy, did we see the repercussions.

**_Team, with the Supreme Court restricting so many Americans’ fundamental rights and freedoms, we need to make sure Pennsylvania remains a place where people’s basic rights are protected._**

Our next Attorney General will be at the center of these fights – and in many instances, our last line of defense against an unchecked Supreme Court, Congress, and State Legislature. I’m committed to making sure that here in Pennsylvania, women will always have the right to choose, that LGBTQ+ Pennsylvanians can live openly without facing discrimination, and that every eligible Pennslyvanian can exercise their right to vote. Here’s the thing folks: Pennsylvania’s Constitution guarantees the right to clean air and water. It guarantees the right to vote. It prohibits discrimination based on gender, race, or ethnicity. But those rights are under constant attack and you deserve an Attorney General who will fight to preserve and defend them, not lead the charge to strip them away.

[**I promise to fight for our most precious rights and freedoms. If you agree that’s what we need in our next Attorney General, then please, make a donation in support of my campaign today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66123505/415401646/-412144306?refcode=email_070723_donate5_t1&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmQ3YWExZS1lYzFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7oipd69Dj6kuRxfGsWvlCfYrb7Ae-aivxG-3-JvE-6c=)

– The latest polls show we’ve surged to a [**ONE-POINT**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66123510/415401655/1662333042?refcode=20230707_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzkyODRmNi1lYjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=76_e3j4JNdg-nWwe41FR3cAq1Q9-Vl-U7GCyTOvjxLM=) lead.
– Extreme MAGA Republicans have already raised [**$38 MILLION**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66123511/415401656/1662333042?refcode=20230707_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzkyODRmNi1lYjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=76_e3j4JNdg-nWwe41FR3cAq1Q9-Vl-U7GCyTOvjxLM=) to defeat us.
[**I know we have what it takes to achieve a historic victory – but ONLY if we have the resources to compete with Republicans and their massive fundraising advantage.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66123512/415401657/1662333042?refcode=20230707_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzkyODRmNi1lYjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=76_e3j4JNdg-nWwe41FR3cAq1Q9-Vl-U7GCyTOvjxLM=)
[**_That’s why I’m counting on an unprecedented response – 2,174 gifts before midnight – to ensure we outraise the right-wing extremists, defend our swing-seat Democrats and retake our House majority. ---
| **Stark and Summit Counties**
This weekend we have 3 opportunities to defend our democracy and oppose the passage of Issue 1 on August 8th.

Issue 1 would would make it much harder for citizens to change the state constitution, raising the bar for passage of citizen-led ballot initiatives from 50% to 60%. This would upend over 100 years of majority rule for constitutional amendments and would allow just 40% of the state's citizens to veto the wishes of the majority.

[You can learn more about Issue 1 here.](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=4133914468&e=7730fa895a)

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/thank-you?e=1722d05e10)
---

---
| |
July 7, 2023

Friend,

First and foremost, I hope you and your family had a wonderful Independence Day.

I am reaching out today to express my sincere thanks for your generous support this past week as we approached the June 30th campaign reporting deadline. With your help, we met and exceeded our midyear goal, proving to Republican leadership and our opponents that we have momentum and we can flip this seat!

I cannot thank you enough for your incredible support since the start of our campaign. Supporters like you make all the difference in running a successful campaign!

As we move forward, I remain committed to fighting for the best interests of the Valley and its residents.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress
---

|
