name: MEDICAID EXPANSION PROJECT [via Roy Cooper HQ]
subject: Tell Republicans: Decouple Medicaid Expansion & pass it NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Here’s the deal:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66124417/415404289/823540626?refcode=ea.c881a686-ef1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.c881a686-ef1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODgxYTY4Ni1lZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vqmSPOlyw-ILfmmeGYe81rLh0REchbgsw1ZTHB5KAUg=&emci=e7ecfb9e-d01c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=c881a686-ef1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter, this email needs your attention. Roy and North Carolina Democrats spent _years_ working to expand Medicaid so more North Carolinians could access the health care coverage they need and deserve. Earlier this spring, Republicans _finally_ came to the table and agreed on a framework for passage — and Roy was proud to sign it into law. **But now, Republican legislators have failed to take the next necessary step to enact Medicaid expansion: agree on a budget for our state.** **[Roy needs YOUR HELP to get health care coverage to the people who need it. Sign on to let the GOP know you DEMAND they decouple Medicaid Expansion from our budget!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66124418/415404298/1329377746?refcode=ea.c881a686-ef1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.c881a686-ef1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODgxYTY4Ni1lZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vqmSPOlyw-ILfmmeGYe81rLh0REchbgsw1ZTHB5KAUg=&emci=e7ecfb9e-d01c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=c881a686-ef1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66124419/415404306/1329377746?refcode=ea.c881a686-ef1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.c881a686-ef1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODgxYTY4Ni1lZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vqmSPOlyw-ILfmmeGYe81rLh0REchbgsw1ZTHB5KAUg=&emci=e7ecfb9e-d01c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=c881a686-ef1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
---
Look, tying Medicaid Expansion to the budget was unnecessary from the start — and now, it’s costing our state and hospitals millions of dollars while ripping health care away from thousands.
_It’s just plain wrong._

clean_body: Here’s the deal: | Peter, this email needs your attention. Roy and North Carolina Democrats spent years working to expand Medicaid so more North Carolinians could access the health care coverage they need and deserve. Earlier this spring, Republicans finally came to the table and agreed on a framework for passage — and Roy was proud to sign it into law. But now, Republican legislators have failed to take the next necessary step to enact Medicaid expansion: agree on a budget for our state. | Look, tying Medicaid Expansion to the budget was unnecessary from the start — and now, it’s costing our state and hospitals millions of dollars while ripping health care away from thousands. It’s just plain wrong. Thank you! name: Sean Feucht
subject: Stolen Guitar Update: Repentance and FORGIVENESS!!!
body:
God is STILL at work!! | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=4df23d11da4e4acebfff4adcf08aca91&_e=5XJuIY5LZ8SVqZIYJ-Xc01yv9HpiuYRgfCglXjzPHW0JoejEMzHIy_MKNvXfFL6nzOyhmsLIWu_9I5sB4eILTTV3ikXRgtOkV2vV9AUKatM6MM8a6elRoXNA4tZya-AfP0lmwRkhE25zqnUBW4MC0gPzz29bP0q-bhUd6Sw0KfoUbXt5JmfW2UsXT9KklQVZ_7sz74nsTu5MptBZvOe_ZfycrgqT0ZoHvRxi_j02DFf_cwULbB9o1h3nWHhuqtuDbsVRB2iTLR3jqTru-LfFzv2Y9jrZmF5sUwh5HjK5lLDEGMu5jmxhG84l_5DyZckN)
---
Dear Friend,
---
We have an AMAZING update on my stolen guitar! When my vehicle was vandalized and my prized guitar was stolen, we knew God was working behind the scenes. At the time, we prayed my guitar would be a burden that caused the thief to return the guitar, repent, and give his life to Jesus!! Let me give you an update to the story!

Dean was doing street ministry when he ran into Zach, who confessed to breaking into my car and stealing my guitar. Dean pulled out his phone and played videos of Let Us Worship revivals, and Zach repented and asked for forgiveness! How cool is that!! Now he has not yet given his life to the Lord, but this story's not over. We will be in Spokane on August 20th, and I invited Zach to our revival—this is shaping up to be one POWERFUL testimony!!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=4df23d11da4e4acebfff4adcf08aca91&_e=5XJuIY5LZ8SVqZIYJ-Xc01yv9HpiuYRgfCglXjzPHW0JoejEMzHIy_MKNvXfFL6nzOyhmsLIWu_9I5sB4eILTTV3ikXRgtOkV2vV9AUKatM6MM8a6elRoXNA4tZya-AfP0lmwRkhE25zqnUBW4MC0gPzz29bP0q-bhUd6Sw0KfoWSS2ZJFGcbnifG0VLJSwEngzL-2ybo48p_0hMhT1L-PCFCK3hBDOEbSKCI3HpCvv1CZzP78kMbZcAkuuXpvqfH5bmBYctTzcF8N_Fq1esOOmoXK_WaRQ5bnxFdJrhLA6LkxRsHiZ3kh49erzbLJ7i)
---
I'm reminded of Genesis 20, "You intended to harm me, but God intended it for good to accomplish what is now being done, _**the saving of many lives**_." Do we not serve serve and AMAZING God!?!
---
[**SUPPORT LET US WORSHIP >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=4df23d11da4e4acebfff4adcf08aca91&_e=5XJuIY5LZ8SVqZIYJ-Xc01yv9HpiuYRgfCglXjzPHW21-3XA5Kye3BfKCDeEb9gS4Xht3bTYlS0P6kNtHCoCwBt7g7NgcbpDgmSlsXIrt5j-0OhYMJashjcqC6iFymeN-iKov3In_dtmmCyNGmjHAxwcNw5OJUkQjeTQ4PTrCwhZ2sO4kuTPcnpvB0-xZfaEWb7_T8JuYJnzn-SDexxJYvgfUXD7lxgDY-FwFgVfX9T6jSrRkt8vYmGNmld1D1neBKTx2m0PSjzzMc7ss_Yr_laoi8ApJVn65QmCxHfDCHYf1MiIG6Gthsgh5jCHBvJc9J2G2qJLk_FabgWXVYhLVg%3D%3D)
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean

# [Josh Shapiro Betrays Pennsylvania Children](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=133685591&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTMzNjg1NTkxLCJpYXQiOjE2ODg3NTMzMDEsImV4cCI6MTY5MTM0NTMwMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.P_IaQ4NZ7GGzcSBV3_43hEMOy2P66utJvHIRtqfEm3Q)
### Freedom Caucus fights for school choice.
| | [Andy Roth](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5c67c85d-68a2-44b0-9982-53b371958da8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Jul 7
---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5c67c85d-68a2-44b0-9982-53b371958da8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack..lHOShFMRa9L9HvHX4uDEkbD48tdQC_r2gEdUsBY0-ck?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=133685591&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTMzNjg1NTkxLCJpYXQiOjE2ODg3NTMzMDEsImV4cCI6MTY5MTM0NTMwMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.P_IaQ4NZ7GGzcSBV3_43hEMOy2P66utJvHIRtqfEm3Q)
---
The PA Freedom Caucus fought the "Education Establishment" at all levels this past week - both at the K-12 level and in higher education.
First, at the K-12 level. Democrat Josh Shapiro was just elected governor of the Keystone State last year and he obviously has ambitions to run for president in the future. But unlike most Democrats of his stature, he actually ran on the promise of expanding school choice in PA, reiterating that position several times in his first 100 days in office.
Recently, the Republican-controlled state senate passed a budget that includes a $100M appropriation for school vouchers and scholarships that primarily gives expanded educational opportunities to lower-income children. The only problem is that the Democrat-controlled state house refused to vote for it despite constant pressure from our Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus.
Instead of using his bully pulpit to support school choice as he promised to voters, Josh Shapiro decided to cave to his party and the teachers' unions and announced he would line-item veto the appropriation, denying thousands of Pennsylvania's children the chance at a better future.
It's a "read my lips" type of broken campaign promise and it didn't happen by accident. Teachers' Unions donated $775K to Gov. Shapiro, nearly $120K to the House Democrats Campaign Committee, a $123.5K check to Democrat House Speaker Joanna McClinton, as well as five figure checks to other House Dem leaders. **They are getting exactly what they paid for.**
Oh yeah, and Gov. Shapiro sends his kids to a $30K-per-year private school. Choice for him but not low-income families in the commonwealth.
Read this Twitter [thread](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/13a1a981-fff7-44c1-a074-abf507f0ba3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from State Freedom Caucus Network Comms Director Greg Price for more info (it currently has over 1.4 million views).
Second, the PA Freedom Caucus is also fighting the woke liberals running Penn State, Temple, and Pitt University. Several weeks ago, the PAFC announced that it would oppose funding for these schools if their medical centers continued to support transgender services for minors.
**Thanks to the PAFC 's efforts, the scope of the fight has expanded.** Now lawmakers want to know why these universities are exempt from the state's open record transparency laws. Why do these schools keep raising tuition when taxpayer funding is given specifically so tuition isn't raised?
The universities have arrogantly decided to dismiss all of these commonsense concerns. They are hoping the Democrats, using blunt force, can just push their funding bill through. But the PAFC-led coalition of state lawmakers have BLOCKED the funding proposal. **Not once or twice, but three times.**
We are now in the stage of battle where things will get nasty. Democrats will try to pick lawmakers off of the opposition. They will likely use procedural tactics to jam their agenda through. They will do whatever it takes to pass the funding bill...anything except telling the universities to accept much-needed reforms. One thing is for certain though...the PA Freedom Caucus isn't going to buckle. Stay tuned for more as this story develops.
**South Dakota**
We've written extensively about the eminent domain fight in South Dakota. A company with ties to China wants to seize the property of landowners for a carbon capture pipeline so that ethanol plants in Iowa can improve their ESG scores.
The SD Freedom Caucus has been at the forefront of this fight. They have publicly demanded that Gov. Kristi Noem call a special session of the legislature to protect these landowners.
Just yesterday, the SD Freedom Caucus was part of a massive rally at the state capitol in which several lawmakers and landowners spoke in opposition to the proposed pipeline. They collected over 2,000 signatures for a petition calling on Noem to announce a special session. And they personally delivered them to her office.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5810a6a2-413d-410d-ab2c-f67e3b5114c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The SDFC will continue the fight to protect the property rights of their constituents.
**Keep up with the Freedom Caucus in your state**
Our state Freedom Caucuses are spreading the message of freedom on Twitter, Facebook, and Substack.

clean_body: Freedom Caucus fights for school choice. | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? Freedom Caucus fights for school choice. | | | Jul 7 | | | | | | The PA Freedom Caucus fought the "Education Establishment" at all levels this past week - both at the K-12 level and in higher education. First, at the K-12 level. Democrat Josh Shapiro was just elected governor of the Keystone State last year and he obviously has ambitions to run for president in the future. But unlike most Democrats of his stature, he actually ran on the promise of expanding school choice in PA, reiterating that position several times in his first 100 days in office. Recently, the Republican-controlled state senate passed a budget that includes a $100M appropriation for school vouchers and scholarships that primarily gives expanded educational opportunities to lower-income children. The only problem is that the Democrat-controlled state house refused to vote for it despite constant pressure from our Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus. Instead of using his bully pulpit to support school choice as he promised to voters, Josh Shapiro decided to cave to his party and the teachers' unions and announced he would line-item veto the appropriation, denying thousands of Pennsylvania's children the chance at a better future. It's a "read my lips" type of broken campaign promise and it didn't happen by accident. Teachers' Unions donated $775K to Gov. Shapiro, nearly $120K to the House Democrats Campaign Committee, a $123.5K check to Democrat House Speaker Joanna McClinton, as well as five figure checks to other House Dem leaders. They are getting exactly what they paid for. Oh yeah, and Gov. Shapiro sends his kids to a $30K-per-year private school. Choice for him but not low-income families in the commonwealth. Read this Twitter from State Freedom Caucus Network Comms Director Greg Price for more info (it currently has over 1.4 million views). Second, the PA Freedom Caucus is also fighting the woke liberals running Penn State, Temple, and Pitt University. Several weeks ago, the PAFC announced that it would oppose funding for these schools if their medical centers continued to support transgender services for minors. Thanks to the PAFC 's efforts, the scope of the fight has expanded. Now lawmakers want to know why these universities are exempt from the state's open record transparency laws. Why do these schools keep raising tuition when taxpayer funding is given specifically so tuition isn't raised? The universities have arrogantly decided to dismiss all of these commonsense concerns. They are hoping the Democrats, using blunt force, can just push their funding bill through. But the PAFC-led coalition of state lawmakers have BLOCKED the funding proposal. Not once or twice, but three times. We are now in the stage of battle where things will get nasty. Democrats will try to pick lawmakers off of the opposition. They will likely use procedural tactics to jam their agenda through. They will do whatever it takes to pass the funding bill...anything except telling the universities to accept much-needed reforms. One thing is for certain though...the PA Freedom Caucus isn't going to buckle. Stay tuned for more as this story develops. South Dakota We've written extensively about the eminent domain fight in South Dakota. A company with ties to China wants to seize the property of landowners for a carbon capture pipeline so that ethanol plants in Iowa can improve their ESG scores. The SD Freedom Caucus has been at the forefront of this fight. They have publicly demanded that Gov. Kristi Noem call a special session of the legislature to protect these landowners. Just yesterday, the SD Freedom Caucus was part of a massive rally at the state capitol in which several lawmakers and landowners spoke in opposition to the proposed pipeline. They collected over 2,000 signatures for a petition calling on Noem to announce a special session. And they personally delivered them to her office. | | ---|---|--- The SDFC will continue the fight to protect the property rights of their constituents. Keep up with the Freedom Caucus in your state Our state Freedom Caucuses are spreading the message of freedom on Twitter, Facebook, and Substack. name: Giffords.org
subject: Sign on to show your support for safe storage laws
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Gun violence is the LEADING cause of death for children in our nation. Not car crashes. Not cancer. Guns.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_safestoragejuly23/?source=em230707-1-15&refcode2=6108.3935704.4oPYjH&akid=6108%2E3935704%2E4oPYjH)
A new article from CNN tells a horrific truth: far too many children in America are able to access firearms because they are stored unsafely in their homes.
The scientific journal _Injury Epidemiology_ found that over the course of nearly a decade, 64% of accidental gun deaths of children under 15 happened in their own homes. 92% of these fatal shootings were caused because the firearm was left unlocked and loaded in their home. It was also found that over 40% of these unintentional deaths by firearms happened among kids aged 2 to 4.
[**Will you sign our petition today to show your support for commonsense gun safety measures like safe storage laws to help protect our children?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_safestoragejuly23/?source=em230707-1-15&refcode2=6108.3935704.4oPYjH&akid=6108%2E3935704%2E4oPYjH)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_safestoragejuly23/?source=em230707-1-15&refcode2=6108.3935704.4oPYjH&akid=6108%2E3935704%2E4oPYjH)**
Gun violence is the LEADING cause of death for children in our nation. Not car crashes. Not cancer. Guns.
_Toddlers_ are dying due to guns being unsafely stored. We cannot let this fatal trend continue. In order to protect our children, we must work together until safe storage laws are passed in every state in our nation.
[**So please, take a moment to sign our petition today and show your support for safe storage laws.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_safestoragejuly23/?source=em230707-1-15&refcode2=6108.3935704.4oPYjH&akid=6108%2E3935704%2E4oPYjH)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_safestoragejuly23/?source=em230707-1-15&refcode2=6108.3935704.4oPYjH&akid=6108%2E3935704%2E4oPYjH)**
We appreciate you taking the time to use your voice. We must work together to keep guns out of children’s hands.
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=6108%2E3935704%2E4oPYjH) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: We need your help in Baton Rouge this Saturday!
body:

I’ve been traveling across the state, visiting each and every one of our 64 beautiful, unique parishes. But I need your help. clean_body: We need some volunteers to assist this Saturday, July 8th, at the Louisiana Governor’s Forum put on by local church groups and held at Southern University.| | | | | Friend, This is Dr. Shawn Wilson , and I am running for Governor of Louisiana because I believe that by minimizing extreme policies, we can ensure long-term, sustainable solutions to keep Louisiana moving forward. I am running to build a better future for all of us. I’ve been traveling across the state, visiting each and every one of our 64 beautiful, unique parishes. But I need your help. If we are going to win this election for all of us, I need more boots on the ground to get the word out about a candidate who has real solutions to issues that impact all of us. to assist this Saturday, July 8th , at the Louisiana Governor’s Forum put on bylocal church groups and held at Southern University at801 Harding Blvd in Baton Rouge. Thank you in advance for your support,Shawn Wilson = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Box 4572 Baton Rouge, LA 70821 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
The 2024 GOP presidential field is growing larger by the week. And as that list of names grows, the rhetoric around the 2024 landscape gets more and more extreme. **** The 2024 GOP presidential field is growing larger by the week. And as that list of names grows, the rhetoric around the 2024 landscape gets more and more extreme. | Just take a look at a few of these candidates:
* Former President Donald Trump is currently under indictment on 37 federal charges — including obstruction of justice — and is still leading the pack for the nomination.

* As the Governor of Florida, DeSantis has made fighting the so-called ‘war on woke’ the center of his agenda to whip up his base — putting educational standards and the safety of LGBTQIA+ Americans on the line.

* Former South Carolina Governor Nikki Haley wants to erase tax credits for Americans making clean energy investments — further damaging our fragile climate.

* Mike Pence supports a federal ban on gender-affirming care for children and has a long history of anti-abortion stances that he will surely bring to the White House.

... _and that’s just to name a few._

clean_body: The 2024 GOP presidential field is growing larger by the week. And as that list of names grows, the rhetoric around the 2024 landscape gets more and more extreme. ** The 2024 GOP presidential field is growing larger by the week. And as that list of names grows, the rhetoric around the 2024 landscape gets more and more extreme. | Just take a look at a few of these candidates: Former President Donald Trump is currently under indictment on 37 federal charges — including obstruction of justice — and is still leading the pack for the nomination. As the Governor of Florida, DeSantis has made fighting the so-called ‘war on woke’ the center of his agenda to whip up his base — putting educational standards and the safety of LGBTQIA+ Americans on the line. Former South Carolina Governor Nikki Haley wants to erase tax credits for Americans making clean energy investments — further damaging our fragile climate. Mike Pence supports a federal ban on gender-affirming care for children and has a long history of anti-abortion stances that he will surely bring to the White House. ... and that’s just to name a few. Peter, which leading GOP presidential candidate are you most concerned about? | | | | | No matter who the nominee is next year against President Biden, Democrats across the country have to mobilize now to defeat the GOP presidential challenger, hold the Senate, and restore a Democratic majority in the House. Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts. — Team Dean Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress. We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Who is Fox News’ Jesse Watters?
body:
Here’s why Carlson’s replacement is just as dangerous for American Democracy.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1212%2E120351%2EvwwktQ)
Peter, Fox News has finally found someone to fill fired anchor Tucker Carlson’s primetime slot... this guy, Jesse Watters. 👇

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230707?refcode=em20230707&amount=5&refcode2=1212_120351_vwwktQ&akid=1212%2E120351%2EvwwktQ)
In a second, we’ll break down why Carlson’s replacement is just as dangerous as he ever was, but if you’re in a rush, **here’s the short version:**
[**Carlson and Watters are two sides of the same coin, spreading misinformation and hateful rhetoric to millions of people. Our local newsrooms are fighting the misinformation these bad actors create in real-time, but to go up against news giants like Jesse Watters and Fox, they need your support. Will you chip in $5 now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230707?refcode=em20230707&amount=5&refcode2=1212_120351_vwwktQ&akid=1212%2E120351%2EvwwktQ)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230707?refcode=em20230707&amount=5&refcode2=1212_120351_vwwktQ&akid=1212%2E120351%2EvwwktQ)**
Okay, here’s what you need to know. Watters made a name for himself working on _The O’Reilly Factor_ where he spread homophobic stereotypes, mocked immigrants, and ran dehumanizing coverage on homelessness.
And since taking over as the anchor in Fox News’ premier primetime slot, Watters has doubled-down on Tucker Carlson’s playbook of spreading misinformation to advance right-wing causes. Since taking the anchor chair he’s:
* Claimed the FBI has already rigged the 2024 election.
* Accused the Biden family of being an intelligence operation.
* Called for a federal government takeover of San Francisco.

**We know how dangerous this kind of misinformation can be, Peter.** Watters reaches millions of viewers nightly. Just like Carlson and Bill O’Reilly before him, Watters is inflaming the anger and distrust that’s dividing our communities and led to the violent insurrection on our Capitol.
As long as Fox News has a misinformation machine like Jesse Watters in a high-profile, primetime slot, Courier’s network of local newsrooms will be working day and night to **neutralize the misinformation, set the record straight online, and restore trust in our democracy.**
[**At Courier Newsroom, we deliver fact-based, trustworthy journalism to online communities that are vulnerable to misinformation. To power our work, we’re relying on grassroots supporters like you, so will you chip in $5 now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230707?refcode=em20230707&amount=5&refcode2=1212_120351_vwwktQ&akid=1212%2E120351%2EvwwktQ)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230707?refcode=em20230707&amount=5&refcode2=1212_120351_vwwktQ&akid=1212%2E120351%2EvwwktQ)**
Thank you,
Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1212_120351_vwwktQ&akid=1212%2E120351%2EvwwktQ)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1212%2E120351%2EvwwktQ)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

| | Friend, As you may have seen in the news recently, a proposed rule in New York City would regulate shops using coal-fired pizza ovens in the name of defeating climate change. Before we know it, a policy like this could soon be coming to pizzerias _all across New Jersey_. Before that happens, we want to hear from you, friend:
---
[](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=5bd4baf84b134a18bbb06ef1f5df6ffa&_e=CSPmjxxCMDDa5kr6GBdStidyM-KYaTzgwiraKEldlJR3nOO61uLGMsVYenptevpfU91O02NMtp9D6uwBltmh6a1eFiVpI4fF-oISoPcLd8DoTsPBPlRuYVnSFMVg11CFK68q2erBC340QmSRN_0UlHlwbRnYrxxldEAnh3UDZVaEu9Q1Bjo4EIIxiFt4XRf1Q0ddHldFtXwc6l_WsX0olo4ZJ48J1jQpx60q1ItoWyfQUUFI2o9dP31Va48JD3qfsex80VedlS3u3SFFpW9RmDUigm4UT_75TBTK37ie3h5RR0-5HCiDezYZxaC19agljCX0_cXm6v5XZS8TN9-vV6b2NQQE8zQedL4pGtHG8biL16xX6k6nj2-G6KIwE4xV)

Team — I’m not going to sugarcoat this: We're watching conservative extremists destroy decades of progress.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66134745/415416121/-4707655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzQzNjI4Yi1mODFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xsjoArZ8ZNz542KEXzf9nllgC9m8ND8C2y13ZwlP0CQ=&emci=8de23d68-d31c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=5343628b-f81c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364) Team — I’m not going to sugarcoat this: We're watching conservative extremists destroy decades of progress.

From legalizing discrimination against LGBTQ+ Americans and saddling over 40 million Americans with student debt, to striking down gun safety measures and ripping away the fundamental right to choose — the misguided decisions of this extremist court are harming real people.

We can pass federal legislation restoring the right to choose.

We can help protect LGBTQ+ people by passing the Equality Act.

We can take action to expand access to education and free hard-working Americans from the burden of crushing debt.

We can pass universal background checks and ban assault weapons.

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: We asked and you delivered
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
I just wanted to say thank you to everyone who made a contribution to this campaign in the past 90 days.

| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_asked_and_you_deliverednon1&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, I want to thank everyone who made a contribution to this campaign in the past 90 days. As you know, the race for the White House in 2024 may be the most important election in our lifetime and your support has been critical in generating our momentum. **I’d like to share this video I made specially to express my gratitude and give you an inside look into my personal journey that brought me here.
** [](https://www.kennedy24.com/we_asked_you_delivered?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_asked_and_you_deliverednon1&n=2) **When we sent out an email last week, we had barely raised $3 million total**. With your incredible support, we’ve gone over $6 million, doubling what we had on hand in the last 3 days before the FEC June 30th filing deadline. That’s right, in the final 3 days of the second quarter of 2023, we raised an average of $1 million a day. We’re humbled by the tremendous support from people all across the political spectrum. Of course, these numbers pale in comparison to the hundreds of millions my opponents plan to spend on this election. We are doing a lot more with less. Every dollar you give does the work of ten or fifty ordinary campaign dollars. So if you are in a position to do so, please consider making a donation today to keep this momentum going. With your help, we are going to reclaim the White House for honesty, peace, freedom, and real democracy. **[As little as $3, or of course more, makes a difference in helping put me, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., in the White House.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_asked_and_you_deliverednon1&n=3)** | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_asked_and_you_deliverednon1&n=4) [Give $5 ->](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_asked_and_you_deliverednon1&n=5)

clean_body: I just wanted to say thank you to everyone who made a contribution to this campaign in the past 90 days. | Dear Peter, I want to thank everyone who made a contribution to this campaign in the past 90 days. As you know, the race for the White House in 2024 may be the most important election in our lifetime and your support has been critical in generating our momentum. I’d like to share this video I made specially to express my gratitude and give you an inside look into my personal journey that brought me here. When we sent out an email last week, we had barely raised $3 million total. With your incredible support, we’ve gone over $6 million, doubling what we had on hand in the last 3 days before the FEC June 30th filing deadline. That’s right, in the final 3 days of the second quarter of 2023, we raised an average of $1 million a day. We’re humbled by the tremendous support from people all across the political spectrum. Of course, these numbers pale in comparison to the hundreds of millions my opponents plan to spend on this election. We are doing a lot more with less. Every dollar you give does the work of ten or fifty ordinary campaign dollars. So if you are in a position to do so, please consider making a donation today to keep this momentum going. With your help, we are going to reclaim the White House for honesty, peace, freedom, and real democracy. | "Give $27 ->" "Give $50 ->" "Give $100 ->" "Give $250 ->" "Give $500 ->" "Other Amount ->" Today, the government and media have lost our trust. They have lied to us, impoverished us, hollowed out our infrastructure, and provoked one unnecessary war after another. Because of you, our campaign is being heard on these and other crucial issues. We’re already making a difference. I’m inspired by your generosity. I promise to continue to put it to good use, in the campaign and in the Presidency that will follow. Thank you so much. Sincerely, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! | | | [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7eb2785643c9438988b4cf128cf85179&_e=NzNvS4Ibl6R54QEvX8qz4IBS6C0wCecABnaq6q1faf846WLvTH0crY0dF7XVciGSUd2_yPIGoaYmHyBF1ilO0NxCJQ8m9EuztjSQkD9A1me3Zyhqk-Cfid4ysj7gO4nFsQtN8A16tpN-g4fXCMbmRLyjflIdYut4txkHy9q9S253NpZMXx5X9dGSCzEZRZPQPf18SVOpYWkf73uslrBF8NBhaEUcUU9kW9fbLSv5ZfPjTy4VGVKWkX-jbOmCj8Tj2IfJZ5ms-qnf2Xf_R1hOKu5PkUS9_pU79W2pPc6Tp_y1MJkzjkgvscWPpAG05c2n2Y_R0__7_zOuHG-grMxwQlMNlXdMwLgAsUfym0Czecw7_xAYTLOKUOzahGXCgRZYfZ1BVrNJmxVtBHMzdy9C6w%3D%3D)

Friend,
Because we keep rising and rising in the polls, the disloyal Republicans - who are out to stop us in the primary - just added another $70 MILLION in pledges to their sinister plot to destroy us.
That brings their pledged grand total to **$370 MILLION.**
Why aren't they pledging to spend that money to beat Crooked Joe instead?
Because these two-faced, back-stabbing RINOs would rather have four more years of Biden and Kamala than someone who actually fights for the Silent Majority.
**_These RINOs want a Republican nominee who will appease the Deep State and let the new tyrannical status quo continue._**
**_Appeasement is not possible when our liberty and justice are being ripped from right under us._**
These cowards just watched the federal government INDICT and ARRAIGN me as an innocent man - and yet, their response is to drop to their knees and beg the Deep State for mercy...
_... To spend hundreds of millions of dollars to push us even closer to tyranny._
But I have a GREAT idea to counter this latest $70 MILLION pledge...
As you know, our movement has over 74 MILLION voters. With just $1 from each of us, we'd OUTRAISE these traitors within the snap of a finger.
But - it only works if we all do it!
That's why I'm asking you to give whatever you can - even if that's $1, there are so many of us, that it all adds up FAST - to counter this $370 million RINO plot to stop us.

name: Senator Rick Scott
subject: The Democrats want me gone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC

name: Katie Porter
subject: thinking about the job of California’s Senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26119%2E3422442%2EqTCbPk)
Derek, I’m running to represent California in the United States Senate. Let me tell you what the job means to me:
* **Advocating for Californians:** It’s my job to make sure federal policy works for California families. Earlier this year, I introduced the Supporting Americans with Lower Taxes Act to revise state and local tax deductions. This would reverse Trump tax code changes that unfairly punished middle class taxpayers in blue states.
* **Bringing the best ideas from California to the rest of the country:** Our state is a leader in so many areas. From electric vehicle infrastructure to free community college, I’ll fight to bring the best California policies nationwide.
* **Standing up to corruption and special interests:** I’ve never taken a dime from corporate PACs and I don’t take federal lobbyist money. I’m leading the fight to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks. I work only for my constituents.
* **Showing up in every part of the state:** I grew up on a farm, and know rural areas are often overlooked. From Redding, to Bakersfield, to Indio, and everywhere in between, I promise to hear directly from diverse voices.
* **Helping Democrats win tough seats:** California itself could deliver the House majority to Democrats, but we need leaders at the top of the ticket who can help turn out voters. I’ve represented a swing district and know how to win tough races. As a Senator, I’d be ready to play an important role representing Democrats all across the country, helping us win tough swing seats. I love campaigning!

I’m thrilled about the strong start we’ve had to this campaign, but we need to keep the momentum going. [**Can you chip in today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230707-1?refcode=EMAJ07_1_EVR_20230707_V1_F&refcode2=26119_3422442_qTCbPk&akid=26119%2E3422442%2EqTCbPk)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230707-1?refcode=EMAJ07_1_EVR_20230707_V1_F&refcode2=26119_3422442_qTCbPk&akid=26119%2E3422442%2EqTCbPk)**
Thanks for considering,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ07_1_EVR_20230707_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=26119_3422442_qTCbPk&akid=26119%2E3422442%2EqTCbPk)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=26119%2E3422442%2EqTCbPk)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=26119%2E3422442%2EqTCbPk)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: For years, I’ve warned that today’s Republican Party is a threat to our Democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66136254/415420428/-473662111?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230707_FR_7NP2_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJmYWNkNzlmLWZhMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RqDD00CkHO9RQ-1knM132yHSipzfUzDUOjcyHPvup04=)
---
Friend,

Today, I’m asking you to join me in supporting Attorney General Eric Holder and the National Democratic Redistricting Committee and their critically important work. I hope you’ll give me the chance to explain why, but **if you’re already on board, you can pitch in now using this link:[_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndrc-nancypelosi_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66136255/415420429/-473662111?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230707_FR_7NP2_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJmYWNkNzlmLWZhMWMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RqDD00CkHO9RQ-1knM132yHSipzfUzDUOjcyHPvup04=)**

For years, I’ve warned that today’s Republican Party is a threat to our Democracy. The NDRC, led by my friend, Eric Holder, has been fighting back **_for years_** – and it has achieved great success. **Thanks to their efforts, the 2022 midterm elections took place on the fairest congressional maps in 40 years.**

Recently, the Supreme Court issued major pro-voter, pro-Democracy decisions in cases pursued by our fair maps movement, siding with voters and upholding our system of checks and balances. But we know the threats to our Democracy do not end with one or two decisions.

You and I both know that this fight for fair maps and our Democracy is far from over. That’s why the NDRC needs our help to continue building this movement – and it’s why I’m asking you to consider donating today to help power its work.

**The NDRC’s work is made possible by grassroots supporters like you. I know not everyone reading this message will be able to give, but I’m hoping that just 12 generous donors from your area will do their part to strengthen our Democracy by making a contribution of any amount before midnight tonight.**
**Will you be one of them, friend?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

clean_body: | | = Friend, Today, I’m asking you to join me in supporting Attorney General Eric Holder and the National Democratic Redistricting Committee and their critically important work. I hope you’ll give me the chance to explain why, but if you’re already on board, you can pitch in now using this link:= For years, I’ve warned that today’s Republican Party is a threat to our Democracy. The NDRC, led by my friend, Eric Holder, has been fighting back for years – and it has achieved great success. Thanks to their efforts, the 2022 midterm elections took place on the fairest congressional maps in 40 years. Recently, the Supreme Court issued major pro-voter, pro-Democracy decisions in cases pursued by our fair maps movement, siding with voters and upholding our system of checks and balances. But we know the threats to our Democracy do not end with one or two decisions. You and I both know that this fight for fair maps and our Democracy is far from over. That’s why the NDRC needs our help to continue building this movement – and it’s why I’m asking you to consider donating today to help power its work. The NDRC’s work is made possible by grassroots supporters like you. I know not everyone reading this message will be able to give, but I’m hoping that just 12 generous donors from your area will do their part to strengthen our Democracy by making a contribution of any amount before midnight tonight. Will you be one of them, friend? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Together, we can prevail against the forces seeking to weaken our Democracy – I’m sure of it. name: =?utf-8?Q?Carmen=20Goers?=
subject: Black Diamond Councilman Brad Douglass endorses Carmen Goers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carmen for Congress]( "Paid for by Carmen for Congress")
body:
“Carmen understands that all government begins with local voices.” | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/58b8cd394b74/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13561131?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=3fb2663c68&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| **I’m excited to announce that Black Diamond Councilman Brad Douglass has endorsed my candidacy to serve Washingtonians in Congress!**

Brad moved to Black Diamond with his family in 2021, and began serving on the Council in January 2023 to champion personal liberties and support small businesses.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=0deedc03a5&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| **Brad shared the following statement:**

_“I am proud to endorse Carmen Goers for the 8th congressional district. Black Diamond is a growing and changing community. Carmen recognizes that with this growth comes additional challenges and the need for support at the federal level to help Black Diamond thrive, while ensuring that the Federal Government maintains a balanced budget and does not overtax our small businesses and our residents. Carmen understands that all government begins with local voices and that in Congress she would help Black Diamond address self-professed growing pains, including its schools. I am proud to support her and her journey to become our next congresswoman.”_

**I am honored and grateful to receive the endorsement of Black Diamond Councilman Brad Douglass**. Brad's commitment to individual freedoms and thriving small businesses aligns closely with my own values and priorities.

Growth and infrastructure development compel us to make decisions about how to properly utilize the finite resource of taxpayer dollars.

_Limitless federal spending cannot continue_ no matter how great the call to action given the inflationary impact that continues to stifle Washington families who struggle to make ends meet.

**Peter, your support will make all the difference in whether I am able to apply my banking experience to balanced federal spending that prioritizes Americans over radical projects and unbridled foreign aid! **

[**Can I rely on you to chip in $20, $30 or $40 today to demonstrate our resolve to put our financial house in order?**](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=ba05ea6bfb&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| [ENDORSE GOERS FOR CONGRESS »](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=638ff6b32a&e=0e51d1e991 "ENDORSE GOERS FOR CONGRESS »")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY »](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=3cbcea1d93&e=0e51d1e991 "CONTRIBUTE TODAY »")
---
| For Washington,
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=88d74871ab&e=0e51d1e991)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=logo]
Join us for a Summer Block Party in support of

Majority Whip Jazz Lewis
Chair, Public Safety & Administration and Vice Chair, Capital Budget Subcommittee
House Appropriations Committee

Guest Speakers
DJ and Live Music
Food Trucks
Fun for the Family

Saturday, August 12th, 2023
12:00-3:00pm
Arbor Park
1100 Arbor Park Pl.
Bowie, MD 20721

RSVP > [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazzfestblockparty]
For questions or to RSVP contact: adam@skybp.com or (240) 283-4899
As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Majority Whip in the Maryland House. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Bowie with his wife and son.

body:
| | Since I launched my campaign for Congress, I’ve heard from so many people in our community — and every story I hear reminds me why I’m in this fight.

Listening to your concerns and hearing directly from voters like you makes me a better candidate and a better leader. Your input is so important to me.

[That’s why I’m asking you to fill out my Priorities Survey today. Will you take a few minutes to let me know what issues matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136605/415421934/-1403858297?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230707_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg0MzlkYmQtZmMxYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vOHP7SUIkmhbGRoKk2G9Qa8uhCaA6y4YTY7MBEKvPN4=&emci=dccc7cff-f11c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a8439dbd-fc1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971) | | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136606/415421938/-1403858297?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230707_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg0MzlkYmQtZmMxYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vOHP7SUIkmhbGRoKk2G9Qa8uhCaA6y4YTY7MBEKvPN4=&emci=dccc7cff-f11c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a8439dbd-fc1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)**
---
I know that we have what it takes to defeat Michelle Steel and give CA-45 real representation in Congress. We’re building a grassroots movement right here in Orange County – and with your help, we can win.

But first, I need to hear from each and every one of my grassroots supporters. [Please take a moment to fill out our Priorities Survey and share your thoughts with me today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136607/415421939/-1403858297?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230707_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg0MzlkYmQtZmMxYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vOHP7SUIkmhbGRoKk2G9Qa8uhCaA6y4YTY7MBEKvPN4=&emci=dccc7cff-f11c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a8439dbd-fc1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971) | **[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136608/415421940/-1403858297?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230707_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTg0MzlkYmQtZmMxYy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vOHP7SUIkmhbGRoKk2G9Qa8uhCaA6y4YTY7MBEKvPN4=&emci=dccc7cff-f11c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=a8439dbd-fc1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)**

I’ll be sitting down with my team soon to read all of your responses. I can’t wait to hear what’s on your mind!

– Kim

Listening to your concerns and hearing directly from voters like you makes me a better candidate and a better leader. We’re building a grassroots movement right here in Orange County – and with your help, we can win. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: MTG
body:
GOP’s lunatic caucus keeps the crazy coming
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15578fd0-2065-4044-b851-d819fa7d6da9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, As you may have heard, Marjorie Taylor Greene--of the Jewish lasers & Trumpian lies--was kicked out of the Freedom Caucus yesterday. The Freedom Caucus is the pleasantly named collection of far-right lunatics in the House. It's noteworthy because Greene was already hated by every human not as far Right as Ted Cruz. Now her old allies have turned on her too, for standing with Speaker McCarthy and a debt limit increase. Really, they needed a scapegoat as an angry, impotent force representing an America not present since ~1933. So, heading into 2024, while still in a very Trump district, Greene is weakened. She's still a crazy person, so she won't win Democrats, Independents or the few "Romney Republicans" still out there. And Supreme Court decisions overturning racial gerrymandering in nearby Alabama & Louisiana will be applied to Georgia too, which could make her district more competitive. [**If there's even a chance of getting rid of MTG next November, we must get the word out right now. At Blue Amp Action, we're passionate about flipping the House to Democrats next year and organizing EARLY. Will you help us by chipping in $5, $10 or whatever you can today to make sure people like Marjorie Taylor Greene and the Lauren Boebert lose next November?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62aeb74c-6a20-4d9d-ba14-c998cf55173f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**DONATE NOW!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72655fd2-3701-44d3-864a-2d3a64926ffb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
Cliff

---
| | |
---
|

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/boebertimpeachment-frisch4-n_copy1_copy1_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e187546-c08f-46dd-a5ed-3348ebc744de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=c848625d86-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
As always, it has been a busy week on the campaign trail! Independence Day is one of my favorite days of the year, and that is because I am able to celebrate the occasion with so many of you! This week found me in Carmel, Noblesville, and Westfield on the 4th of July. I also made stops in Monroe County and Clark County as well this week.

** CarmelFest
------------------------------------------------------------
CarmelFest Parade
CarmelFest Parade

** ICYMI: I was honored to receive the following endorsements this week...
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=c848625d86-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I have walked the entire distance of the Little Italy parade route for years with Lt. Gov. Suzanne Crouch and I have personally watched, and listened, to how she speaks to everyone and listens when they speak. As a Hoosier, in my veteran expert registered nursing assessment, she is a public servant and we need her in the top spot of our state."
Captain Meredith Addison
337th General Hospital-Fort Benjamin Harrison
1985 - 1995

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=c848625d86-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"As an active-duty WWII veteran, I understand the tenacity it takes to dig in and get things done. Suzanne has the tenacity to get accomplished in Indiana, what needs to be done to move out state forward in growth and keep our state secure for families."
Thurman Carnal
United States Army T-5
1942 - 1945

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=c848625d86-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I support Suzanne Crouch and believe she is fulfilling the mission to strengthen Indiana's rural economies and communities through capacity building, advocacy, and community economic development."
Andrea Brewer
United States Army SPC E-4
Veteran

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=c848625d86-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"It is my honor to endorse Suzanne Crouch for the Governor of the State of Indiana. I know of no other individual more qualified for the Office of Governor than Lt. Governor Crouch. Her vast experience in both local and state government is unparalleled. I encourage your support as well."
State Senator Jim Buck
SD-21

** In a victory for Life, this week the Indiana Supreme Court upheld Senate Bill 1!

subject: ‘Enough!’ James Woods SCHOOLS lefty journo eager to blow off WH cocaine debacle
body:

subject: Kernel of Truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ****_New Study Shows Indiana Far Behind on Maternal Mortality** **_ A new [study](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136902/415423326/1422480424?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE0YTBhYy1mZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQkVEJTT-OmFplSyxzqKtui11L-cqPC5TuM3fuxMeeY=&emci=2ce7a5f6-e01c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0ea4a0ac-ff1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) by the University of Washington shows that maternal mortality in Indiana is [among the worst](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136903/415423327/1545462003?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE0YTBhYy1mZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQkVEJTT-OmFplSyxzqKtui11L-cqPC5TuM3fuxMeeY=&emci=2ce7a5f6-e01c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0ea4a0ac-ff1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) in the entire country. It’s yet another example of how Republican control is failing Hoosier families. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136904/415423328/1373966112?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE0YTBhYy1mZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQkVEJTT-OmFplSyxzqKtui11L-cqPC5TuM3fuxMeeY=&emci=2ce7a5f6-e01c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0ea4a0ac-ff1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136905/415423329/1373966112?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE0YTBhYy1mZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQkVEJTT-OmFplSyxzqKtui11L-cqPC5TuM3fuxMeeY=&emci=2ce7a5f6-e01c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0ea4a0ac-ff1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Now with the Republican near-total abortion ban going into effect, it is more important than ever to fight back against attacks on bodily autonomy and the right to choose. Every woman in our state deserves access to safe, accessible reproductive healthcare. We must elect more Democrats to protect our rights and reverse this trend. ****_Biden’s Policies Bringing Down Cost at the Pump for Hoosiers_ Average gas prices in Indiana have fallen by over [$1.40 in the last year in Indiana](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136906/415423330/-1567340776?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE0YTBhYy1mZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQkVEJTT-OmFplSyxzqKtui11L-cqPC5TuM3fuxMeeY=&emci=2ce7a5f6-e01c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0ea4a0ac-ff1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), as President Biden’s focus on working families has helped gas prices cool quickly from their highs last summer. All while investing in the green energy future with record private investment in electric vehicles. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136907/415423331/-1479244211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE0YTBhYy1mZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQkVEJTT-OmFplSyxzqKtui11L-cqPC5TuM3fuxMeeY=&emci=2ce7a5f6-e01c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0ea4a0ac-ff1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136908/415423332/-1479244211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE0YTBhYy1mZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQkVEJTT-OmFplSyxzqKtui11L-cqPC5TuM3fuxMeeY=&emci=2ce7a5f6-e01c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0ea4a0ac-ff1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) This amounts to one of the [largest single-year drops](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136909/415423333/-484505765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE0YTBhYy1mZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQkVEJTT-OmFplSyxzqKtui11L-cqPC5TuM3fuxMeeY=&emci=2ce7a5f6-e01c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0ea4a0ac-ff1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) in gasoline prices in American history, and gives families more breathing room to save money, and buy essentials. Democrats are focused on lowering costs for Hoosiers, and the energy policies in the Inflation Reduction Act are doing just that. **** Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. **** Our bill of the week is [legislation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136910/415423334/-1632440472?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE0YTBhYy1mZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQkVEJTT-OmFplSyxzqKtui11L-cqPC5TuM3fuxMeeY=&emci=2ce7a5f6-e01c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0ea4a0ac-ff1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) written by Rep. Maureen Bauer (South Bend), which allows nonprofits in St. Joseph County more access to bid on and participate in tax sales. It was signed into law after the legislative session. Noting the number of established non-profits coupled with a housing shortage in her county, Bauer felt compelled to attempt to remedy both sides of the crisis. “By allowing first bid to local nonprofits with home rehabilitation experience, we are addressing the shortage of affordable housing, while also getting chronically delinquent properties that have gone through the tax sale twice, back on the tax roll,” she said in a statement published by the [Indiana House Democratic Caucus](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136911/415423335/-1489889605?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE0YTBhYy1mZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQkVEJTT-OmFplSyxzqKtui11L-cqPC5TuM3fuxMeeY=&emci=2ce7a5f6-e01c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0ea4a0ac-ff1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535). ******[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66136912/415423336/-706046172?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWE0YTBhYy1mZjFjLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQkVEJTT-OmFplSyxzqKtui11L-cqPC5TuM3fuxMeeY=&emci=2ce7a5f6-e01c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0ea4a0ac-ff1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share Sen. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **New Study Shows Indiana Far Behind on Maternal Mortality A new by the University of Washington shows that maternal mortality in Indiana is in the entire country. It’s yet another example of how Republican control is failing Hoosier families. Now with the Republican near-total abortion ban going into effect, it is more important than ever to fight back against attacks on bodily autonomy and the right to choose. Every woman in our state deserves access to safe, accessible reproductive healthcare. We must elect more Democrats to protect our rights and reverse this trend. Biden’s Policies Bringing Down Cost at the Pump for Hoosiers Average gas prices in Indiana have fallen by over , as President Biden’s focus on working families has helped gas prices cool quickly from their highs last summer. All while investing in the green energy future with record private investment in electric vehicles. This amounts to one of the in gasoline prices in American history, and gives families more breathing room to save money, and buy essentials. Democrats are focused on lowering costs for Hoosiers, and the energy policies in the Inflation Reduction Act are doing just that. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Our bill of the week is written by Rep. Maureen Bauer (South Bend), which allows nonprofits in St. Joseph County more access to bid on and participate in tax sales. It was signed into law after the legislative session. Noting the number of established non-profits coupled with a housing shortage in her county, Bauer felt compelled to attempt to remedy both sides of the crisis. “By allowing first bid to local nonprofits with home rehabilitation experience, we are addressing the shortage of affordable housing, while also getting chronically delinquent properties that have gone through the tax sale twice, back on the tax roll,” she said in a statement published by the . ** Get Involved! Opportunities to Volunteer Near You! Upcoming Candidate Trainings ** Monday, July 10: 1-2 p.m. ET: “So You Want to Run for Office?”: Are you running for office this year or looking to in the near future? If so, this is the training for you! Learn the basics of running for office, and how to get your campaign off the ground! Register by . Leadership Opportunities: Emerging Leaders Project You can now apply to join the 2023-24 class of the Emerging Leaders Project! Founded in 2011 by party activists Jeff Harris and Carmen Darland, the Emerging Leaders Project was created to bring more young people into the Democratic Party and into public service. This program is open to Hoosier Democrats between the ages of 21-40 looking to get more involved! 2023 IDEA Convention: Book Your Room Today! clean_body: If we want to win back the House in 2024, then we must protect vulnerable seats like mine from McCarthy’s MAGA extremists. | = | Peter, It’s no secret that Republicans are targeting my seat in their effort to maintain control of the House in next year’s election. They’ve been telling their donor base for MONTHS that my seat is a top target to flip, and they’ve already set aside millions to do it. If we want to win back the House in 2024, then we must protect vulnerable seats like mine from McCarthy’s MAGA extremists. = | = Republicans’ House majority is razor-thin, Peter. With only a handful of toss-up seats up for grabs, we must do everything we can to win back the House. Republicans are eager to replace me with another rubber stamp for their extremist agenda. We can’t let them. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Susan Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. | | | Fellow Conservative,
When I became a Senator just over four years ago, I was determined to fight for the next generation.

And in the years since I first took my oath of office, the threat of social media and big tech on our children has only grown.

**[Stand with me today against big tech and PROTECT our children.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=bc3d7044f8a14fc18641018ded6395e8&_e=cwPnK8NXE_4mcTNf37BhswLyhQkFdqXhrvmq3nuyXiZwWf9DgQdaX4x1J8Y1SPNyEaEASZ1cN8P4RxA_2aNr4EFLtE8XfWUBAH7kE8-bKmhna8-dLtv1Wn-DjSNBxPtjAAE5CsY8H3P1GFPPBPOWZdn3Lrirk_QUZpH2jWO15K9xXwezsx9kYHzMNDaAt78PqCs1yVD3pfVAfn3fEA3nd9yBd-hjL6DLyAugA75_5f5D7nK9nFxu31tprFYOSgq9yJ4psv5OD5UGxNlOQy6J18twdRoFGTgjCEH_EMpfDGUH8xgeeI1WzQeiseeNtRnOoB0U4wHTFhpgHRfxQH6g450oUQohtWGwkDCsQlu313moYQ29P_gbyt32yZhwxQTCkRw34zDCX6Lxa3qAePG29ktlUNZLI_JnJEkvPsOH8zJghUaooR-w9N_J1N15gY5c) **

name: Barbara K, Our Rev Volunteer, San Antonio, TX
subject: We aren’t looking for handouts, we’re looking for change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

I am a lifelong Democratic voter from Texas
and I have a message for the President. Right now I am forced to choose
between paying off nearly $200,000 in student loans vs. supporting my
aging parents and even putting a roof over my head.

I am a volunteer with Our Revolution because I know we must collectively
organize to make our country better. Not just for me, but for the over 40
million Americans with stories just like mine. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8824?t=1008&akid=4432%2E5885482%2E25levF ]We’re organizing
thousands of Our Rev supporters with student debt to speak out, hold Biden
to his promise, and put pressure on the Department of Education to deliver
relief quickly. Click here to chip in just $3 today to support our work.

I currently owe nearly $200,000 in student debt. In 2006, I left my
master’s program one semester shy of graduating to support my parents. My
father is a Vietnam Vet with PTSD, leaving my mom as the sole-breadwinner.
She couldn’t be home to care for him, so I stopped school to care for my
dad. Today, I support them financially.

Family comes first – I’m sure President Biden and I agree on this. I am
proud of what I have been able to give back to my parents. But it has
meant giving up other parts of my life, including my own ability to save
and invest.

My loans are a burden that I’ve carried my entire adult life. I didn’t
know what it felt like to have financial breathing room until President
Biden paused student loan payments during the pandemic. For the first time
in my life, I was able to save a small nest egg. I was 40 years old.

President Biden, I am not asking for a handout. I am asking for you to
intervene and use your power to improve the lives of millions of Americans
in ways you cannot even begin to imagine. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8824?t=1009&akid=4432%2E5885482%2E25levF ]Help us organize and tell Joe
Biden: we need meaningful student debt relief TODAY. Click here to give
NOW.

I’ve been nibbling around the edges of this debt for years, using
deferrals and income-based repayment plans that allowed me to keep my
payments down. But all the time, this meant the interest was becoming
insurmountable. Today a third of my total debt is interest.

If my payments start again with no relief, I don’t see a way forward. I
have no path to investing in my own home, or even continuing to support my
parents. How do I better my life if I am trapped under these payments?

That’s why I’m part of Our Revolution’s campaign to End Student Debt.
We’re organizing thousands of people with student debt to demand that Joe
Biden act NOW. We can’t wait for government red tape. The President says
he’ll do everything in his power. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8824?t=1010&akid=4432%2E5885482%2E25levF ]Help us hold him accountable and make
sure he keeps his word.

It’s not me, Us—

Barbara

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230707_FR_studentdebtbk_0_12MO_bk_na_na_studentdebt&t=1001&akid=4432%2E5885482%2E25levF ]Support Our Revolution →

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=4432%2E5885482%2E25levF ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1003&akid=4432%2E5885482%2E25levF ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1004&akid=4432%2E5885482%2E25levF ][IMG]

Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated
to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the
structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. From city halls
to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive
issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party
and get big money out of politics. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230707_FR_studentdebtbk_0_12MO_bk_na_na_studentdebt&t=1005&akid=4432%2E5885482%2E25levF ]Help us achieve these goals by
donating today.

Join our movement by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1006&akid=4432%2E5885482%2E25levF ]following us on Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/738?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230707_FR_studentdebtbk_0_12MO_bk_na_na_studentdebt&t=1007&akid=4432%2E5885482%2E25levF ]signing up here.
