name: CaucusRoom
subject: He's Blowing It
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-amhkuy-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Friday! Ben & Jerry's parent company [_has lost $2.5 Billion in market cap_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-y/) since Tuesday.**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-t/) **Update on White House Blow** The White House now claims**[ the cocaine was found "in a much more secure place](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-i/)" **... near the Situation Room and Kamala's parking spot. Secret Service has now agreed to do a **[fingerprint analysis](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-d/)** on the baggie. Former Secret Service agent Dan Bongino said**[it's not hard to figure out who could have brought cocaine into the White House](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-h/).** **Threads** Zuckerberg has released a **[new rival to Twitter](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-k/)** but it's receiving mixed reviews. _Have you joined Threads?_ **He's Blowing It** Many of us have believed that **[the Biden administration has been blowing it](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-u/),** but this is more literal than we thought! **A National Crisis** Recruitment numbers are down in the military for a number of reasons, but this one shocked me: **[77% of American youth are not eligible to serve](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-o/)**.

**US is Growing More Polarized** An increasing number of Americans are fleeing their red or blue states to find like-minded people. **[Experts have dubbed this 'The Big Sort'.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-x/)** **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-m/)!**
* The **[prettiest](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-c/) **girl.
* Should I be **[worried](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-q/)**?
* Would you[ **eat these**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-a/)?
* It's a **[no-brainer](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-amhkuy-trhiujldw-f/)!**

Democrats love to spew hate at me, but I don’t hate them back. I just pray for them.| | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=bc65cc19f8b54253ba3dff0b509ed080&_e=axZL3TRNlhfGXXwZYLsv7-wbbiKWcpogfECNXI-jDCnUFlAWhRgxFqyoNpK0FfRO2l7_omU2qKlewixUeYspI9257J57bd7XxYga9M0HF9LE5-4GiTLQxBwZLVShhI5f9sdmAr3_q5J_ropI2MfrBrHCEscRr-yqGnz4CEYTKZFe_A6_S2JZJx-pwQhMJhuyQ0fpyr972Tft5PiW8gHteMJYFnyhU-7q_g7eIKhGQVfFK6NdNLnPA_pNLztxgAsoZ69b-XR6FmnSwfxvOwqn2YzU7cLpF_RDREOPnhQPKtp719yHCdtb0zk895zfVzc3kUOu08UfaoPHjnwEGpa-nS0lN8-wcBsWgpJcYmj-XYeGZ7RWp6DG_tCRYuMLwI4-)

Fellow Patriot, I’ll shout it from the rooftops: I’m a Black Republican Christian who loves his country – and I’m living proof that the Left lies about minorities in our country. Democrats love to spew hate at me, but I don’t hate them back. **I just pray for them**. Their attacks don’t scare me. After serving my country as an Apache Helicopter Pilot, there is not much that does. The truth is, the more the Left goes after me, the more they embolden me to be stronger in my beliefs.
**[But that doesn’t mean their attacks aren’t effective...](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=bc65cc19f8b54253ba3dff0b509ed080&_e=axZL3TRNlhfGXXwZYLsv7-wbbiKWcpogfECNXI-jDCnUFlAWhRgxFqyoNpK0FfRO2l7_omU2qKlewixUeYspI9257J57bd7XxYga9M0HF9LE5-4GiTLQxBwZLVShhI5f9sdmAr3_q5J_ropI2MfrBrHCEscRr-yqGnz4CEYTKZFe_A6_S2JZJx-pwQhMJhuyQ0fpyr972Tft5PiW8gHteMJYFnyhU-7q_g7eIKhGQVfINdY7MS-DGgxqGwQOJqeYS_p8mYV5S9CvCNbEF6Ze-doW9G8J0cClm923yt5FziUcRjNcnIY2_Q2r1n8rUUj0MZVetckOcGJEKM-E9HHs13nqvUv-AcJ5unS3WFi5k0nK-JolyvFTzjAMiv-GIEOV)**

Right now, there’s a huge target on my back from the DNC, and they’ll spend whatever it takes to silence me. Last election, they spent MILLIONS trying to defeat me, and this time around, they’re going to pour in millions more. I’ll level with you – this fight won’t be easy, and I’ll need all the help I can get from Patriots like you.

Peter,

For the second year in a row, the American people celebrated Independence Day in the shadow of a disastrous Supreme Court that continues to ignore decades of its own precedent.

The Supreme Court now holds its _highest disapproval rating_ of the century. Not to mention the corruption and scandals that have weakened our trust in the nation’s highest court.

Here’s my take: We need leaders in Congress who will strengthen ethical standards across the board in Washington. It’s also clear we need a Democratic majority to act as a check against these attacks on our freedoms.

Consider supporting Will's campaign by = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. name: Will Hurd
subject: How Do You Win An Election?
body:
Get an answer to this “?” plus 2 more.
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
|
---
| Dear Friends, We are two weeks into the campaign. I thought I would give you a little bit more about why I am running, and how campaigns are won. For long-time subscribers of my newsletter you know I like talking about issues not getting the attention they deserve, so I included something on one of those generational defining challenges you always hear me talking about.
---
| _Was this email forwarded to you?_[_Sign up here_](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/Aj3ABGLzimVZSM3IqijejmlKjXDdHNMJpY1fsRxAATgH2W8TaVYibt2wTz6t8I_5ro9OBivXepPEtSsnzfl3IhofLqb-7YxeQKpvBT9kc1bp7QC1LnZ-34PNGQiZuV5ME1JH8E79urVbgHmt7FUngY8FjNzhYxYAx_RrfTgxDIGXAlRyPXYP750UBeZEbPe85eMr4471_2-85sQkj4AdqFF4zdJxQC0A_6Tz2iKWdf3FfpKMW4PP7EzYnhQ5uacpGRb0rZhTz7tiYL5HwQiOomGat9EC7NCDQILTJUFjPbfKmjE8lV5vBFn_v9FlVLyCqJMALAZsqrJ1stk98zatvJ5t8y9oR0BD_-iqGkHtQoTUfEWr "Sign Up Link") _!_
---

| | | | |
### 1\. WHY AM I RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT?
---

|
---
| **Big Picture:** I’m running for president because our country is facing generational defining problems right now. But instead of talking about solutions, we’re looking in the past.
* The Chinese Government is trying to surpass us as the sole global superpower, we have persistent inflation at a time when technologies like Artificial intelligence is going to upend all industries, and our kids’ performance in school is the worst it's been this century.

**Why it Matters:** The Republican Party can and should be the party of the future. America needs someone who isn't afraid of Donald Trump but has a vision for the future.
* Read my latest blog [“A Common Sense Vision for America”](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/f2WSHCt0WJ_vcyMbSv1i_8BtvMC3BnXzAVlUex1RgszUETIR9J8K-7oiHeDf_Fo_-IPJzrDLZPtiyyT_8JY-0yWUzHZ3no1ar1xhqdGe-dd8iEY_veiOLYQ1LlRhw74xgGNLW_Z545tTfWEv_x-UwuBKDkE_S_6xb74lp7gePOIr2YQN2ha16MwMPRvwaOOtVb_t9GZ5Qys2xq0E875PkK2PbVGJlKw-fRChbb2OgYifXovXOuvzIvKcTI9VFKNVRTkGLdN7DwWkG8vevOjTih1evGLQgG9Tt8YpHCzjIXk11f0uxxQnervQF7VLD0ZDXWGcrzfV_DvZVzvDCh_0r_0wI1WzrhgWkbOVnZmncpO1KahAv0uBq6DcWB7kReO_g_KGzK9fmdOLcVkk6fWCUos) to explore how we can address the challenges we face in these complicated times

---

| | | | |
### 2\. HOW DO YOU WIN AN ELECTION?
---

|
---
| Photo: So great to be back in the Live Free or Die state with my amazing wife. **Big Picture:** A presidential election is not one election – it’s fifty. Each state has its own election and before you get to the general election, a candidate like me has to win a primary.
* Get a primer on U.S. presidential elections [here](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/0FsW3HyO8vCmz7Wk56p6XVUHYoXfNlv29M08kNOE-89bfF-4mVXegIpxaozwMVFD9n-M4aGVslUvaHmI1Vpu3Zk_c7We-qBARgjZv-rsBb3tVHRygSTP4UKdokMChRrhASSBVDq5SlydEHSYZytNi0HCvxINfVfgd85yalRrebJN5mLeiZUWrgWsTelnhE3bgWOySLhOLl10LfAwepR3mPBYJClDlZComETtMCzEIRH2M2wyTtE_Q7BrOO0-uogo1lfx1SQBdZYb-2-JPRz97P8ONkXrLdSsnJS6N4pzbSCv_itROtFMIaNhWEWSC4Cv0sfdbMJ5a-QgsMDCPQSuik3noJ1Aqoh33MAnpUXPQqUaBHB-bCW5iJpJtuSsRYrLQopmE6nB45Ep-y_zrmRMUFfh9Z03aJqFUxH_7Z_LW2iKN1bHbncI-PqA).

**The Strategy:** I learned in my first election that the way you win a campaign is to identify your voters and turn them out to the polls. This isn’t complicated but it’s hard work.
* For example, take New Hampshire. It’s the first primary in the nation. The election will be in January 2023 and there will be over 300,000 voters in the Republican primary and I need about 90,000 people to vote for me to win.

| | [](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/CkMnffh3FLzoxkdIw9rnnOxBTMEuBbYCjqRTdO-CKqBR8Bx4sWGbO9_3yDCWk00fmSaqw19Ckq3p0h47x1re8nIaC9zxq96Xmw-4faOGNYjA8g0jqZUUww4OP0wihU2LAX_LpE0B8b1FpfOmyS80vc7uxGe6IKiGYYxdBeQxgK9HcW4VsEEGMfwyuq0h_rT49D7VfpCNtuFTiWWtVRgIRmdGm67VKODqdijqmTVY3nMslseEM9bHlHRdabGXowyc8UTUaYdyiH2q2sPLHX4Oil_XAuDT6mk5JpT6oqAz0mJioBzVxhNgK9KNBFkXt7MXco-HSWIOL5wvPU1A9cI9QVfmkwNR27j88rLExOEi0S2P0bRfUq2Ef3k7OFEJh-TBGS1-WElKzGEn5Ack6L5WKKqIkYRAugn6UMMQrycuivvW02emdT9Z)
---
---
| **The Process:** Think of Hurd for America, my campaign committee, as a start-up company. We have a great product we believe in but we need an organization and money to sell that product to the good folks in New Hampshire and around the country.
* I have to pay staff to run operations and we need to do advertising and marketing via mail, television and social media to connect with customers. All of this voter contact costs money, and I have to raise it from people like you. The maximum a person can give me for the entire primary campaign is $3,300, but any amount matters.

**Bottom Line:** Additionally, to qualify for the debate stage, I need 40,000 individual donors by Aug 23. Even donating $1 helps! If you believe in this vision and agree with what we are trying to do, then I need your help.
* [Click here](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/skBUIZmNIdGLbOel91PJiOvLbb05H7N19eBuaRW6n9deg9nr7Aw0tPtnIUPsmCdR7x2kEmQqUAGDjrPpplP9lgIhDGa2c7FjxjZDbfNlRHTOho7SD58_sxWYjYWjDeLqBUSm1Tfb5zY-4FQAErUJegd3fF0cTFRCfyncfYRbjmYoqeHsFHEjhcgfk2XkHmBQ4SyBVkwrpyOwlLiQtNbAkHB5f6iDGWRk-xlL9sbjcCyTa4uk2jvomEfz82TGLd7hnAHz2bRYBIUZrE8gPVuDqVrVhEJp9IeIRVHYNxrv8Cy_OpqHG8QQxugIrIMR7_ucPHHY-5AHkMX_p8SMgAHjg03wQ4I1KWNpXFQQPCzUGWY-4UxwlpavnyOQ5p7VXU-FiJzHqJWgmw3LByrqXO6oUTterZsAC1dNUZNBOv0RCih_BixXZ3tnJjF7kgh-XzjjazGNtOhs0aj0_95c5IYfubTxBdf04dfZO1fKRS1Xbnjb-FSsd6t6wWusuDnB-YumL1PSHlAm2xLBBUONsSNdMVzza5qx6zsMXk30TviCKgBHsqLXr6uw) to help us talk to more people and qualify for the debate stage.

---

| | | | |
### 3\. IS CHINA PREPARING FOR TOTAL WAR?
---

|
---
| Photo: Chinese Military Drills - AFP
**Big Picture:** The Chinese People's Liberation Army (PLA) has [recently announced](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/ACgz7XH03I_q-1YEMo5GWuT_hKMQyJkHgr4HRyTlAXjuUSe81QfXL5Ni-YrmXYxTYVLmvDUzV488rLlJ-vkFnkwx8NhpJ7OCFSmuZSTdnXShaheOLykVux8shWeWWeQ9kA2PYXnnAqMv_9lPBAE7uIjuGdudnBLos_GBry6nYS4pIIgqKaiPoAX036lcYMIrfyhpIGRVh328x8U8xcvZMnb-M7uzm76UMi9-_eSLiXj1ScJ1N3nw_Q6zIFg3RIfbWAbN9iIjsXz61dG8JW-oxUTm_qbER6OqEDDivjQD4eQ-4PfRoo3pbX8Phzj9n8SEP5dWaS564cilzkZRW9ucFr0zIyEcitY9uavMxYR8R9ErFtQ6ldWiCfsIjXUbGftyzpFzXlQVhb1d4iGhzSlkzozUiBFlDUHKcgcd967l65W1QA0M8dUlOvBaeh7cxB3y8hJuKEI8-Ct_Vcn0NXfuHBn6ZrEzKL5yL6eZCeDbSSFZ3QtRMtRuIQNvB3SZqhyVXZQDgkeICykb6CaIVBXxApUEaxScdj4) that they will now be considering a “total war” scenario in their military training exercises. They want to be prepared for a potential World War.
**Why This Matters:** The Biden Administration is falling into the trap that has plagued previous presidents thinking it can sweet-talk China by sending senior Cabinet leaders for nebulous discussions in Beijing.
* What we need to be doing is strengthening our alliances with our friends and modernizing our military to the point where the Chinese Communist Party knows it can’t beat us.

**Bottom Line:** As we have seen in Ukraine, global peace is never a guarantee. We need to be vigilant and ready for any scenario when it comes to China.

Fellow American,

When I entered this race, I had never run for office before. I didn’t have years of campaigning under my belt, or a list of political donors to help support my campaign.

I bet most grassroots conservatives only knew my name from _Fox News_ appearances.

But now, 4 months after announcing my campaign for President of the United States, I am climbing in the polls - _even polling ahead of a former Vice President, a sitting U.S. Senator, and multiple governors._

I am proud of the outsider campaign we are running. As the first millennial to run for the GOP nomination, I want to foster national pride among young Americans. I want to restore the values that make America great: faith, family, patriotism, and hard work.

We need a PRIME spot on the debate stage to discuss this with voters across the country, and these poll numbers are KEY. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Vote NO on August 8th

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66141577/415443473/-1741698823?refcode=em_eng_2023.07.07_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mjk1MTVjMy0xNjFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cHV9fBfI6XLaG3IEze29oRA8FHP6mVSJYVsgun24iEk=)
Peter, Ohio Republicans are attacking our democracy, but this August we have a chance to fight back.

**In 1851, Ohio voters approved our constitution and gave voters the right to pass constitutional measures with a simple majority._In doing so, voters enshrined the essential principle of democracy that one person = one vote._**

Now, Republicans in Columbus want to strip away our democratic rights and make it so the majority of Ohioans are beholden to an extreme minority.

We can’t let radical politicians and outside special interest groups take our power, Peter. **That’s why on August 8th we need to vote NO on issue 1.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66141578/415443474/-2145687048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mjk1MTVjMy0xNjFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cHV9fBfI6XLaG3IEze29oRA8FHP6mVSJYVsgun24iEk=&emci=1e81a3ff-fa1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=429515c3-161d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046) _Peter, we can’t afford to sit this one out._ It’s all hands on deck to protect Ohio’s democracy, so please **make sure to check your voter registration before July 10, and mark your calendars to vote by August 8!**

Thank you,

Emilia Sykes HQ

PS. For more information on Issue 1, check out **[https://votenoinaugust.org/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66141579/415443475/-2145687048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mjk1MTVjMy0xNjFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cHV9fBfI6XLaG3IEze29oRA8FHP6mVSJYVsgun24iEk=&emci=1e81a3ff-fa1c-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=429515c3-161d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046)** | **A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. name: R. Scott (R-FL)
subject: This is my “why”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
I know you get a lot of emails from me, but this one is different.

I want to tell you a little bit about my story, and why fighting for the American Dream is so important to me.

I grew up in public housing. My adopted dad was a truck driver and my mother was a store clerk. We struggled to make ends meet, and it wasn’t easy.

_But every day, they instilled in me the values of hard work, trust, and faith, and that set the foundation for the rest of my life._

After serving in the Navy, I opened my first business so my mom could have a job. It was a small donut shop.

And never in a million years did I think that tiny donut shop would lead to the incredible opportunities I’ve been able to experience.

**I know the American Dream is real - because as someone who went from public housing to a successful businessman, to a United States Senator, I’ve lived it. **

**But right now, the Democrats want to destroy that dream and trade it for their woke, socialist agenda.**

I won’t let them get away with it, but I can’t do it alone.__

[**Join me today and DEFEND the American Dream for the next generation.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=b8b14eb7f34a495fb2b79b5d3b9c2602&_e=dpjApjKruNWXmgFMFDb2PfdtFWSDChFUI6AQ8qZ_ReLAJLFUCw8AK5avwiq7vVGVmWjjIIhCzpGmL5cmaiamgb05S-36ypjV6fyQVINDPCj04j-Y2OebqtHOaEtE9PLbfz19lWMG1T0m1I7hzYMracvAJwEqbjAELfnJJ8Y-JjWPmahZNHge-e_bwKAJ6a3vB3GOO05wUuAfywQFQUgWpPl_Fq7_CtQQQ77VEZ_sbcSzi4oB4FDI872NsSwtvw-HeT5aoXpDc-tyvlVXG0_y8xbCPc6EEJ55z_uUXDQJJLzfTMperqPWsGy7YfWIEaqzBPCKPXb96PU_qmZ1xz8u28SsVIs5Ee69D89uQHazbm4%3D)
---
| | [**DEFEND THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=b8b14eb7f34a495fb2b79b5d3b9c2602&_e=dpjApjKruNWXmgFMFDb2PfdtFWSDChFUI6AQ8qZ_ReLAJLFUCw8AK5avwiq7vVGVmWjjIIhCzpGmL5cmaiamgb05S-36ypjV6fyQVINDPCj04j-Y2OebqtHOaEtE9PLbfz19lWMG1T0m1I7hzYMracvAJwEqbjAELfnJJ8Y-JjWPmahZNHge-e_bwKAJ6a3vB3GOO05wUuAfywQFQUgWpLAXoAYgyYOzyIYw7WariTWnkSjp_YECS2PzZng-FVRxMuoSUFnnjvXadrhDzEPkNU4SgoZH-qYDJ50wDZTyAKwnOc4dNVyVspvqDF0ieLKxImvEiMYUe9mZnxsXHSGRZF_2GhJqZVczzXZ8JzP9cXk%3D)
---
Every day, Democrats in Washington are trying to change everything that is good about our country.

They are trying to erase women’s sports. They want to make everyone dependent on the government.

They want to erase our uniqueness while dividing us against each other.

**Here’s the truth: we should be uniting under the American Dream, not letting the Left divide and erase us. **

I will ALWAYS defend that dream which makes us the greatest nation on Earth from the radical Left.... and I want YOU to help me do it.

[**Please, join me today to DEFEND the American Dream that makes us the strongest country in the world. **](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=b8b14eb7f34a495fb2b79b5d3b9c2602&_e=dpjApjKruNWXmgFMFDb2PfdtFWSDChFUI6AQ8qZ_ReLAJLFUCw8AK5avwiq7vVGVmWjjIIhCzpGmL5cmaiamgb05S-36ypjV6fyQVINDPCj04j-Y2OebqtHOaEtE9PLbfz19lWMG1T0m1I7hzYMracvAJwEqbjAELfnJJ8Y-JjWPmahZNHge-e_bwKAJ6a3vB3GOO05wUuAfywQFQUgWpKlCRmPEHvqGdK4WWS_JaHcQQKU-qIe4fGNjpmMzz3cECSUjt0WqYDoCsjgccQ16r2oPYV6Af261IPhbRyMX3xr_0ICgr0t-yV663VRskiirfQJYcb5MIu2QVQwUyTa09SdVA69akFKQJwMkexDdM-0%3D)
---
[**DEFEND THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=b8b14eb7f34a495fb2b79b5d3b9c2602&_e=dpjApjKruNWXmgFMFDb2PfdtFWSDChFUI6AQ8qZ_ReLAJLFUCw8AK5avwiq7vVGVmWjjIIhCzpGmL5cmaiamgb05S-36ypjV6fyQVINDPCj04j-Y2OebqtHOaEtE9PLbfz19lWMG1T0m1I7hzYMracvAJwEqbjAELfnJJ8Y-JjWPmahZNHge-e_bwKAJ6a3vB3GOO05wUuAfywQFQUgWpLHFab88g-qfukRCyb78joycEx68UqB7E0LnrvWEyD9bLe8Q_zGHxVBIFr1ECKgrDIcaMx2WQkV4g6LZgiSs8LlyYbBdElr9b2b8R2xlVx6ogF2ONsql37H-kKueKN7vlOtCyK3Bwly1_BMAW756cYc%3D)

Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so **[please, click here to support my efforts to keep freedom alive in America.](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=b8b14eb7f34a495fb2b79b5d3b9c2602&_e=dpjApjKruNWXmgFMFDb2PfdtFWSDChFUI6AQ8qZ_ReLAJLFUCw8AK5avwiq7vVGVBs66h5kp_kC9AWXqA_e2K1aQb559GTtitEMqPLNLpMo8adn4SkWkf103rKmcQrDFgjbYkvG3_JzItTZNe9F9IUEVUJwZ6WuqBeCiYFJwPV0BwoScLJ5IJjmxz4G-4bibSG3SOrDq_ZEtWyqzN5jYX1R7iQTfGRQWX_w0NoToNF7s5mKOaSMS0UVIDdykRxgc42MxYioPE0gfQW9OY3duGzw-6Q1lMhetffQlKAGPnS5YA8kVal_N4Z_uevOadIL6xhDHIto0v32tEW3qPTiXsgbXRm4zPZkM__JGedD8dZV0lC5qVnw_tCJLbICynN2o)** Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The establishment wants to shut us out
body:
#
Peter, we’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: Our movement is here to stay.
Don’t just take our word for it, take a look at these recent headlines:

When we run on a strong, unapologetic progressive platform, we can win anywhere. Folks all around the country are tired of the status quo, and we’re ready to support candidates fighting to join our growing progressive bloc in Congress.
Leaders like Summer Lee in Pennsylvania are paving the way for change to the democratic party as we know it, up and down the ballot. Pittsburgh has elected left leaders to local, state and federal offices, defeating corporate interests at every level with a people powered movement. Summer is at the core of that, and we’re proud to have recruited her to run for Congress.
[**With your support, we can back even more candidates like Summer Lee as we approach election season. We must expand the progressives in Congress if we want any progress on our values. Will you make a contribution today toward Justice Democrats?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135563?refcode=em20230707-29786&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=29786%2E1203867%2EcqRUqe)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135563?refcode=em20230707-29786&t=20&akid=29786%2E1203867%2EcqRUqe)**
Our progressive movement is multiracial and multigenerational — it’s the future of our country. Our communities deserve better. While the establishment continues to block progress, our neighbors are breathing unhealthy air, experiencing historic weather events, and bearing the brunt of the increase in the cost of living. We cannot continue to accept the status quo.
We need to support our bloc in Congress and increase its members. [**With your support today, we can expand our programs and elect more work-class champions like Summer to Congress. Please, rush a contribution today.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135563?refcode=em20230707-29786&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=29786%2E1203867%2EcqRUqe)
Thank you for being in this fight with us.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats
Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=29786%2E1203867%2EcqRUqe) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=29786%2E1203867%2EcqRUqe) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230707-29786-footer&t=24&refcode2=29786_1203867_cqRUqe&akid=29786%2E1203867%2EcqRUqe)**

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the and your state public health department. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources. | | **White Powder In The West Wing❗**

---
| | President Biden’s White House is nothing but a joke. The latest fiasco we’re unraveling is cocaine found in the West Wing. As usual, this administration is working overtime to sweep it under the rug—and they’ll do it faster than you can say[ “cover-up.”](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c7f65f4ea9ca40babcead5500e51179a&_e=2iP0KSUNhoEopAkxaeFMEAoOAbrUaTwGOCpRizx1xA6MwKXqMnSdQIbUNvt_4yXz9RI6CMtkLHEQBj32Ktbtsjq8MRv1OMjfZ46EtqP6ZannTfQuCjT6EVqX1Uh9EEtdCB7w8CW0hqKaQ_H5hgKq5mwh7Ug5e0fcal-7lEFyDZiKG4Gz2Jti5Q6dH9aXMS9118sKkocSbawVoBOQGIU_BXzp6048TiGyafp29YPV9N4r-879u-PzscQZnx4XI6tdobWMoFOeVAHRmna5B2L1zZ7l0PbHcZiAAkW7FApQN09w0rlHLyp2VX43CsKV9t0E) Rather than facing the issue head-on with a promise to get to the bottom of it, KJP opened her latest press conference with a lecture for law-abiding gun owners. President Biden can’t keep illicit drugs from coming through the front door of the dadgum White House, but he’s all fired up to blame [gangland violence](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c7f65f4ea9ca40babcead5500e51179a&_e=2iP0KSUNhoEopAkxaeFMEAoOAbrUaTwGOCpRizx1xA7vk_XeHVVfxr0cKySwsRJYodI2uIG3J2hzg5cnnB1qKB7rgEGHKlJAr9AEavc6E4WbKMh2Z4U57kuDds7hTRkAVKu27n2PGHgLn2en4ESjlX70MLt2UOM4McIg78WGbYhUSMq6BQfasVRhwfD5QN6emrmrLGbnHvj4nzT0UiyrUA1L8fNNJYKqSoPCyHDhwAU%3D) on lawful Americans. It’s enough to make you lose your lunch. My prediction is that this hush-hush situation will inevitably be blamed on some staffer who is willing to take the fall and disappear quietly—but come on, folks. With surveillance cameras, visitor logs, and facial recognition, do they really think we’re going to buy this tale of a mysterious culprit who can[ never be found?](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c7f65f4ea9ca40babcead5500e51179a&_e=2iP0KSUNhoEopAkxaeFMEL1AHuD8j24HVSjLQnuYyRuLDpgOO6JMD-En3fR159HOouDvmeXIeAsv5iAWZ--LtcLF-OxSjq0U1eTM8DbydDw5R7TgADHai7JIL-kCKNvpdOQsWF5dN4hPPmjeCf3M6cXaChL6nNIdi-KkXS7qvTner4TkN5VJ_devrBR4QWqjhZbRmuXO4xMCvyRh3qfAOosllP52PH2EXgJGY5pVaO-VzygehM-F44Z1_Z1_2AOKmF0BU5TCg_A_TbGKibS8II2lOl9FTEEXPaMb6o6l2Z14svuGoih4KlRMQmOh8RZSQYLLr_sQcKX-IS_HhBGIgg%3D%3D) Whoever is responsible for this is close to the president, and I think we can all take a wild guess who it may be.

[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c7f65f4ea9ca40babcead5500e51179a&_e=2iP0KSUNhoEopAkxaeFMEAk-cusykIpedW06uzrnyAdTwq-lI1DxDZyu5qj751-HA6MYq-DsuGHSyjQZXwRghiTl7G0kxmT9EoHMQ_kTRjQ2-V2B7xt5tLtz8X0-vW3KhHX6hnpqBwWZ13k5R5mNOERxAfR9PVsM6iDYQ-vuduaNJSk5CGrHABMij904ltpGVtx26h4-zD8YSGvQayDsnKckh5P_OfAheLW5c84MM3uUg-p1eXnscIEdoY2voESi_2Ka1u-r165M1DXYXUqpf9T086wdVGu83nQKMf9cs1NZtNoSo5bqL8DTETSDck1O)

# Photo Credit: WATE

| | The Knoxville community is rallying around a youth basketball team, demonstrating that Tennessee kindness we all know and love. The [Tennessee Finesse](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c7f65f4ea9ca40babcead5500e51179a&_e=2iP0KSUNhoEopAkxaeFMEFKhFizk3e4Px3eLo7wXnaVdHCbsX3ajyKEksDN2dSYRJLYBcDmH-92Irbx4YEgTPsYV8pPN3ExjwDHZnZU2KvXNQthpc436FaVdXe51TEAOdBCqOzLo4y5BqM7BuG1e-tDSjCh1bR1NtMitJLVh9ztZKES4eZeug-pOxOcmTHgSluFNPggq8LVEpHVKsDHY1YoRQ6RmKKCtaPcQVHc4eKA%3D) at the Boys & Girls Club is killing it on the court after receiving uniforms, athletic shoes, and backpacks from people in the community. In fact, they placed second in their most recent tournament. Their newfound success has prompted a need for transportation to tournaments and practice venues. Whether it’s a van, bus, or car, they have to find a way to get these kids around town. The non-profit group, [Turn Up Knox](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c7f65f4ea9ca40babcead5500e51179a&_e=2iP0KSUNhoEopAkxaeFMECOp-6hmp37RKgfLpVuziqghBEMpLPrK_WPz0WPI6CwVMK-n_Vnu2UMWwinYN0ytwRtAC8rWTGlG5Jbl95ttvTdGWsGh8CQHaLOVT9rkQIhF1UAP8FgtGC78NcvNfI-P_OigS3p8oHr8uFqmVb2dPDzm9K7QZuboEQegk_iVxjRV__2X6Z8f5aWXzB9iRm5nBQ%3D%3D), is donating $1,000 toward the purchase of a van and is challenging local churches to do the same. People in Tennessee always come together to make a lasting impact, and it’s just another example of what makes our communities so special.

Right now the Socialist Left and RINO Republicans are coming for him and his campaign even though he's the candidate in this field that has the best track record of standing up to Socialist Joe Biden, securing our Southern Border, and stopping the woke agenda that 's threatening the very well-being of our country's future. Wade. | ---|--- Thanks for your input, Democratic Association of Secretaries of State Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. = | =

subject: We've got BIG news 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Kim for Congress - CA34_
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidkimforca/big-news?e=fee98d637f)
---
| | [ ](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=ecf52f5f4e&e=fee98d637f)
---
| | [ ](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=603818404c&e=fee98d637f)
---
| | **Dear friend:**

_**I’m very excited to announce that I am officially running for U.S. Congress in CA’s 34th Congressional District!**_

This isn’t the first time I’m running as a grassroots challenger candidate. **Last year, we won 49% of the general election votes against the corporate-backed incumbent. **We are celebrating you and the movement we’ve built together! With your continued support we’re confident we’ll finally edge out the influence of special interests and win back power for the people of CA-34.

**I’m running for Congress because our current representative – Jimmy Gomez – continues to prioritize corporations and the wealthy few over the needs of his constituents. We deserve a representative who will co-govern and implement life empowering policies that will put people over profit.**

As a children’s court attorney, I have witnessed firsthand how poverty, resource deprivation, and a broken system of government keeps failing us. I know what it’s like to be buried in debt, working 2-3 jobs to survive. Grit and determination often aren’t enough to get you through hard times. We deserve a safety net that uplifts people and meets our basic needs.

I am running a 100% grassroots clean-money campaign because it’s time to put our community first.

**We’ll do it through:**
* **People-Powered Politics**
* **Co-Governance**
* **Life-Empowering Policies **

**Let’s do this together! **
* **DONATE:** Make a secure online contribution by [clicking here](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=3d3e25e348&e=fee98d637f).
* **VOLUNTEER:** Join our team by [signing up here](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=2bd3ce4a2b&e=fee98d637f).
* **SPREAD THE WORD:** Support us on [Facebook](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=2bd1e91ce8&e=fee98d637f), [Instagram](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=d44f8cef84&e=fee98d637f), [Twitter](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=b79bbeb482&e=fee98d637f), and [TikTok](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=2dfa37ca7d&e=fee98d637f).

**We need bold leaders who will serve with a true heart of public service. We’d had enough of self-service politics. It’s time for people-centered politics. It’s time for us!**
---

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: MAGA Republicans hate what we’ve done in these six months.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66142151/415445945/857475129?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWJkNWI3OS0xYjFkLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RuAl3BEimakUWBT7xJmFVD4D5gpAM8Erxdw-4wUzvjQ=)
---
Team, I’ve been in Congress for six months today. **So, I want to share an update with you about what I’ve been working on:** ● I introduced a bill that bans the distribution of 3-D printed gun blueprints.
● I sent a letter to the Republican Chairs of the House Judiciary and House Oversight Committees, demanding they hold a joint field hearing in my hometown of Parkland to examine gun violence and the success of red flag laws.
● I urged the Biden Administration to invoke the Defense Production Act to address our nation’s cancer drug shortages.
● I introduced legislation to strengthen sanctions on Iran and block their ability to fund terrorist groups abroad. I ran for Congress to make a difference for Florida — and we’ve done so much in just six months.

**But MAGA Republicans are obstructionists, targeting our district in 2024.**

[**Team, I’m working every single day to prevent gun violence in our communities — and MAGA Republicans hate it. clean_body: | = Team, I’ve been in Congress for six months today. So, I want to share an update with you about what I’ve been working on: ● I introduced a bill that bans the distribution of 3-D printed gun blueprints. ● I sent a letter to the Republican Chairs of the House Judiciary and House Oversight Committees, demanding they hold a joint field hearing in my hometown of Parkland to examine gun violence and the success of red flag laws. ● I urged the Biden Administration to invoke the Defense Production Act to address our nation’s cancer drug shortages. ● I introduced legislation to strengthen sanctions on Iran and block their ability to fund terrorist groups abroad. I ran for Congress to make a difference for Florida — and we’ve done so much in just six months. But MAGA Republicans are obstructionists, targeting our district in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. You heard from two members of the Tennessee Three, Reps. Johnson and Pearson, about how the Tennessee GOP has used their supermajority in the legislature to enact their extreme agenda and work to ban abortion, protect the gun lobby, restrict voting rights, and so much more.
They know firsthand that it takes people power to fight back against Republican attacks on our democracy, and they called on you to fight the Republican agenda head-on by re-electing state Democrats like Reps. Jones and Pearson.
**In a few short weeks, Democrats can get it done. We can deal a huge blow to the GOP by officially re-electing Reps. Jones and Pearson of the Tennessee Three to the state House.**
It’s crucial we show the Republican Party that they can’t simply expel their colleagues for speaking out against their hate-fueled platform. **Special elections like these are key to defending Democratic power and chipping away at Republican strongholds, and we need all our grassroots supporters on our side.**
[Will you chip in a gift of $7 or more ahead of Tennessee’s vital special elections so we can defeat extreme Republicans and elect state Democrats nationwide? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtxM-7M6lx0tBvbL0QK0PU4vbNBS3aGrI97nzM3KtKVxGuAk9viXPkrmHnjb75F2XUXqtUh8EBTJnSIUd9e6OOZ1gAUxsdxcUTApmn9huxoKCsoNvuJGJwZef8_CgTQ6plVD3bEBLECGLG0gN9RHi10AjgrIbXQsePyppBYbfdeHBay9mrKITrQQ2mBG9dhyqlx2lwYhG-jHeOCL2LomANyaqv_t_RKOXZrkAre4rc9ZWF9Ur2mHCRwWeV-FtpRVXuBWx8v923l6QV9Sd61Trw7EoeEuFopia3-k3hx2uA6S4z5xpqR-ekg_SmSCpnQ5QlTjtnSN9YAX8H-Xf151e5uOHVyi-wiubzLN3txLF3ygcu6Hvi2_lmU0Ygfbr2OuWUsNkMJOOAebkWkO5g9qrY26dZnTA12BTyiP2_TxbSMexCTlieTk6ttkJ1OJ182w2j/3xo/Y5Hl1B2qRlC5an9gmgQKrA/h6/XVQiQ-lVZD91PEjgwL9hUmiKuoAkm5cuWdTX3eg9yYo)
It’s races like these where grassroots donations can make the most impact – re-electing Reps. Jones and Pearson will be a monumental step in our fight to build a better America. With these wins, we can keep two Democratic fighters standing up to Republicans’ anti-democratic actions and pushing for progress in Tennessee.
Together, we can face this fight directly and elect the Democratic leaders we need in states like Tennessee and beyond.
Team DLCC

clean_body: You won’t believe what just happened. TN Republican legislators and their allies flooded Rep. Jones’ opponent with HUGE donations (up to $1,000+) ahead of this month’s special election primary. | | | | | You won’t believe what just happened to one of the members of the Tennessee Three. State Republican legislators and their allies flooded Rep. Justin Jones’ opponent with HUGE donations (up to $1,000+) ahead of last month’s special election primary. This is their latest attempt to tear down their opposition. It’s despicable, and we must hold them to account. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | You heard from two members of the Tennessee Three, Reps. Johnson and Pearson, about how the Tennessee GOP has used their supermajority in the legislature to enact their extreme agenda and work to ban abortion, protect the gun lobby, restrict voting rights, and so much more. They know firsthand that it takes people power to fight back against Republican attacks on our democracy, and they called on you to fight the Republican agenda head-on by re-electing state Democrats like Reps. Jones and Pearson. In a few short weeks, Democrats can get it done. We can deal a huge blow to the GOP by officially re-electing Reps. Jones and Pearson of the Tennessee Three to the state House. It’s crucial we show the Republican Party that they can’t simply expel their colleagues for speaking out against their hate-fueled platform. Special elections like these are key to defending Democratic power and chipping away at Republican strongholds, and we need all our grassroots supporters on our side. It’s races like these where grassroots donations can make the most impact – re-electing Reps. Jones and Pearson will be a monumental step in our fight to build a better America. With these wins, we can keep two Democratic fighters standing up to Republicans’ anti-democratic actions and pushing for progress in Tennessee. Together, we can face this fight directly and elect the Democratic leaders we need in states like Tennessee and beyond. name: NDRC HQ
subject: Why the fight for abortion rights hinges on the fight for fair maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team – it’s been over a year since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and eliminated nationwide protections guaranteeing reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy.

**The bad news** is that since then, fourteen states have passed total abortion bans – even though a majority of Americans oppose these extreme measures.

**But the good news** is that seventeen states have passed measures to protect reproductive rights, and several others have blocked efforts to ban abortion. **To protect reproductive freedom in more states across the country, we must make sure voters can make their voices heard. That’s why the NDRC is working across the country to combat GOP efforts to undermine our democracy.

[_Will you donate now to help?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66142297/415446297/1153222191?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230707_FR_7G_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlODM1YTJiLTFjMWQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=voonKXrTEcBt332PnAkZqDNIuyrAGdfGzKiRHvk1Qh8=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Republicans know that their far-right, anti-choice agenda is a losing message. But instead of trying to persuade voters, they want to _change the rules_ to make it easier to enforce minority rule.
❌ In states like Arkansas, Missouri, Ohio, and Oklahoma, Republicans are working to make it harder to pass citizen-led ballot initiatives that protect abortion rights.

❌ In North Carolina, gerrymandered maps helped Republicans secure a veto-proof majority in the legislature – even though the GOP only won by half a point statewide! As a result, Republicans were able to pass an extreme 12-week abortion ban.

❌ And across the country, states are still passing new voting restrictions – including an unprecedented move in Texas that allows state lawmakers to overturn election results from the state’s most diverse and most Democratic city.
[**_Help fight the GOP’s anti-democratic tactics nationwide: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66142304/415446304/1153222191?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230707_FR_7G_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlODM1YTJiLTFjMWQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=voonKXrTEcBt332PnAkZqDNIuyrAGdfGzKiRHvk1Qh8=)

Team, it’s clear that too many Republicans believe the only way they can win is by silencing voters' voices. But we know that if we can protect our democratic system, we have the power to elect leaders who will protect reproductive rights.

[**_That’s why the NDRC won’t stop fighting for electoral fairness. name: Laura Friedman
subject: re: devastating SCOTUS decisions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66142361/415446558/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTBjNGEyYTktMWQxZC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M9ltoctOUCkBUphkF5d8qaIAWlWi1Y79tILELPwyPVE=) Friend,

As we head into July, it’s hard to ignore the devastating decisions handed down by the Supreme Court last week.

The Supreme Court, led by its far-right majority, struck down President Biden’s student loan relief plan, weakened protections for the LGBTQ+ community, and removed affirmative action from higher education.

This is a truly sad moment for our county. Many of us thought that in America, our progress was inevitable. That once a group received the fundamental rights and protections our values demand, that they would never again face repression.

**Unfortunately, the Supreme Court has proven this to be wrong. Justice is not guaranteed, and now it’s up to our elected officials and the public to demand it.**

Moments like these are why we need legislators who can act as a line of defense against attacks on our freedoms. It's a big reason why in the state assembly, I helped author and pass legislation to enshrine reproductive rights and end LGBTQIA+ job and housing discrimination. I'm proud to be building a campaign that defends and represents our community, but in order to face these challenges, I need to hear from you.

**[Will you take a few minutes to fill out our July Priorities Survey? We’re hoping to receive 500 responses to look through at our next team planning meeting.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66142362/415446559/350250423?refcode=em-7.7.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTBjNGEyYTktMWQxZC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M9ltoctOUCkBUphkF5d8qaIAWlWi1Y79tILELPwyPVE=&emci=665ae6a0-1d1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e0c4a2a9-1d1d-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Last night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2886%2E5257348%2EPuepRr ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, last night
I spoke with Lawrence O’Donnell on MSNBC about the Special Counsel Jack
Smith’s latest move to find out what was said behind closed doors in the
White House before the January 6th insurrection.

If successful, the evidence found by Mr. Smith could lead to a conspiracy
charge against Donald Trump to defraud the American people.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230707_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2886%2E5257348%2EPuepRr ]Adam Schiff and Lawerence O'Donnell speak on the MSNBC show, The Last
Word.

Let's break it down.

FIRST: We saw Trump do everything he could to shift the results of the
2020 election in his favor. Attempting to halt the count of absentee
ballots, trying to stop states from declaring Biden the winner, asking
state legislatures to go back into session and declare him the winner, and
plotting a fake elector scheme to submit fraudulent certificates of
ascertainment that asserted Trump had won the Electoral College vote in a
few key states.

THEN: In December of 2020, Trump held a contentious meeting in the Trump
Oval Office leading to a screaming match among the attendees, including
Gen. Michael Flynn, Sidney Powell, Pat Cipollone, and Eric Herschmann.

After this meeting, when Donald Trump didn’t get the answers he wanted, he
tweeted out rallying his supporters to gather at the U.S. Capitol
Building. We all remember how that turned out:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230707_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2886%2E5257348%2EPuepRr ]Tweet from Donald Trump on December 30, 2020 reads: January sixth, see
you in D.C.!

AFTER: On the January 6th Committee, we uncovered the truth about Donald
Trump’s desperate attempts to overturn the 2020 election. We interviewed
scores of witnesses and gathered evidence about the events that led to
that dark day. But not every witness was cooperative, and we didn’t have
the time or the enforcement ability to compel them to answer our
questions. And I pushed the DOJ to investigate these very credible
allegations, as they appeared to be slow-walking.

NOW: Some of Trump's top enablers are willing to participate in interviews
with Jack Smith. If the Special Counsel gets the answers we couldn’t, then
it’s possible that something from that chaotic December meeting could show
how Donald Trump knew he had lost the 2020 election and the steps he was
willing to take to overturn the results and defraud the American people.

All of this would be powerful evidence that could lead to a conspiracy
charge against Trump.

MAGA Republicans have proven over and over again that they will retaliate
against those trying to reveal the truth about the January 6th
insurrection — including me. But I will never stop holding those who
tarnish our Constitution and attempt to dismantle our democracy
accountable for their actions. This might make me their enemy, but that
will never deter me.

But to stand up to their relentless attacks, I need your support. Trump’s
allies do not want to see me in the Senate because they know I will
tirelessly fight to protect our democracy. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230707_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2886%2E5257348%2EPuepRr ]That’s why we must do
everything we can to get me there. Will you chip in $3 to this campaign
which fights on the side of what’s right?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=july2023_abs_em.xMFZNf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230707_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2886%2E5257348%2EPuepRr ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=july2023_abs_em.Er_QPe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230707_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2886%2E5257348%2EPuepRr ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=july2023_abs_em.phWsA5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230707_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2886%2E5257348%2EPuepRr ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=july2023_abs_em.GV7_Ed&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230707_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2886%2E5257348%2EPuepRr ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=july2023_abs_em.uY9sx1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230707_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2886%2E5257348%2EPuepRr ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230707_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2886%2E5257348%2EPuepRr ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’m glad to see the Special Counsel moving quickly to conclude the
investigation and, I hope, to bring long overdue justice.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230707_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2886%2E5257348%2EPuepRr ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=july2023_abs_em.aS6u8E&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230707_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=2886%2E5257348%2EPuepRr ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=2886%2E5257348%2EPuepRr ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=2886%2E5257348%2EPuepRr ]Privacy Policy

Republicans will do anything to protect David Schweikert, but it’s clear that we have a real opportunity to flip this seat from red to blue next year.

| Hi Peter, it’s Kurt.

I know we send a lot of emails asking you to donate to our campaign, but we wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important.

We’re getting ready for a highly competitive election next year. Cook Political Report and Sabato’s Crystal Ball have already rated our district a **“toss-up,”** and Roll Call has also called it a **“key race.”**

Republicans will do anything to protect David Schweikert, but it’s clear that we have a real opportunity to flip this seat from red to blue next year. The work we do now is critically important to our success in the future.

[_**I hate to ask again, but can I count on you to chip in $5 or more today to help us keep our fundraising on track?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66142502/415447128/215820969?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230707-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2U4MzQ2YWEtMWYxZC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xCRGR9sV6DhgFkF15adGY_IrCpOZWscNKu7GV7renNw=)
